description:
## The Team
As an Intern in AI & Management Consulting you join our Value Engineering team to focus on driving and closing opportunities by identifying and selling the value Celonis can bring to customers. Our Value Engineers (VE) are the trusted advisor for customers and work on the intersection of technology and business. Value Engineers partner with sales and customers to create compelling solutions to critical business problems.

## The Role
Value Engineers are the trusted advisors for our prospects and customers and leverage product expertise and business acumen to solve our prospects’ and customers’ most pressing challenges. You will gain experience in executing proof of value projects and take part in technical discussions with stakeholders. By creating customer-based business cases, you support the strategic business development activities for the DACH market.

## The work you’ll do
- Analyze data from our customers to increase transparency in business processes
- Understand the pain points of our customers and translate them into actionable use cases in the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform
- Collaborate with customers and partners to uncover their core business challenges and determine how Celonis Process Intelligence can help them achieve their business objectives
- Quantify financial impact of use cases implemented in the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform and prepare management ready presentations
- Present findings together with your team in front of customers’ C-level and decision makers
- Leverage Celonis data modeling and AI capabilities to uncover process inefficiencies, generate insights, and deliver high impact, data driven value propositions to clients.
- Pitch the Celonis AI value proposition and vision to customers and align our solutions with their AI strategy
- Build strong relationships with our customers by winning their trust through technical, product expertise, and business acumen

## The qualifications you need
- Student of Business Informatics / Management & Technology / Industrial Engineering/ Computer Science/ Economics / Mathematics or of a comparable program
- Strong communicational skills and interest in interacting with potential customers
- Confidence to present to C-level executives and larger audiences
- Have a passion for technology, data, OpenAI and LLMs and the impact it can have on the world
- Experience in consulting and highly interested in Data Analytics & Applied AI
- Knowledge in SQL and Python or related database query languages (completion of Celonis "Rising Star" modules would be a plus)
- Analytical mindset and the ability to multi-task, prioritize and execute
- Effective communicator and **business fluent in German and English**
- **Full-time availability** for at least **five months** starting from **June 2026**

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation:** Work with the leading, award-winning process mining technology, shaping the future of business.
- **Accelerate Your Growth:** Benefit from clear career paths, internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and mentorship opportunities.
- **Receive Exceptional Benefits:** Including generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer days, and much more.
- **Prioritize Your Well-being:** Access to resources such as gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong:** Find community and support through dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Make Meaningful Impact:** Be part of a company driven by strong values: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Collaborate Globally:** Join a dynamic, international team of talented individuals.
- **Empowered Environment:** Contribute your ideas in an open culture with autonomous teams.
summary: Celonis is seeking an AI & Management Consulting Intern for its Value Engineering team focusing on the DACH market. The role involves analyzing customer data, creating business cases, and leveraging AI and process intelligence to drive value for C-level stakeholders. Candidates must be students in technical or business fields, fluent in German and English, and available full-time for at least five months starting June 2026.
title: AI & Management Consulting Intern (Value Engineering - DACH Market)

description:
## The Role

The Client Value Partner (CVP) role is a key addition to our broader Value Engineering team and will play a crucial role in Celonis’ growth strategy. As a CVP, you will spearhead our mission of data-driven business transformation with our most strategic customers within the **Manufacturing/Automotive** industry. You will lead extensive teams of Celonis experts to ensure the success and satisfaction of some of our top customer base on their journey to realizing value with Celonis.

The CVP is the accountable lead for customer success, acting as the trusted advisor for a strategic customer. This involves engaging with C-Level Executives to collaboratively define the long-term vision for utilizing Celonis to transform their business while mobilizing the necessary Celonis resources. In collaboration with our cross-functional Celonis teams, you will drive measurable business impact across various processes and industries and accelerate the adoption of our platform. The CVP will also champion transformational initiatives across Celonis and customer accounts, fostering innovation and strategic change to maximize value and drive business transformation.

## The work you’ll do

### Accountable Program Lead & Engagement Manager
- Develop and maintain strong relationships with key stakeholders, including C-level internal / external executives, embedding Celonis into their strategic objectives.
- Ensure engagements are properly staffed leveraging resources from global cross-functional Celonis teams, such as Servicing, Product & Engineering
- Mentor customer on organization design and maturation of Centers of Excellence to focus on increasing adoption of our platform.
- Mentor and coach team members, providing guidance and support for their success, and offer feedback to managers on team performance.

### Driving Customer Value
- Responsible for the end-to-end customer value journey
- Influence key customer stakeholders through executive communication, product knowledge, and industry/domain expertise.
- Work with senior stakeholders to establish the Celonis program roadmap and detailed value plans.
- Resolve customer escalations orchestrating internal teams efficiently and effectively in a timely manner
- Internalize the customer's strategy and targets and drive Celonis delivery alignment to that strategy, ensuring that we support the customer in solving business-critical problems
- Drive value realization and adoption within accounts, ensuring high-quality, on-time project completion, client satisfaction, and meeting usage and adoption targets.

### Community Builder and Customer Advocacy
- Organize and lead customer advisory boards to address industry-specific challenges and innovations, establishing a structured feedback loop to continuously gather insights and improve products and services.
- Act as the voice of the customer within the company, ensuring alignment of product development and service offerings with industry needs and customer feedback, while collaborating with the customer advocacy team on advocacy strategies.
- Drive customer presence and sponsorship at key Celonis and industry events, serving as a Celonis leader at conferences, webinars, and through published thought leadership.
- Collaborate on innovation or new asset development in specific domains, and contribute to playbooks, resources, and tools for the value engineering team to enhance their effectiveness.

## The Qualifications you need
- Minimum 10 years of relevant customer success, strategy consulting, or related experience within the Manufacturing/Automotive required
- Strong experience in driving large scale transformation programs, process re-engineering engagements, and implementations
- Experience with AI-based transformation is a strong plus
- Deep exposure to and experience with successful change management practices
- Ability to navigate large global organizations and have the power of persuasion through data, facts and confidence
- Knows how to successfully work with internal resources to design, pitch and sell opportunities with relevant subject matter experts and practice leads
- Possess a natural and consultative approach when engaging with senior executives
- Strong team player who inspires the team with a patient and entrepreneurial leadership style
- Project management: ability to organize and manage multiple streams
- Strong communication skills and ability to translate Celonis use cases into customer business landscape
- Are self-motivated, proactive team player
- Are able to thrive in fast-paced, collaborative, and ambiguous environments with various stakeholders

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation:** Work with the leading, award-winning process mining technology, shaping the future of business.
- **Accelerate Your Growth:** Benefit from clear career paths, internal mobility, a dedicated learning program, and mentorship opportunities.
- **Receive Exceptional Benefits:** Including generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, dedicated volunteer days, and much more.
- **Prioritize Your Well-being:** Access to resources such as gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong:** Find community and support through dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Make Meaningful Impact:** Be part of a company driven by strong values that guide everything we do: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Collaborate Globally:** Join a dynamic, international team of talented individuals.
- **Empowered Environment:** Contribute your ideas in an open culture with autonomous teams.
summary: Celonis is seeking a Client Engagement Partner (Client Value Partner) for the Manufacturing/Automotive industry. This high-level role acts as a trusted advisor to C-level executives, leading data-driven business transformations and managing the end-to-end customer value journey using Celonis' Process Intelligence technology.
title: Client Engagement Partner - Manufacturing / Automotive

description:
## Company Overview
**At Bosch**, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: We grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Welcome to Bosch.

## Role Overview
As a **Research Engineer for AI Validation**, you will develop innovative methods for the validation and release of complex AI models, including probabilistic, generative, and large-scale models.

## What You Will Do
- Develop innovative methods for the **validation and release of complex AI models** (probabilistic, generative, and large-scale models).
- Design and develop forward-looking concepts in close collaboration with validation teams in corporate research and business units.
- Analyze technological requirements, particularly regarding **validation and safety of time-series-processing models**, in coordination with business units.
- Implement and engineer **prototypical software solutions** and demonstrate them in concrete Bosch use cases.
- Integrate existing technologies into toolboxes that support the validation of modern AI functions.

## Requirements

### Education
- Completed **PhD in Computer Science, Statistics, Physics**, or a comparable technical field.

### Experience and Knowledge
- **Several years of experience** in AI-related topics within industrial product development (e.g., consumer goods, automotive, manufacturing).
- Hands-on involvement in **product release processes, safety standards, and validation methods** in software and AI environments.
- Proven expertise in **modern AI algorithms** and principles: 
    - Generative and large-scale models
    - Deep neural networks
    - Foundation models
    - Agentic AI
    - Strong background in **statistics**
- Extensive experience in developing **robust, safe, and reliable AI solutions**, including the integration of AI methods with formal methods and statistical approaches.
- Strong skills in implementing AI algorithms in **Python**, applying modern, production-grade software development practices and standards.

### Personality and Working Practice
- Ability to communicate complex technical topics clearly.
- Ability to work successfully in interdisciplinary and international teams.

### Languages
- **English**: Business fluent (written and spoken).
- **German**: A plus.

## Benefits
- Flexible working models: various part-time options, mobile working, and job sharing.
- A corporate culture anchored in diversity and inclusion.

## Additional Information
- Links: [bosch-ai.com](https://www.bosch-ai.com), [bosch.com/research](https://www.bosch.com/research)
- Application documents required: CV, letter of motivation, certificates, and links to GitHub or Kaggle accounts.
summary: Bosch is seeking a Research Engineer with a PhD to develop validation methods for complex AI models, including generative and large-scale models. The role focuses on creating robust and safe AI solutions for industrial product development, requiring a strong background in Python, statistics, and software engineering.
title: Research Engineer for AI Validation (f/m/div.)

description:
## Company Overview
**At Bosch**, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: we grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Join in and feel the difference.

The **Bosch Home Comfort Group** is looking forward to your application!

## Role Overview
Internship Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics for Heat Pump

## What You Will Do
- Analyze **large-scale historical data** to uncover patterns, correlations, and anomalies that support product reliability improvement.
- Design and evaluate meaningful **new features from raw data**; perform correlation and relevance analysis to identify key predictive indicators.
- Develop and evaluate **machine learning models** on the **Databricks** platform to enable early detection of potential product issues and proactive reliability improvement.
- Present findings and model results clearly through **visualizations and dashboards** to support engineering decision-making.

## Requirements

### Education
- Master studies in the field of **Data Science, Machine Learning, Statistics, Computer Science, Mathematics**, or comparable.
- Enrollment at university is required.

### Experience and Knowledge
- Strong knowledge of **machine learning, feature engineering, statistics, and data preprocessing**.
- Experience with **Python** and common **data science libraries**.
- Familiarity with **Databricks, PySpark, MLflow, or time-series analysis** is a plus.

### Personality and Working Practice
- Self-driven, curious, and structured in analytical work.
- Ability to independently explore data, develop hypotheses, and clearly communicate complex findings to non-technical colleagues.
- Passionate about applying machine learning to real-world product data.

### Languages
- Very good in **English**.

## Work Routine
- **Hybrid model**: On-site presence required at least 2 days per week, mobile working available for the rest.

## Additional Information
- **Start:** According to prior agreement
- **Duration:** 6 months
- **Application Requirements:** CV, transcript of records, enrollment certificate, examination regulations, and if indicated, a valid work and residence permit.

## Diversity and Inclusion
Diversity and inclusion are firmly anchored in our corporate culture. Bosch welcomes all applications, regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin or sexual identity.

## Contact
Linnan Du (Functional Department)
+49 7153 3068232
summary: Bosch is seeking a Master's student for a 6-month internship in Machine Learning and Predictive Analytics. The role involves analyzing large-scale historical data to improve heat pump reliability using Python and the Databricks platform.
title: Internship Machine Learning & Predictive Analytics for Heat Pump

description:
## Company Overview
**Bei Bosch gestalten wir Zukunft mit hochwertigen Technologien und Dienstleistungen, die Begeisterung wecken und das Leben der Menschen verbessern.** Unser Versprechen an unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter steht dabei felsenfest: Wir wachsen gemeinsam, haben Freude an unserer Arbeit und inspirieren uns gegenseitig.

**Willkommen bei Bosch.**

Die Robert Bosch Smart Home GmbH wurde im Jahr 2016 als 100-prozentige Tochtergesellschaft der Robert Bosch GmbH gegründet. In agilen Teams mit offener Arbeitskultur, flachen Hierarchien und inspirierender Arbeitsumgebung entwickeln wir intelligent vernetzte Geräte, Features und Services. Unser Fokus ist es, Nutzern begeisternde Produkte für ein komfortables und sicheres Zuhause zu bieten.

## Role Overview
As a **Product Manager*in (m/w/div.) Climate & Comfort**, you will take responsibility for products in the Climate & Comfort area of the Smart Home system, managing the complete product and feature lifecycle for both hardware and software.

## Responsibilities
- **Product Lifecycle Management:** Manage the complete product/feature lifecycle of hardware and software.
- **Market Analysis:** Systematically observe and analyze the market, competition, and customer needs to derive trends, product strategy, and future product portfolios for successful market positioning.
- **Coordination & Planning:** Coordinate and prioritize software and hardware development tasks with clear requirements and forward-looking, structured planning.
- **Cross-functional Collaboration:** Serve as a central interface in close exchange with hardware and software development, UX/UI design, marketing, sales, service, logistics, purchasing, finance, the business owner, and management.
- **Enablement:** Enable marketing, sales, and service to operate successfully in the market through product expertise and convincing product documentation.
- **KPI Monitoring:** Continuously steer and monitor the product portfolio using KPIs such as revenue, results, and customer satisfaction.

## Requirements

### Education
- Completed degree (e.g., **Economics, Industrial Engineering, UX/UI Design**) or a degree in **Building/Supply Engineering** with additional business qualifications.
- A vocational training in one of the mentioned technical areas prior to studying is considered a plus.

### Personality & Work Style
- Structured, efficient, and customer-oriented way of working.
- High self-motivation, implementation-strong mentality, acting independently, entrepreneurially, and result-oriented.
- Combination of strategic thinking and practical hands-on ability.
- Strong organizational skills to maintain an overview of multiple parallel topics.
- Reliable, assertive, and a team player with a focus on customer needs.

### Experience and Know-How
- **Several years of professional experience** in operational product management for smart solutions and/or in the **HVAC or energy sector**.
- Experience in the **B2C business**.
- Practical application of knowledge in **software (ideally also hardware) development processes**.
- Methodological proficiency in market and competitive analysis and expertise in product marketing.

### Languages
- Ability to structure and present complex issues simply and vividly (verbal and written).
- Target-group and situation-specific communication skills.
- **Very good German and English skills** (written and spoken) are required.

## Benefits
- **Flexible working models:** Including various part-time options, mobile working, and job sharing.
- **Inclusive Culture:** A culture deeply anchored in diversity and inclusion.

## Contact & Location
- **HR Contact:** Emelie Schäfer (+49 711 811 7388)
- **Department Contact:** Claus Schuberth (+49 711 811 12755)
- **Location:** Schockenriedstraße 17, 70565 Stuttgart, Germany
summary: Bosch is seeking a Product Manager for their Climate & Comfort Smart Home division in Stuttgart. The role involves managing the full lifecycle of hardware and software products, conducting market analysis, and coordinating with cross-functional teams in a B2C environment.
title: Product Manager*in (m/w/div.) Climate & Comfort

benefits: Events and seminars during Master's study
Opportunity for student employment during studies
description:
## Company Overview
At **Bosch Rexroth**, everything revolves around movement and the success of our customers. With our connectable drive and control technologies as well as digital solutions, machines and plants operate efficiently, safely and powerfully. We offer our customers components, system solutions and services for mobile and industrial applications as well as for factory automation. In all areas, we value the know-how and commitment of our employees and enable dynamic careers in an international environment.

Around 33,800 people in over 80 countries - and one corporate purpose: **"We move industries to make our planet a better place."**

## Role Overview: PreMaster Programm - GapYear
Our **PreMaster Programm** is a two-stage qualification program for committed Bachelor graduates who aim to complete a Master's degree.

- **Phase 1:** Up to **12 months of practical experience** after the Bachelor's degree to become familiar with technical and entrepreneurial contexts.
- **Phase 2:** Independent Master's studies at a university of your choice. During this time, there are further events, seminars, and personal support through a mentor on the way to graduation. Additionally, there is the opportunity to contribute to the company as a student employee during your studies.

As a participant in our PreMaster Program, you will be a member of the **Engineering Software Continuous-X** department.

## What You Will Do / Responsibilities
- Actively participate in the further development and validation of **CI/CD**.
- Work closely with experienced functional developers, simulation experts, and product managers.
- Accompany the implementation of customer-specific requirements into innovative control solutions.
- Actively shape development processes and apply modern software development methods.

## Requirements
- **Education:** Above-average completed university degree (**Bachelor**) in Informatics, Computer Science, or a comparable course of study, with the goal of pursuing a Master's degree.
- **Experience and Know-how:** Sound informatics and network know-how, knowledge of programming languages and **Kubernetes** and **Docker** environments.
- **Personality and Working Style:** Initiative, responsible working manner, and teamwork skills.
- **Languages:** Very good **German** and **English** (written and spoken).

## Additional Information
- **Start Date:** By arrangement
- **Diversity and Inclusion:** Bosch Rexroth welcomes all applications regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.

**Contact Persons:**
- Technical questions: Angela Schuettler (+49(9352)18-6250)
- Application process questions: Lena Steigerwald (+49(9352)18-2358)
summary: Bosch Rexroth is offering a two-phase PreMaster Program for Bachelor graduates in Computer Science. The role involves 12 months of practical experience in CI/CD within the Engineering Software Continuous-X department, followed by a supported Master's degree.
title: PreMaster Programm - GapYear - Software Engineer CI/CD

benefits: Opportunity to develop skills in agile methodologies and strategic thinking
description:
## Company Overview
**Founded in 1994**, ETAS GmbH is a wholly owned subsidiary of the Robert Bosch GmbH with international sales offices in Europe, North and South America, and Asia. ETAS' portfolio includes vehicle basic software, middleware, and development tools for the realization of software-defined vehicles. 

**„Empowering Tomorrow’s Automotive Software“** – all our product solutions and services are focused on this to enable vehicle manufacturers and suppliers to develop and operate software-defined vehicles with increased efficiency. Holistic cybersecurity solutions in the automotive sector are offered via the ESCRYPT brand.

## Role Overview
ETAS GmbH is looking for an intern to join an agile team in a modern, innovative working environment. You will support the continuous improvement of software development processes by analyzing and integrating AI applications to enhance efficiency and creativity.

## What You Will Do
- Analyze and integrate **AI applications** into product development processes to strategically enhance efficiency and creativity.
- Work directly with application teams to implement **AI pilot projects** and drive sustainable process improvements.
- Collaborate closely with **Product Owners, Agile Masters**, and other stakeholders to understand team needs and develop tailored solutions.
- Contribute to delivering an outstanding **developer experience (DevEx)** through high-level automation using tools like **GitHub Actions** and **Argo CD**.
- Monitor current trends and developments to promote innovative solutions in the automotive sector and for **Software-Defined Vehicles (SDV)**.
- Identify bottlenecks and obstacles in the development process.
- Develop skills in **agile methodologies** and **strategic thinking**.

## Requirements
- **Education**: Studies in Computer Science, Engineering, Information Systems, Artificial Intelligence, Business Informatics, or a comparable discipline with an IT focus.
- **Technical Skills**:
    - Basic experience and knowledge of **Linux**.
    - Programming experience with **Shell**, **Python**, or similar languages.
    - Initial experience with **AI technologies** and **intelligent agents**.
- **Soft Skills**:
    - Ability to grasp complex issues quickly and manage time effectively.
    - Motivation, outgoing nature, and excellent communication skills.
    - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
- **Languages**: Fluent in **English**; German is a plus.

## Additional Information
- **Start**: According to prior agreement
- **Duration**: 6 months
- **Mandatory**: Enrollment at university.
- **Required Documents**: CV, transcript of records, enrollment certificate, examination regulations, and (if indicated) a valid work and residence permit.
- **Diversity**: ETAS welcomes all applications regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.

## Contact
Renato Domínguez García (Functional Department)
+49 174 9794858
summary: Bosch (ETAS GmbH) is seeking an intern for 6 months to help integrate AI applications into their embedded middleware software development processes. The role focuses on improving developer experience through automation and AI pilot projects within an agile automotive environment.
title: Internship in Development of AI-Based Solutions for Embedded Middleware Software

benefits: Access to state-of-the-art technology and resources
Participation in national and international conferences
description:
## Company Information
**Bosch Sensortec GmbH** is a leading international provider of sensor solutions based on microelectromechanical systems (MEMS) for consumer electronics. They develop and market key technologies for smartphones, tablets, hearables, wearables, smartglasses, augmented and virtual reality applications, game consoles, and more. MEMS sensors are an essential part of the foundation of a connected world. Bosch Sensortec GmbH is a wholly-owned subsidiary of Robert Bosch GmbH.

## Role Overview
Bosch is offering an interesting **PhD position (Promotionsstelle)** in the field of **System Architecture for invasive micro-pressure sensors** within the medical sector. In this position, you will have the opportunity to contribute to innovative projects and develop new applications for intelligent MEMS sensors.

## Responsibilities
Your tasks include, among others:
- **System Architecture**: Research and definition of hardware and software architectures as well as interfaces for an invasive blood pressure sensor.
- **Concept and Simulation**: Development from the idea to the proof of concept using model-based simulation and verification.
- **Requirements Analysis**: Derivation of technical and medical requirements and coordination of research activities between departments.
- **Experimental Validation**: Planning and execution of experiments to analyze sensor behavior and optimize system functions.
- **Knowledge Management**: Documentation of research results, writing scientific publications, and presenting research results at conferences.

## Requirements
- **Personality**: Enjoy working in international and interdisciplinary teams; enthusiastic and creative approach.
- **Working Style**: Independent and goal-oriented work manner.
- **Experience and Know-How**: Initial experience with sensors (MEMS) and/or medical technology; sound knowledge of signal processing and modeling tools (e.g., **Matlab/Simulink**).
- **Languages**: Very good English skills.
- **Education**: Degree as M.Sc./Dipl. in Electrical Engineering, Medical Engineering, Physics, Microsystems Engineering, or a related field with very good academic performance.

## What We Offer
- An inspiring and challenging environment to successfully complete your PhD.
- Close collaboration with an interdisciplinary team.
- Access to state-of-the-art technology and resources.
- Collaboration with the Bosch site in Reutlingen (including planned travel to Reutlingen for onboarding and thereafter).
- Opportunity to participate in national and international conferences to present research results.

## Diversity and Inclusion
Diversity and inclusion are firmly anchored in the company culture. Applications are welcome regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.

## Additional Information
- The final award of the PhD topic is subject to the criteria of the supervising university as the central contact for the doctorate.
- **Contact for Application Process**: Samuel Zinn (HR Department) +49 7121 35-33717
- **Contact for Task Description**: Bert Kaiser (Specialist Department) +49 351 8547-3799
summary: Bosch Sensortec is offering a PhD position focused on the system architecture of invasive micro-pressure sensors for medical applications. The role involves developing hardware/software architectures, conducting model-based simulations, and validating sensors experimentally in an interdisciplinary environment.
title: Promotionsstelle: Systemarchitektur für invasive Mikro-Drucksensoren

benefits: Onboarding support from a peer trainee
description:
## Company Overview
At **Bosch Rexroth**, everything revolves around movement and the success of our customers. With our networkable drive and control technologies as well as digital solutions, machines and systems operate efficiently, safely, and powerfully. We offer components, system solutions, and services for mobile and industrial applications as well as factory automation. We value the know-how and commitment of our employees and enable dynamic careers in an international environment.

Approximately 33,800 people in over 80 countries - and one corporate purpose: **"We move industries to make our planet a better place."**

## Role Overview
Our trainee program **"Graduate Specialist Program (Trainee) – Technischer Vertrieb Connected Hydraulics"** is your career start in an internationally successful company. Over **18 to 24 months**, you will go through various stations at home and abroad, which are individually tailored to you. After completing the program, you will take on a demanding role as a **technical sales expert**.

## What You Will Do
- **4-6 Stations, including one abroad:** Gain comprehensive knowledge of operational sales business and work on strategic issues in various sales and specialist departments (e.g., **Product Management, technical internal/external sales, application, and service**). You will get to know the technically leading product and service portfolio for electro-hydraulic applications in the industrial sector.
- **Demanding Content with Customer Focus:** As part of the "Connected Hydraulics" campaign, you will gain insights into current hydraulics trends, ranging from the **electrification and digitalization** of components and systems to new **software** and **Predictive Maintenance** services. You will be part of the marketing of innovative customer solutions and convince customers of future-oriented products.

## Requirements
- **Education:** Completion of a Diploma/Master's degree (PhD also welcome) with above-average success in **Mechanical Engineering, Industrial Engineering, Electrical Engineering**, or a comparable course of study.
- **Experience and Know-how:** Proven enthusiasm for customer contact and technical solutions through demanding **industrial internships**. Initial experience in the hydraulics environment is ideal.
- **Personality and Working Style:** Sales skills, strong customer orientation, commitment, creative joy, initiative, team player, and strong communication skills.
- **Languages:** Fluent in **German and English** (written and spoken).

## Benefits
- **Exclusive Mentoring:** Accompaniment by an experienced executive from upper management for professional and personal development. Additionally, a current trainee supports you during onboarding.
- **Flexible Start Date and Permanent Contract:** The start date is adapted to your personal needs. You are part of the team from the start and take on responsibility from day one.
- **Network:** Establish valuable cross-departmental contacts with executives worldwide and become part of the trainee network. Access to various seminar offerings with your own focus.

## Application Process
- A CV and relevant certificates are sufficient; a cover letter is not required.
- Bosch Rexroth promotes diversity and inclusion regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.
summary: Bosch Rexroth is offering an 18-24 month Graduate Specialist Program for trainees in Technical Sales for Connected Hydraulics. The program involves rotations across various departments and an international assignment, leading to a role as a technical sales expert focusing on digitalization and electro-hydraulics.
title: Graduate Specialist Program (Trainee) - Technischer Vertrieb Connected Hydraulics

benefits: Onboarding support from a current trainee
description:
## Company Overview
At **Bosch Rexroth**, everything revolves around movement and the success of our customers. With our networkable drive and control technologies as well as digital solutions, machines and systems operate efficiently, safely, and powerfully. We offer our customers components, system solutions, and services for mobile and industrial applications as well as for factory automation. We value the know-how and commitment of our employees and enable dynamic careers in an international environment.

Around 33,800 people in over 80 countries - and one corporate purpose: **"We move industries to make our planet a better place."**

## Role Overview
Our trainee program **"Graduate Specialist Program (Trainee) – Technical Sales with a focus on Factory Automation"** is your career start in an internationally successful company. Over 18 to 24 months, you will go through various stations at home and abroad, which are individually tailored to you. After completing the program, you will take on a demanding role as a technical sales expert.

## What You Will Do
- **4-6 Stations, including one abroad:** Gain comprehensive knowledge in operational sales business and work on strategic issues in various sales and specialist departments (e.g., Product Management, technical inside/outside sales, sales strategy). Develop a deep understanding of forward-looking hardware and software solutions in factory automation.
- **Demanding Content:** Work closely with Engineering, Product Management, and other interfaces. Accompany projects from the initial customer inquiry through technical coordination to quote creation and after-sales support. Identify customer needs and develop suitable automation solutions with your team to convince customers of innovative products under the motto: "Your factory, Your way – YOU DECIDE".

## Requirements
- **Education:** A degree (Diploma/Master's, or PhD) completed with above-average success in **Mechanical Engineering**, **Industrial Engineering**, **Mechatronics**, or a comparable course of study.
- **Experience and Know-how:** Proven passion for customer contact through demanding industrial internships. Ideally, initial experience in areas such as drive and control technology, linear technology, or assembly technology.
- **Personality and Working Style:** Sales talent and a strong customer orientation. Commitment, desire to shape things, initiative, team player mentality, and strong communication skills. An affinity for production automation.
- **Languages:** Fluent in **German** and **English** (written and spoken).

## Benefits
- **Exclusive Mentoring:** Guidance from an experienced senior manager for professional and personal development, plus support from a current trainee during onboarding.
- **Flexible Start and Security:** Flexible start date adapted to personal needs and an unlimited employment contract.
- **Networking:** Valuable cross-departmental contacts to managers worldwide and access to the trainee network.

## Application Process
Only a CV and relevant certificates are required; a cover letter is not necessary. Bosch Rexroth values diversity and inclusion regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.

description:
## Company Overview
At **Bosch Rexroth**, everything revolves around movement and the success of our customers. With our connectable drive and control technologies as well as digital solutions, machines and plants operate efficiently, safely, and powerfully. We offer components, system solutions, and services for mobile and industrial applications as well as factory automation. We value the know-how and commitment of our employees and enable dynamic careers in an international environment.

Around 33,800 people in over 80 countries - and one corporate purpose: "We move industries to make our planet a better place."

## Role Overview
Our trainee program **"Graduate Specialist Program (Trainee) – Fertigung Gießerei"** (Manufacturing Foundry) is your career start in an internationally successful company. Over 18 to 24 months, you will go through different stations domestically and abroad, tailored individually to you. After completing the program, you will take on a demanding role in the foundry.

## What to Expect
- **4-6 Stations, including one abroad**: Gain insights into various departments of the production environment (e.g., Technical Functions, Manufacturing Operations and Engineering, Quality Management) and adjacent areas. Gather deep experience regarding manufacturing processes in the foundry and get insights into partner plants at various locations.
- **Demanding Content**: In each station, you will tackle exciting specialist and project tasks in various sub-projects. These range from the design and creation of a casting part, model development, mold filling and solidification simulations to production monitoring using Machine Learning, automatic image recognition, and more.

## Benefits of the Trainee Program
- **Exclusive Mentoring**: An experienced executive from upper management will accompany you as a mentor in your professional and personal development. Additionally, a current trainee will support you during onboarding.
- **Flexible Start Date and Permanent Employment Contract**: We adapt the start date to your personal needs. You are part of the team from the start and take on responsibility from day one.
- **Networking**: Build valuable cross-departmental contacts with executives worldwide and become part of the trainee network. Access a variety of seminar offerings with your own focus.

## Requirements
- **Education**: You are completing your Diploma/Master's degree (PhD also welcome) with above-average success in **Mechanical Engineering** (ideally with a specialization in Foundry Technology) or a comparable course of study.
- **Experience and Know-how**: Through demanding industrial internships in production, you have already gained initial practical experience in **construction**, **machining (Zerspanung)**, and basic knowledge of the **foundry**.
- **Personality and Working Style**: Target-oriented communication, a structured approach, and the ability to develop holistic solution approaches. You work target- and result-oriented, are flexible, and are enthusiastic about digitalization within production.
- **Languages**: You speak **fluent German and English** (written and spoken).

## Application Process
- A CV and relevant certificates are sufficient; a cover letter is not required.
- Bosch Rexroth values diversity and inclusion regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.
summary: Bosch Rexroth is offering a 18-24 month Graduate Specialist Program for trainees in Foundry Manufacturing. The program includes 4-6 rotations (including one international) focusing on casting, simulation, and digitalization, leading to a permanent role in the foundry.
title: Graduate Specialist Program (Trainee) - Fertigung Gießerei

description:
## Company Overview
**Bei Bosch gestalten wir Zukunft** mit hochwertigen Technologien und Dienstleistungen, die Begeisterung wecken und das Leben der Menschen verbessern. Unser Versprechen an unsere Mitarbeiterinnen und Mitarbeiter steht dabei felsenfest: Wir wachsen gemeinsam, haben Freude an unserer Arbeit und inspirieren uns gegenseitig. Willkommen bei Bosch.

## Role Overview
**Chief Expert - RADAR and ADAS Sensors - Research (SL2, w/m/div.)**

## What You Will Do / Responsibilities
- **Strategic Roadmap:** Shape the strategic research roadmap for **RADAR, Video, and USS technologies** and align them continuously with business units to ensure long-term business and technology leadership for Bosch XC-AC.
- **Trend Scouting:** Identify new technologies and innovative applications, monitor competitors and market trends (patents, trade fairs, publications, conferences), and derive recommendations for action.
- **Technical Coordination:** Responsible for the technical coordination of all RADAR, Video, and USS research activities within corporate research, including **Artificial Intelligence (AI)**, in close coordination with involved business units (XC + ME).
- **Holistic Approach:** Maintain a holistic view of products, necessary tools, and technology enablers (e.g., **Simulation, Data Management, Architectures**) to achieve optimal distribution of activities and derive systemic sensor sets and requirements.
- **External Engagement:** Actively participate in external research activities and events (e.g., **Keynote Speeches**) and initiate, participate in, or lead industry consortia (e.g., frequency allocation, interface standardization).
- **Technology Strategy:** Actively develop the technology strategy for RADAR, Video, and USS, coordinating closely with research departments and business units.
- **Technical Depth:** Develop pioneering strategies for all RADAR levels—from **high-frequency hardware** and **baseband signal processing** to **functional software**, with a strong focus on **Artificial Intelligence**.
- **Data Strategy:** Define and drive the data strategy for all **Machine Learning** topics within RADAR technology.
- **Architecture:** Responsible for the partitioning of hardware and software for **central and decentralized RADAR architectures**.
- **Sensor Set Definition:** Continuously contribute to the definition of the Bosch sensor set across all modalities (**Video, LIDAR, USS, RADAR**) for automation levels **L0 to L5** and promote cross-domain exchange to identify synergies.
- **Internal Communication:** Participate in company-wide communication instruments (newsletters, colloquiums, conference management meetings) and lead or participate in portfolio meetings or specific Radar, Video, and USS activities.
- **Expert Organization:** Work within the Bosch expert organization to continuously develop your peer group and act as a contact person for junior experts.

## Requirements

### Education
- Completed **Master's or PhD (Doctorate)** in Electrical Engineering, Computer Science, or Natural Sciences.

### Experience and Know-how
- Deep knowledge in **RADAR, High-Frequency Technology, Hardware Development, Signal Processing, AI**, and **data-driven development methods**.
- Experience with functions based on RADAR (**AEB, ACC, HAD**).
- Knowledge of **Video and USS sensor technology**.
- Know-how in functional contexts with other sensors (**LIDAR, VIDEO, USS**).
- Experience with partitioning in the vehicle network (**Network, Data Rates**).
- Transfer of skills to and from other technical domains (**Signal Theory, Embedded Systems, Mathematics, Data Engineering**).
- Contribution to non-technical domains such as **Marketing and Competence Development**.

### Personality and Working Style
- Ability to define a clear strategic direction for long-term business success and communicate it clearly up to the **Board level**.
- Ability to represent Bosch interests confidently in international committees and projects.
- Skillful integration of cost perspectives (product & development) and technical requirements.
- Determination to successfully drive disruptive technologies forward.
- Ability to motivate others and promote constructive teamwork.

### Enthusiasm
- Passion for maintaining internal and external Bosch networks and contributing to the development of the Bosch expert organization.

### Languages
- Very good **English**.

## Benefits
- Flexible working models (various part-time options, mobile working, job sharing).
- Inclusive corporate culture regarding gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.
summary: Bosch is seeking a Chief Expert to lead the strategic research roadmap for RADAR, Video, and USS sensor technologies. The role focuses on integrating AI and Machine Learning into sensor architectures to maintain technological leadership in automotive automation levels L0-L5.
title: Chief Expert - RADAR and ADAS Sensors - Research (SL2, w/m/div.)

**Bosch Rexroth** focuses on movement and customer success. description:
## Company Information
**Die Bosch Industriekessel GmbH**, a company of Bosch Thermotechnik GmbH, is one of the world's leading manufacturers of industrial large boiler systems based in Gunzenhausen, Northern Bavaria. As a competence center for Bosch Thermotechnik, they develop and manufacture large boilers and other system components, distributed in over 140 countries.

## Role Overview
Are you looking to gain decisive practical experience during your studies and actively help shape the sustainable energy technology of tomorrow? This is an opportunity to apply theoretical knowledge directly to the development of forward-looking solutions.

## What You Will Do
- Actively support the engineering team in the **development and optimization of control and regulation technology** for hot water and steam boiler plants.
- Research and evaluate components in the area of **medium voltage and safety technology**.
- Identify suitable suppliers and contribute to the technical design.
- Precisely define **mechanical and electrical interfaces** to Bosch systems to ensure smooth integration.

## Requirements
- **Education:** Studies in the field of Electrical Engineering, Energy Technology, or a comparable subject.
- **Experience and Know-how:** Initial experience with **PLC controls (SPS-Steuerungen)** and **ECAD software** is desirable.
- **Personality and Working Style:** High motivation, clear communication, and a passion for teamwork. Ability to approach tasks independently and structured while taking responsibility.
- **Languages:** Business fluent **German** and very good **English**.

## Working Conditions
- **Start Date:** By arrangement
- **Duration:** 12 months
- **Hours:** 15 hours/week
- **Work Model:** Opportunity for partial mobile work

## Application Requirements
Prerequisite for the working student position is enrollment at a university. Please include:
- CV
- Current transcript of records
- Current certificate of enrollment
- Valid work and residence permit (if applicable)

## Diversity and Inclusion
Diversity and inclusion are firmly anchored in the corporate culture. Applications are welcome regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin, or sexual identity.
summary: Bosch Industriekessel GmbH is seeking a working student in electrical development to assist in the optimization of control and regulation technology for industrial boilers. The role involves researching medium voltage components, designing electrical interfaces, and collaborating with the engineering team in Gunzenhausen.
title: Werkstudent in der elektrischen Entwicklung (w/m/div.)

description:
## Company Overview
Bei **Bosch Rexroth** dreht sich alles um Bewegung und den Erfolg unserer Kunden. Mit unseren vernetzbaren Antriebs- und Steuerungstechnologien sowie digitalen Lösungen arbeiten Maschinen und Anlagen effizient, sicher und leistungsstark. Wir bieten unseren Kunden Komponenten, Systemlösungen und Services für mobile und industrielle Anwendungen ebenso wie für die Fabrikautomation. In allen Bereichen schätzen wir das Know-how und das Engagement unserer Mitarbeitenden und ermöglichen dynamische Karrieren in einem internationalen Umfeld.

Rund 33.800 Menschen in über 80 Ländern - und ein Unternehmenszweck: „We move industries to make our planet a better place.”

## Role Overview
Als **Softwareentwickler für Developer Productivity & KI (w/m/div.)** bist du maßgeblich für die Implementierung verbesserter und effizienterer Arbeitsabläufe in der Embedded-Software- und Systementwicklung zuständig, zum Beispiel durch innovative KI- und Automatisierungs-Ansätze.

## What You Will Do
- Du führst optimierte oder neue Methoden ein, analysierst bestehende Prozesse, identifizierst Optimierungspotenziale, um die Qualität unserer Entwicklung zu steigern.
- Du beseitigst Engpässe und steigerst die Produktivität, unter anderem mit **Automatisierungs- und fortschrittlichen KI-Technologien**.
- Du arbeitest Hand in Hand mit unseren Entwicklerteams zusammen und bietest umfassenden Support sowie Schulungen für diese neuen Tools und Prozesse an.
- Dein Ziel ist es, die Geschwindigkeit und die Qualität unserer Entwicklung nachhaltig zu verbessern und so einen echten Mehrwert zu schaffen.
- Deine Expertise trägt maßgeblich dazu bei, unsere Engineering-Exzellenz auf das nächste Level zu heben.

## Requirements

### Education
- Abgeschlossenes Studium im Bereich **Informatik, Computer Science, Mechatronik** oder eine vergleichbare Qualifikation.

### Experience and Know-How
- Umfassende Kenntnisse im Bereich der **Softwareentwicklung** (vorzugsweise **Embedded-Software**, Programmiersprache **C**) oder softwareintensiver Systeme.
- Erfahrung in der Implementierung und Integration von **KI-Technologien** zur Optimierung des Entwicklungsprozesses.
- Fundiertes Know-how in der Konzeption und Umsetzung von **Tool- und Prozessautomatisierungen** (z.B. **CI/CD**, **Continuous Testing**) zur Steigerung der Effizienz in der Entwicklung softwareintensiver Systeme.

### Personality and Working Style
- Verantwortungsbewusstsein, strukturiertes Denken und Handeln.
- Kommunikationsstark, analytische, strukturierte und selbständige Arbeitsweise.

### Languages
- Gutes **Deutsch** und **Englisch**.

## Benefits
- Flexible Arbeitsmodelle: unterschiedliche **Teilzeitmöglichkeiten**, **mobiles Arbeiten** bis hin zum **Jobsharing**.
- Eine Unternehmenskultur, die Vielfalt und Inklusion fest verankert hat.

## Contact Information
- **Bewerbungsprozess**: Sarah Beckmann (Personalabteilung) +49(9352)18-5191
- **Fachliche Fragen**: Jochen Mayer (Fachbereich) +49(7308)82-3769

## Role Overview
Do you want to transform your ideas into useful and meaningful technologies? Whether in the field of Mobility Solutions, Consumer Goods, Industrial Technology, or Energy and Building Technology - with us, you improve the quality of life for people all over the world. Welcome to Bosch.

Robert Bosch GmbH is looking for candidates for the **Junior Managers Program - Research & Development Software and Application - Trainee Program (m/f/div.)**.

## Program Details
In 18-24 months, you will go through various rotations in Germany and abroad, taking on responsible tasks in the areas of application, software services, software and function development (requirements engineering, function development, validation and verification, virtualization, big data, and artificial intelligence), embedded in the topic of control units for all powertrains. You will work on global projects with technically fascinating and challenging products of the Bosch Group.

**What awaits you:**
- Flexible start date and an unlimited employment contract
- Individual program design with diverse further training opportunities
- Trainee program consisting of 4-6 rotations throughout Germany in various areas
- An international assignment is an integral part of the program
- Intensive involvement in day-to-day business and projects
- Targeted preparation for global leadership tasks with a personal career mentor

## Requirements

### Personality
- Above-average **Master's or Diploma degree**, preferably with a **PhD** or initial work experience.
- Strong leadership ambition and an entrepreneurial mindset.
- Flexibility, initiative, and intercultural competence.

### Background
Educational background in fields such as:
- **Technical Computer Science** (with a focus on Embedded Systems)
- **Engineering** (with a focus on Computer Science, AI, or Control Engineering)
- **Physics**
- Other **Natural Sciences**

### Experience and Expertise
- Knowledge in **Embedded Software Development** (C++, C, Python, and/or Matlab).
- Experience in **algorithm development**.
- Familiarity with **Big Data** and/or **Cloud-based systems**.
- International experience through at least a **3-month stay abroad**.
- Relevant industry internships.
- Excellent **English** language skills and proficiency in **German**.

## Benefits
- **Flexible and mobile working:** Flexible working (time) models.
- **Health and sports:** A wide range of health and sports activities.
- **Childcare:** Placement service for childcare offers.
- **Employee discounts:** Various Bosch employee discounts.
- **Freedom for creativity:** Freedom for creative work.
- **Company social counseling and care:** On-site company social counseling, online counseling options, and mediation service for care services.

## Application Process
**Award Fair Training Program 2026**

The process includes multiple steps:
1. Recorded Video Interview
2. Assessment Center
3. Final Interview

**Contact:**
Claudia Mertens-Baaij (Human Resources)
Telephone: 0711 811 7200

description:
## Role Overview
Do you want to transform your ideas into useful and meaningful technologies? Whether in the field of **Mobility Solutions, Consumer Goods, Industrial Technology, or Energy and Building Technology** - with us, you improve the quality of life for people all over the world. Welcome to Bosch.

Robert Bosch GmbH is looking forward to your application!

In an increasingly complex and dynamic business world, corporate research at Bosch is pivotal. As the driving force behind early-stage development of new technologies and business opportunities, Corporate Research ensures Bosch's long-term competitiveness and innovative prowess. Our strategic orientation and culture are designed not just to tackle future challenges, but to transform them into opportunities.

Over a period of **up to 18 months**, you will embark on a journey through various rotations in Germany and abroad, taking on significant responsibilities in areas such as:
- **Advanced Digital and AI Solutions**
- **Advanced XCross AI Physical Systems**
- **Advanced Engineering of Components and Production**
- **Advanced Technologies**

You will engage in global projects involving Bosch Group's technically fascinating and sophisticated products.

Together, we will lay the foundation for your future as a leader. At Bosch, leadership means continuously advancing yourself and others, influencing existing processes, and achieving challenging, entrepreneurial, and meaningful goals.

## What We Offer
- **Flexible Start Date:** Choose the start date that works best for you and decide when your permanent employment contract begins.
- **Customized Program:** Design your program with 4-5 rotations in agile product areas, corporate start-ups, or classic line organizations.
- **Global Exposure:** Experience Bosch during a rotation abroad.
- **Learning and Development:** Enhance your practical experience with a variety of learning and training methods, supported by an individual budget.

## Personality
- Strong leadership skills and an entrepreneurial mindset.
- Flexibility, initiative, and intercultural competence.

## Background
Completed a **doctorate** in one of the following fields:
- Information / Cyber Security
- Information Security Engineering
- System Design, Cloud Architecture
- Data Management
- Software / Quantum Computing
- AI and Data Science
- Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Neural Networks
- Distributed Systems (architecture, communication, software development)
- Power Electronics, Semiconductor

- Proficiency in one or more of the following: **Java, C++, C, Python, Matlab, ML-Ops, algorithm development, Big Data, and cloud-based systems.**

## Application Process
If you have questions, contact Claudia Mertens-Baaij (Human Resources) at 0711 811 7200.

The process includes:
1. Recorded Video Interview
2. Assessment Center
3. Final Interview

## Company Overview
Do you want to transform your ideas into useful and meaningful technologies? Whether in the field of Mobility Solutions, Consumer Goods, Industrial Technology or Energy and Building Technology – with us, you improve the quality of life for people all over the world. Welcome to Bosch.

Robert Bosch Semiconductor Manufacturing Dresden GmbH looks forward to your application!

## Role Overview
As a **Maintenance Engineer Wet Chemistry** in a fully continuous 24/7 shift system, you will work with the team to ensure production availability and the professional and qualitative implementation of maintenance measures for the equipment in your area.

## What You Will Do / Responsibilities
- Perform **planned and unplanned maintenance** in compliance with safety-relevant specifications and work instructions.
- Independent and forward-looking **troubleshooting and rectification** of simple error patterns in electrical, electronic, and mechanical systems, collaborating with the internal team and coordinated external service partners.
- Independently carry out **qualifications** based on given qualification instructions and operate necessary **metrology equipment**.
- Ensure high machine availability (**Uptime**) and system stability using methods such as **SPC**.
- Create handling instructions for maintenance measures and associated checklists in coordination with others.
- Provide detailed documentation of work in maintenance applications.
- Actively participate in the **continuous improvement process (CIP)**.
- Assist with equipment commissioning.

## Requirements

### Education
- **Technical vocational training**, preferably with an electrotechnical focus (e.g., Electrical Engineering, Mechatronics, Electronics, etc.) or a technician's degree in a relevant field.

### Experience and Know-How
- Initial subject-specific professional experience in **practical maintenance** (Preventive Maintenance and troubleshooting), ideally within the semiconductor industry (semiconductor manufacturing or suppliers).
- Knowledge of the production and maintenance of technical systems (preferably semiconductor industry equipment).
- Methodological knowledge such as **SPC** (Statistical Process Control) is desired.

### Personality and Working Style
- **Personality:** Team player, flexible, motivated, resilient, and strong communicator.
- **Working Style:** Forward-looking, independent, self-responsible, result- and quality-oriented, and highly reliable. Ability to follow extensive safety regulations and assess/minimize potential hazards in daily work.

### Languages
- Very good **German** skills.
- Good **English** skills.

## Contact Information
- **Application Process Questions:** Julia Wittig (HR Department), +49(351)8547-2117
- **Technical Job Questions:** Lars Lieske (Technical Department), +49(351)8547-2304

description:
## Company Overview
**At Bosch**, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: We grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Welcome to Bosch.

## Role Overview
As an **AI Research Engineer at Bosch**, you will explore a variety of real-world use cases that can significantly benefit from cutting-edge Large Language Models (LLMs), end-to-end trained ADAS systems, and AI agents.

## What You Will Do
- Develop efficient **engineering and MLOps solutions** to tailor models to specific Bosch applications (e.g., fine-tuning generic language models using proprietary data for industrial applications).
- Collaborate with corporate research departments and business units to identify and develop novel applications of AI across Bosch's product and service portfolio.
- Use an **entrepreneurial mindset** to evaluate, develop, and pitch new ideas to drive innovation.
- Generate and secure **intellectual property** through high-quality publications in leading AI journals and conferences.
- Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code supporting both research and technology transfer.
- Assess emerging machine learning technologies to provide strategic insights and influence Bosch's technological development.
- Work within a dynamic AI department alongside ML experts and global specialists to maximize business impact.
- Conduct experiments on **on-premises GPU clusters** and **cloud infrastructure**.

## Requirements

### Education
- Excellent **MSc in Computer Science** or related fields.
- **PhD in Machine Learning** with a focus on Large Language Models, generative AI, or foundation models.

### Experience and Knowledge
- Proven research track record and multiple years of hands-on expertise in **LLMs, GenAI, agentic AI, end-2-end automotive models, or vision-language models**.
- Record of publications in top machine learning conferences (e.g., **NeurIPS, ICML, ICLR, CVPR**).
- Deep familiarity with state-of-the-art agentic AI and LLM research with the ability to translate this into industrial applications.
- Extensive experience in training, applying, evaluating, and adapting foundation, LLM, or vision-language (VLM) models within an industrial context (working with large real-world datasets).
- Excellent programming skills in **Python** with strong experience in Deep Learning frameworks like **PyTorch**, collaborative software development, and relevant deployment tools.
- Demonstrated proficiency in **scalable machine learning architectures** and **distributed training** (including multi-GPU/multi-node training).

### Personality and Working Practice
- Strong team player and highly self-motivated.
- Conceptual strength and creativity to drive novel ideas and integrate research solutions into products.

### Languages
- Very good **English skills** (written and spoken).
- **German** is a plus.

## Benefits
- Flexible working models (various part-time options, mobile working, and job sharing).
- Inclusive corporate culture regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin or sexual identity.

## Additional Information
- Links: [https://www.bosch-ai.com](https://www.bosch-ai.com), [www.bosch.com/research](www.bosch.com/research)
- Application requirements: CV, certificates, and links to GitHub or Kaggle account.
summary: Bosch is seeking a PhD-level AI Research Engineer to develop MLOps solutions and foundation models for industrial and automotive applications. The role involves fine-tuning LLMs, conducting distributed training on GPU clusters, and publishing research in top-tier AI conferences.
title: Research Engineer Foundation Model ML Ops (f/m/div.)

description:

## Role Overview

description:
## Role Overview
At **Bosch**, we shape the future by inventing high-quality technologies and services that spark enthusiasm and enrich people’s lives. Our promise to our associates is rock-solid: we grow together, we enjoy our work, and we inspire each other. Join in and feel the difference.

Robert Bosch GmbH is looking for a student to work on a Master Thesis focusing on **Data-Efficient Hybrid Machine Learning for Robust Vibration System Prediction**. In collaboration with a team of engineers and scientists, you will investigate how to develop more robust and reliable predictive models for technical systems, enhancing a machine-learning toolbox to forecast vibration-loaded systems, specifically when measurement data is scarce.

## What You Will Do
- Research and apply **advanced machine learning techniques** to integrate limited measurement data into the training of models that currently rely predominantly on simulation data.
- Develop a benchmark by integrating simulated data and new measurement data from a test bench, utilizing **machine learning algorithms** to predict the dynamic behavior of **nonlinear coupled vibration systems**.
- Apply and evaluate chosen approaches, comparing model performance (**accuracy and robustness**) against simulation-only trained models.
- Openly communicate ideas and contributions, benefiting from exchange with colleagues, experts, and a broader network across various domains and locations within the company.

## Requirements

### Education
- **Master studies** in the field of **Engineering, Mathematics, Physics** or comparable with good grades.
- Must be currently enrolled at a university.

### Experience and Knowledge
- Good understanding of **dynamics (mechanical vibrations) / mechanics**.
- Very good knowledge of **Python** (including **Pytorch, Pandas, Numpy**, etc.).
- Good to very good knowledge of **fundamental machine learning concepts and algorithms**, particularly relevant for **regression**.

### Personality and Working Practice
- High degree of **self-motivation** to drive innovation.
- Ability to work **independently** while communicating progress and ideas effectively.

### Work Routine
- **On-site presence** is required.

### Languages
- Fluent in **English** and basic in **German** OR fluent in **German** and very good in **English**.

## Additional Information
- **Start:** According to prior agreement
- **Duration:** 6 months
- **Application Documents:** CV, transcript of records, examination regulations, and if indicated, a valid work and residence permit.

## Company Culture
Diversity and inclusion are firmly anchored in our corporate culture. We welcome all applications, regardless of gender, age, disability, religion, ethnic origin or sexual identity.
summary: Bosch is seeking a Master's student for a 6-month thesis project focused on developing data-efficient hybrid machine learning models to predict the behavior of nonlinear coupled vibration systems. The role involves integrating limited real-world measurement data with simulation data using Python and PyTorch.
title: Master Thesis Data-Efficient Hybrid Machine Learning for Robust Vibration System Prediction

description:
## Role Overview

**Möchten Sie Ihre Ideen in nutzbringende und sinnvolle Technologien verwandeln?** Ob im Bereich Mobility Solutions, Consumer Goods, Industrial Technology oder Energy and Building Technology – mit uns verbessern Sie die Lebensqualität der Menschen auf der ganzen Welt. Willkommen bei Bosch.

Der Geschäftsbereich **Mobility Aftermarket** ist für das weltweite Aftermarket-Geschäft verantwortlich. In über 140 Ländern stellen wir unseren Kunden Kfz-Ersatzteile, technische Informationen sowie Diagnostics Hard-/Software und Services zur Diagnose, Wartung und Reparatur von Kraftfahrzeugen zur Verfügung. Die **Koller und Schwemmer GmbH** ist ein Unternehmen der Bosch Gruppe und gehört zum Unternehmensbereich Mobility Solutions und dem Geschäftsbereich Mobility Aftermarket an.

Als **Instandhalter** tragen Sie maßgeblich dazu bei, dass unsere Produktion zuverlässig läuft und Maschinen sowie Anlagen jederzeit betriebsbereit sind. Mit Ihrem technischen Know-how sorgen Sie für reibungslose Abläufe, minimieren Ausfallzeiten und unterstützen aktiv die kontinuierliche Verbesserung unserer Instandhaltungsprozesse.

## Responsibilities

- **Sicherstellen der Funktionsfähigkeit** von Maschinen, Anlagen und Betriebseinrichtungen durch regelmäßige Wartung, Instandhaltung und Reparaturen.
- **Analyse von Störungen**, Ursachenforschung und Umsetzung von Abstellmaßnahmen in enger Abstimmung mit der Produktion.
- **Unterstützung der Produktionsbereiche**, um eine bestmögliche Anlagenverfügbarkeit zu gewährleisten.
- **Ermittlung und Beschaffung** von kleineren/einfachen Ersatzteilen und notwendiger Software, ggf. auf Basis von konkreten Vorschlägen (z.B. Skizzen, Zeichnungen, Materialauswahl); bei Bedarf Fertigung von Ersatzteilen.
- **Dokumentation und Überwachung** von Wartungs- und Reparaturaufträgen; bei Bedarf und auf Anweisung Entwurf von unternehmensspezifischen Wartungsplänen.
- **Durchführung von Programmoptimierungen** bzw. -anpassungen an Steuerungen und Anlagen.
- **Mitwirkung bei Maßnahmen** zur kontinuierlichen Optimierung der Anlagenverfügbarkeit.
- **Einbringen eigener Ideen** zur Optimierung von Wartung, Instandhaltung und Reparaturprozessen.
- **Durchführung von Maßnahmen** zur Instandsetzung/Instandhaltung und Umsetzung/Aufstellung von MAE im Bereich **Facility Management** (Bsp. elektrische Hausanlagen, Versorgungsanlagen, Infrastruktur, Betriebsmittel).
- **Durchführung und ggf. Betreuung** wiederkehrender Prüf- und Instandhaltungsmaßnahmen, z. B. **DGUV-Prüfungen** oder **6S-Checklisten**.
- ggf. **Betreuung und Koordination von Fremdfirmen** im Rahmen externer Dienstleistungen oder spezieller Reparaturmaßnahmen.

## Requirements & Qualifications

- **Education:** Completed technical training as a **Facharbeiter, Mechatroniker, Elektriker, Elektroniker** or a comparable qualification. 
- **Alternative:** Several years of practical experience in the maintenance and repair of production and assembly plants.
- **Technical Skills:** Profound knowledge in **Mechatronics**, specifically with a focus on **Electrical engineering**.
- **Software:** Proficient in standard **MS-Office applications**.
- **Personal Attributes:** Structured, systematic, and independent way of working; team player and resilient.
- **Language:** Very good **German language skills** (written and spoken).

## Company Information

Die **Koller und Schwemmer GmbH** (Röthensteig 21, 90408 Nürnberg) ist ein mittelständisches Unternehmen und eine Tochtergesellschaft der Bosch-Gruppe. Mit dieser Identifikation gilt das Unternehmen als flexibler Problemlöser rund um die Diesel-Einspritztechnologie.

**Application Note:** Applications can only be considered if submitted via the online portal.
summary: Bosch (Koller und Schwemmer GmbH) is seeking a Maintenance Technician (Instandhalter) in Nuremberg to ensure the operational reliability of production machinery and facility management systems. The role involves maintenance, troubleshooting, and optimization of mechatronic systems, requiring a technical qualification or significant practical experience.
title: Instandhalter (w/m/div.)

description:
## Role Overview

**Möchten Sie Ihre Ideen in nutzbringende und sinnvolle Technologien verwandeln?** Ob im Bereich Mobility Solutions, Consumer Goods, Industrial Technology oder Energy and Building Technology – mit uns verbessern Sie die Lebensqualität der Menschen auf der ganzen Welt. Willkommen bei Bosch.

Der Geschäftsbereich **Mobility Aftermarket** ist für das weltweite Aftermarket-Geschäft verantwortlich. In über 140 Ländern stellen wir unseren Kunden Kfz-Ersatzteile, technische Informationen sowie Diagnostics Hard-/Software und Services zur Diagnose, Wartung und Reparatur von Kraftfahrzeugen zur Verfügung. Die **Koller und Schwemmer GmbH** ist ein Unternehmen der Bosch Gruppe und gehört zum Unternehmensbereich Mobility Solutions und dem Geschäftsbereich Mobility Aftermarket an.

Die Koller + Schwemmer GmbH freut sich auf Ihre Bewerbung!

## Responsibilities

Our production is the heart of our company. To ensure smooth processes, optimal capacity utilization, and the efficient introduction of new products into production, thoughtful planning and technical foresight are required:

- **Production Facility Planning:** Planning, implementation, and continuous improvement of new and existing production facilities. Developing modern, flow-oriented production and logistics concepts for economical and practical solutions.
- **Series Production:** Conceptualization and implementation of mass production lines adapted to company-specific processes for small and medium batch sizes. Ensuring a stable and efficient production start from planning through realization to handover.
- **Workflow Design:** Detailed planning and design of work steps considering ergonomic, economic, and labor-scientific criteria (e.g., **Ergo-Check**) to create efficient workflows and detailed work plans.
- **Documentation & Analysis:**
    - Creating and structuring order-specific documents such as **Bills of Materials (BOM)**, production and test instructions, and control plans.
    - Determination of execution and calculation times (e.g., using **MTM**).
    - Analysis of relevant KPIs and conducting **Failure Mode and Effects Analysis (FMEA)** to identify risks and secure processes.
- **Technical Requirements:** Evaluation of replacements, including technical analysis, risk assessment, and data collection.
- **Project Management:** Independently leading sub-projects (e.g., conversions, product relocations, ergonomics and process optimization) and participating in cross-departmental projects to increase quality, efficiency, and output.
- **Change Management & Data:** Managing the change process, including the creation and system-side implementation of **Engineering Change Requests**. Tasks in **Product Data Management (PDM)**, including article creation and master data maintenance in the ERP system, as well as creating and updating bills of materials in **Navision** and **SAP**.

## Requirements

- **Education:** Completed university degree in **Engineering**, ideally majoring in **Mechanical Engineering, Production Technology**, or a comparable field. Alternatively, a completed technical vocational training with further education as a **state-certified technician**.
- **Professional Experience:** Sound professional experience in **production planning**. Familiarity with the application and moderation of **FMEA processes** to identify and evaluate risks.
- **Industry Knowledge:** Experience in the **Automotive environment** is an advantage, as is knowledge of **Project Management**.
- **Methodology:** Ideally familiar with **Lean Manufacturing** principles and common quality methods.
- **Mindset:** Enjoy working within an international production network. Willingness for occasional travel.
- **Soft Skills:** Independent, structured, and goal-oriented way of working. Analytical thinking, organizational strength, and high quality awareness.
- **Languages:** Very good **German** and **English** skills (written and spoken) for secure communication in national and international environments.

## Company Information

Die Koller und Schwemmer GmbH (Röthensteig 21, 90408 Nürnberg) ist ein mittelständisches Unternehmen und eine Tochtergesellschaft der Bosch-Gruppe. Mit dieser Identifikation gilt das Unternehmen als flexibler Problemlöser rund um die Diesel-Einspritztechnologie.

**Note:** Applications can only be considered if submitted via the online portal.
summary: Bosch (Koller und Schwemmer GmbH) is seeking a Production Planner to design and optimize manufacturing facilities and logistics concepts. The role involves managing the entire process from conceptualization and FMEA risk analysis to the implementation of mass production lines and master data management in SAP/Navision.
title: Fertigungsplaner (w/m/div.)

description:

**Zaria Afzal** (Human Resources Department)

description:
## Company Overview
**Bosch Rexroth** focuses on movement and customer success. With networkable drive and control technologies as well as digital solutions, they ensure machines and plants operate efficiently, safely, and powerfully. They provide components, system solutions, and services for mobile and industrial applications as well as factory automation. They value the know-how and commitment of their employees and enable dynamic careers in an international environment.

**Global Presence:** Around 33,800 people in over 80 countries.
**Purpose:** "We move industries to make our planet a better place."

## Role Overview

**Duration:** 3 - 6 months

## What You Will Do

- Concept and develop innovative improvement processes, implement them, and sustainably track their effectiveness.

### Personality and Working Style

The role involves analyzing production processes, developing automation software modules using tools like Power Automate and AI, and implementing process improvements in an Engineering-To-Order environment.
