title: Senior Site Reliability Engineer (d/f/m)
description:
## Why Scout24?
Scout24 is home of ImmoScout24, Germany’s #1 for real estate. With ImmoScout24 we have been revolutionizing the real estate market in Germany and Austria for more than 25 years. Our goal is to build a digital ecosystem that brings homeowners, seekers, and agents together. Finding the right home and property is one of the most important decisions in life. So is your career! **#WorkingatScout24** means being part of a diverse and inclusive team of around 1100 colleagues and 58 nationalities. We embrace difference and celebrate individuality. By encouraging open mindedness and authenticity we enable a true learning culture and prepare the ground for personal development. Mistakes are a chance to grow and to innovate. Together we act proactively, strive for improvement, and take responsibility. We talk about success and challenge while treating each other with respect because we are **#oneteam**.

If this sounds interesting to you, we would love to see you joining us! Even if you may not tick all the boxes of the job requirements, we are happy to hear about the value you can add to the team. Grow with us!. **Welcome home!**

## Benefits
Aside from our people and company culture we are offering awesome benefits that make Scout24 a great place to work!

- **Compensation:** A competitive salary package and a bonus on top.
- **Flexibility:** Hybrid work model with three days of on-site work per week in the office, and you can organize the remaining days as you wish. 30 days of vacation per year.
- **Work from abroad:** Possibility to work from abroad for 10 days per year, subject to the business requirements of the company and team.
- **Relocation:** Relocation agency supports you with your visa process and an attractive relocation package.
- **Use our products:** Plus membership for tenants on ImmoScout24 to find a new place to live.
- **Development:** Dedicated learning time per month, online courses on our ScoutAcademy, regular book challenges, structured feedback, “Lunch & Learn”-Events and individual career paths.
- **Family Support:** Professional family service to help find a childcare center or emergency childcare.
- **Furry feel good manager:** Dog-friendly office (upon approval).
- **Mobility:** Subsidized public transport or Job Bikes.
- **Sustainability and Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI):** Clear environmental and climate protection goals, social activities, charitable organizations, and theme weeks on diversity and mental well-being.
- **Pension scheme:** Company pension scheme with an attractive subsidy.
- **Innovative office:** Barrier-free office in the heart of Berlin (central station). Includes gym with regular courses, napping room, rooftop terrace, organic coffee, cafeteria, 100% green electricity, and a weekly massage therapist.
- **Health:** Life Situation Coaching, regular health check ups.
- **Tech environment:** Latest technical tools and hardware.

## Role Overview
At Scout24, we believe reliability must be taken into consideration early and often by product managers and engineers alike. We're looking for a passionate **Senior Engineer, Site Reliability** to spearhead our reliability program across the organization and drive a culture where reliability is embedded in our engineering DNA. 

As a member of **Application Platform**, you'll grow and become a technical leader with company-wide influence, responsible for shaping Scout24's engineering culture and driving initiatives at the organizational level while bringing the reliability perspective to strategic decisions. You'll collaborate closely with our Platform teams to build the tools that enable reliability excellence and support the company to achieve its reliability goals across all core use-cases of our real-estate ecosystem.

## How your role will look like

### Reliability & Observability Strategy
- Research, engineer and experiment with new ways to improve our observability platform and tooling
- Design and implement a comprehensive reliability strategy that aligns with business outcomes
- Lead the definition of reliability targets (**SLOs**) that enable teams to make data-driven decisions
- Guide the technical roadmap for reliability and observability across Scout24
- Advocate for reliability and resiliency as essential components of our product development cycle
- Report key reliability KPIs and metrics to leadership, providing actionable insights on system health and reliability trends

### Incident Management Leadership
- Own and continuously improve our incident handling processes and automation
- Foster a blameless culture of learning from incidents across the company
- Lead the definition and implementation of our disaster recovery framework in the cloud

### Platform & Tooling Collaboration
- Partner with Platform teams to build observability and reliability tooling
- Foster relationships with product teams to identify pain points and provide impactful solutions
- Help design and implement monitoring solutions that give teams visibility into their systems
- Experience working with vendors to develop business and technical relationship
- Lead larger projects with uncertainty and risk, guiding other engineers assigned to your projects

### Cultural Transformation & Strategic Leadership
- Help teams understand the reliability of their services and how they can improve it
- Provide technical leadership on reliability to engineers, managers, and product managers
- Raise awareness about how unreliable products can lead to financial or reputational loss
- Support our "you build it you run it" model by mentoring teams on operating resilient systems
- Drive engineering initiatives at the organizational level, representing the reliability perspective in strategic decisions
- Foster cross-departmental collaboration between engineering, product, customer care, and other teams to create a holistic approach to reliability
- Partner with your PM and engineering manager, keeping them informed with technical details across multiple projects
- Set new standards of excellence and drive the platform forward with ideas that maintain quality, reliability, security, and performance

## What you need to succeed
- Significant experience in software engineering with **scalable distributed systems** (around 8 years preferred, but we value skills over strict timelines)
- Strong **SRE background** with deep understanding of **SLIs, SLOs, error budgets, and observability**
- **Platform engineering/DevOps** expertise and passion for monitoring distributed systems
- Experience with incident management, post-incident analysis, and organizational change
- Experience leveraging **AI tools** to drive problem-solving and productivity, maintaining effective human oversight and judgement
- Data-driven mindset that uses metrics to evaluate engineering decisions
- Technical leadership experience including mentoring, pair programming, and solution design
- Ability to balance strategic vision with tactical implementation
- Excellent communication skills to translate technical concepts across various stakeholders
- Growth mindset with strong cross-functional collaboration abilities
- Excellent written and spoken **English**

We aim to further enhance the diversity of our company and support the professional development of people with disabilities. We have a disability representative who will assist you throughout the application process.
summary: Scout24 is seeking a Senior Site Reliability Engineer to lead the reliability and observability strategy across the organization. The role involves driving cultural transformation, managing incident processes, and collaborating with platform teams to build scalable, resilient distributed systems in a cloud environment.
salary: A competitive salary package and a bonus on top

title: Senior Software Engineer - Identity Access Management (d/f/m)
description:
## Why Scout24?
Scout24 is home of ImmoScout24, Germany’s #1 for real estate. With ImmoScout24 we have been revolutionizing the real estate market in Germany and Austria for more than 25 years. Our goal is to build a digital ecosystem that brings homeowners, seekers, and agents together. Finding the right home and property is one of the most important decisions in life. So is your career! **#WorkingatScout24** means being part of a diverse and inclusive team of around 1100 colleagues and 58 nationalities. We embrace difference and celebrate individuality. By encouraging open mindedness and authenticity we enable a true learning culture and prepare the ground for personal development. Mistakes are a chance to grow and to innovate. Together we act proactively, strive for improvement, and take responsibility. We talk about success and challenge while treating each other with respect because we are **#oneteam**.

If this sounds interesting to you, we would love to see you joining us! Even if you may not tick all the boxes of the job requirements, we are happy to hear about the value you can add to the team. Grow with us!. **Welcome home!**

## Benefits
Aside from our people and company culture we are offering awesome benefits that make Scout24 a great place to work!
- **Compensation:** A competitive salary package and a bonus on top.
- **Flexibility:** We offer a hybrid work model with three days of on-site work per week in the office, and you can organize the remaining days as you wish. We offer you 30 days of vacation per year.
- **Work from abroad:** We offer you the possibility to work from abroad for 10 days per year, subject to the business requirements of the company and team.
- **Relocation:** Our relocation agency supports you with your visa process and an attractive relocation package.
- **Use our products:** As an employee you can take advantage of our plus membership for tenants on ImmoScout24 to find a new place to live.
- **Development:** Dedicated learning time per month, online courses on our ScoutAcademy, regular book challenges, structured feedback, “Lunch & Learn”-Events and individual career paths to push your career to the next level.
- **Have kids?** We'll support you with a professional family service, which helps you to find a childcare center or offers emergency childcare.
- **Furry feel good manager:** Bring your dog to work (upon approval, as we prioritise the well-being of our employees and ensure that our dog policy is considerate of allergic individuals and prevents overcrowding on each office floor).
- **Mobility:** We subsidize public transport or Job Bikes.
- **Commitment to sustainability and Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI):** We have clear environmental and climate protection goals and are involved in social activities and charitable organizations throughout the year. We live the diversity. Our theme weeks on diversity, mental well-being, and other social issues give us time and space to develop ourselves on DEI and sustainability.
- **Pension scheme:** We offer a company pension scheme and support your own contribution with an attractive subsidy.
- **Most innovative office:** Our office is barrier-free and in the heart of Berlin right at the central station. It was awarded for the most innovative office concept. We have an own gym with regular courses, napping room, rooftop terrace, organic coffee, cafeteria, 100% green electricity and a massage therapist that comes in once a week.
- **Health:** Life Situation Coaching, regular health check ups
- **We are a tech company:** We work with the latest technical tools and hardware.

## Role Overview
As a Senior Fullstack Engineer, you will play a key role in designing, developing, and deploying secure, user-focused identity and access management (IAM) solutions across the Scout24 digital real estate ecosystem. You will work in diverse, cross-functional teams to build scalable, performant, and secure applications, integrating Single Sign-On (SSO), Identity Federation, and Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) capabilities. Leveraging modern technologies like AWS, Java/Kotlin, React, and Okta, you will ensure seamless and secure user experiences while protecting sensitive data.

## How your role will look like:
- Design and implement authentication and authorization systems that align with business goals and compliance needs.
- Develop secure backend logic using **Java** or **Kotlin** with **Spring** and serverless **TypeScript**, and user-friendly interfaces in **React**.
- Integrate and administer **Okta**, implementing **OAuth 2.0**, **OpenID Connect (OIDC)**, and custom sign-on policies and rules.
- Develop and automate identity workflows using **Okta Workflows** and monitor and troubleshoot SSO systems to ensure reliability.
- Manage API security & token management, safeguarding communication between distributed services.
- Own the full development lifecycle following the “You build it you run it” principle.
- Promote engineering excellence by mentoring others, advocating for clean code, continuous delivery, pair programming, and test-driven development.
- Continuously evaluate and improve security, scalability, and usability of IAM systems by staying abreast of current trends and best practices.

## What you need to succeed:
- Bachelor’s degree in computer science or a related field.
- Significant professional experience as a Senior Software Engineer, working on secure, distributed, cloud-based systems.
- Expertise in backend development (**Java/Kotlin, Spring**) - frontend experience (**React, TypeScript**) is a plus.
- Strong hands-on experience with **Okta** administration and integration, including automation, custom policies, and monitoring.
- In-depth knowledge of **OAuth 2.0, OpenID Connect (OIDC), SSO, MFA, Identity Federation, and API security/token management**.
- Familiarity with **AWS** services and **Infrastructure as Code (IaC)** principles.
- Proven ability to collaborate with product managers, UX designers, and stakeholders to deliver secure and user-friendly solutions.
- Excellent communication and leadership skills, with experience mentoring engineers and promoting secure engineering practices.
- Passion for technology, curiosity, and commitment to delivering high-quality, secure, and maintainable software.
- Experience leveraging **AI tools** to drive problem-solving and productivity, maintaining effective human oversight and judgement.

We aim to further enhance the diversity of our company and support the professional development of people with disabilities. We have a disability representative who will assist you throughout the application process.
summary: Scout24 is seeking a Senior Software Engineer specializing in Identity Access Management (IAM) to build secure authentication and authorization solutions. The role involves using a tech stack featuring Java, Kotlin, React, and Okta within an AWS cloud environment to manage SSO and API security.

title: Software Engineer - Ruby on Rails (d/f/m)
description:
## Why Scout24?

### About Propstack, a subsidiary of the Scout24 Group
We are **Propstack**, a fast-growing tech startup based in Berlin. Our web-based CRM software supports our customers in real estate marketing. Our clients include real estate agencies, developers, and project marketers. With our product, we’ve been successfully transforming the real estate market for several years. Since last year, we have become part of **ImmoScout24**, together with FLOWFACT. With the help of our parent company, we aim to expand our potential customer base and grow further across Europe.

When you join us, you can expect a **small but highly efficient team** where everyone pulls together in the same direction.

If this sounds interesting to you, we would love to see you joining us! Even if you may not tick all the boxes of the job requirements, we are happy to hear about the value you can add to the team. Grow with us!. **Welcome home!**

## Benefits
Aside from our people and company culture we are offering awesome benefits that make Scout24 a great place to work!

- **Compensation:** A competitive salary package and a bonus on top.
- **Flexibility:** Decide for yourself where you work most effectively. We offer you a hybrid working model, autonomous working time management and 30 days of vacation annually.
- **Work from abroad:** Our remote working policy includes the possibility to work from abroad for a few weeks per year (if it gets along with the business and team needs).
- **Use our products:** As an employee you can take advantage of our plus membership for tenants on ImmoScout24 to find a new place to live.
- **Development:** Dedicated learning time per month, online courses on our ScoutAcademy, regular book challenges, structured feedback, “Lunch & Learn”-Events and individual career paths to push your career to the next level.
- **Have kids?** We'll support you with a professional family service, which helps you to find a childcare center or offers emergency childcare.
- **Furry feel good manager:** Bring your dog to work (upon approval, as we prioritise the well-being of our employees and ensure that our dog policy is considerate of allergic individuals and prevents overcrowding on each office floor).
- **Mobility:** We subsidize public transport or Job Bikes.
- **Commitment to sustainability and Diversity, Equity & Inclusion (DEI):** We have clear environmental and climate protection goals and are involved in social activities and charitable organizations throughout the year. We live the diversity. Our theme weeks on diversity, mental well-being, and other social issues give us time and space to develop ourselves on DEI and sustainability.
- **Pension scheme:** We offer a company pension scheme and support your own contribution with an attractive subsidy.
- **Most innovative office:** Our office is barrier-free and in the heart of Berlin right at the central station. It was awarded for the most innovative office concept. We have an own gym with regular courses, napping room, rooftop terrace, organic coffee, cafeteria, 100% green electricity and a massage therapist that comes in once a week.
- **Health:** Life Situation Coaching, regular health check ups
- **We are a tech company:** We work with the latest technical tools and hardware.

## Role Overview
Join us in shaping the future of real estate technology. As a **Fullstack Engineer**, you’ll play a key role in building a next-generation, cloud-based CRM platform that redefines how real estate professionals work, connect, and grow.

You won’t just be writing code – you’ll be architecting solutions, making critical technology choices, and delivering innovative software that directly impacts thousands of users. From the first line of code to production delivery, you’ll be deeply involved in every stage of development, driving both technical excellence and product innovation.

## What do we expect from you?
- **Engineer with impact** – design and build a high-performance, scalable CRM platform tailored for the real estate market.
- **Shape the stack** – influence architectural decisions, choose technologies, and experiment with cutting-edge tools.
- **Own the lifecycle** – take full responsibility from conception and prototyping through to cloud delivery and customer adoption.
- **Iterate fast, learn faster** – work in agile sprints, embrace pair programming, and constantly improve through feedback and iteration.
- **Push boundaries** – leverage **Ruby on Rails, PostgreSQL, Elasticsearch, and Vue** to create software that’s as elegant as it is powerful.

## What do you already bring with you?
- **Proven expertise** – 4+ years as a Fullstack Engineer (or similar), with mastery in **Ruby & Ruby on Rails**.
- **Frontend craft** – strong skills in **Vue, React, or Svelte** and the enthusiasm to build elegant interfaces in Vue.
- **Curiosity & innovation** – you stay ahead of trends, love experimenting with new technologies, and thrive on solving complex challenges.
- **Team player mindset** – you bring energy, ownership, and a desire to lift the whole team.
- **Agile enthusiast** – you believe in collaboration, iterative development, and pair programming as a way to build better software.
- **Strong communicator** – fluent in English and comfortable sharing ideas with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

We aim to further enhance the diversity of our company and support the professional development of people with disabilities. We have a disability representative who will assist you throughout the application process. If you require this support, please let us know in advance.

title: Growth Engineer (f/m/x)
description:
## The Role
We are looking for a hands-on **Growth Engineer** to design, implement, and manage scalable API integrations that connect HelloFresh with external partner ecosystems including telecoms, financial providers, loyalty programs, and health/wellness platforms.

This role combines technical execution (building and deploying APIs, data workflows, and automation) with project ownership (defining requirements, managing partners, ensuring delivery).

You will own integrations from design to production, delivering end-to-end partner connectivity that enables subscription bundling, loyalty rewards, account linking, and nutrition data exchange, all while maintaining reliability, compliance, and a seamless customer experience.

## What You'll Do
- **Integration Implementation:** Build and maintain RESTful APIs and webhooks to connect HelloFresh with partner platforms for loyalty rewards and account linking.
- **Execution & Support:** Develop automation scripts and data workflows to handle recurring syncs and reporting for partner programs.
- **Technical Documentation:** Maintain high-quality API documentation and partner developer guides to ensure smooth onboarding.
- **Reliability:** Troubleshoot issues, manage error handling, and ensure the performance of existing integrations.
- **Collaboration:** Work cross-functionally with Product, Data, and Finance teams to implement business logic for revenue-sharing or benefit application.

## What You’ll Bring
### Technical Skills
- Solid experience with **RESTful API development** (Python/Node.js—familiarity with **FastAPI** is a plus).
- Good understanding of **OAuth2**, webhooks, and how to manage secure data exchange.
- Experience using API testing tools like **Postman** and documenting work via **Swagger**.
- Familiarity with **AWS** (containers) and working knowledge of **SQL/NoSQL databases**.

### Preferred Experience
- Interest or previous exposure to B2B SaaS, fintech, or subscription-based platforms.
- Familiarity with tools like **Snowflake**, **Contentful**, or **N8N** is a bonus.

### Soft Skills
- **Ownership Mindset:** A proactive approach to completing tasks and ensuring code quality.
- **Organizational Skills:** The ability to manage multiple integration tasks and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.

## What we offer
Elevate your lifestyle! Join one of Europe's fastest-growing tech powerhouses in a dynamic phase of expansion.
- Immerse yourself in a diverse global community of 90+ nationalities.

title: Manufacturing Engineer (all genders)
description:
## Your Role
As a Manufacturing Engineer (all genders) at HelloFresh and Factor, you will ensure the production lines run efficiently. You will focus on maximizing machine uptime, selecting modern technology, and leading innovation projects. You will collaborate closely with suppliers, install new systems, and conduct training to maintain the highest production standards. Additionally, you will coordinate with other departments such as Logistics, Production, Quality, Health & Safety, and Maintenance & Facilities.

*This position is based at HelloFresh SE in Berlin and supports the development and expansion of the production facility of our subsidiary, Factor, in Verden (Aller), near Bremen. Therefore, the workplace will be in Verden. Please note that this position is initially limited to 24 months, with the possibility of a permanent contract.*

## Your Responsibilities
- Lead and implement **improvement projects** to increase efficiency, volume, reduce costs, improve safety, and optimize product quality (from concept to implementation).
- Analyze and optimize production processes by applying in-depth knowledge of **food manufacturing equipment** and production workflows.
- Create and update **SOPs (Standard Operating Procedures)**, prepare and submit regulatory documentation, and communicate project results to all relevant stakeholders (in English).
- Present project outcomes and propose technical solutions based on comprehensive **benchmarking, root cause analysis, data analysis, and proven engineering principles**.
- Work closely with interdisciplinary teams (Production, Logistics, Quality, Health & Safety, Maintenance & Facilities) to successfully achieve project goals.

## Your Profile

**You are…**
- A person who drives change and makes a real impact.
- Highly communicative, with strong **intercultural competence** and a professional, solution-oriented approach that enables you to communicate effectively at all levels of the organization.
- Technically skilled in selecting and optimizing production equipment, applying standards, and analyzing **performance metrics and statistical data**.
- Able to develop and implement technical solutions for improving equipment and production processes to continuously enhance efficiency and quality.
- Experienced in developing and documenting **Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)** to ensure consistency and quality in production.
- Skilled at working with **operational data** to support investment decisions and clearly track the **ROI of process improvements**.
- Excellent in **project management**, with the ability to lead multiple projects simultaneously while efficiently managing deadlines and resources.

**You have…**
- A Bachelor’s degree in **Industrial Engineering, Mechanical Engineering**, or a similar technical field.
- Several years of professional experience in **food manufacturing**.
- Several years of experience in selecting, analyzing, and optimizing production equipment to make the right decisions for cost and efficiency improvements.
- Several years of experience in engineering and project management within a production environment, focusing on **continuous improvement** and process optimization.
- A **Lean Six Sigma certification** and experience with **Kaizen** are advantageous.
- Practical experience in a production technical environment, including handling and maintaining production equipment and working closely with operators.
- **Fluent in both German and English (C1 level)**, with the ability to communicate effectively locally and internationally and create technical documentation.

## What We Offer You
- A great working environment in an amazing team
- Discounts on our HelloFresh meal kits
- Diverse opportunities for personal and professional growth
- Comprehensive onboarding process
- Competitive salary
- Fun team events
- Discounted fitness offers
- Well-being initiatives
- Company pension plan
- Monthly subsidy for the Deutschlandticket
- Work in a global, international environment

## Hungry for more?
Apply now with your complete application documents, including a CV (without a photo if preferred) and without specifying personal details such as nationality or gender. Language certificates and documents related to residence and work permits are welcome.

title: Manufacturing Engineer (all genders)
description:
## Deine Rolle

Als **Manufacturing Engineer (all genders)** bei HelloFresh und Factor sorgst Du dafür, dass die Produktionslinien effizient laufen. Du kümmerst dich um die Maximierung der Maschinenlaufzeiten, wählst moderne Technik aus und leitest Innovationsprojekte. Dabei arbeitest Du eng mit Lieferanten zusammen, installierst neue Anlagen und führst Schulungen durch, um höchste Produktionsstandards zu gewährleisten. Zudem koordinierst Du dich mit anderen Abteilungen wie Logistics, Production, Quality, Health & Safety und Maintenance & Facilities.

*Die Position ist bei HelloFresh SE mit Sitz in Berlin angesiedelt und dient der Unterstützung sowie dem Ausbau der Produktionsstätte unseres Tochterunternehmens Factor in Verden (Aller) bei Bremen. Der Arbeitsort ist daher Verden. Bitte beachte, dass die Stelle zunächst auf 24 Monate befristet ist, mit der Möglichkeit einer Entfristung.*

## Dein Verantwortungsbereich

- Leitung und Umsetzung von **Verbesserungsprojekten** zur Steigerung der Effizienz, Volumenerhöhung, Kostenreduktion, Sicherheitsverbesserung und Optimierung der Produktqualität (vom Konzept bis zur Umsetzung).
- Analyse und Optimierung von Produktionsprozessen durch Anwendung fundierter Kenntnisse zu **Lebensmittelproduktionsanlagen** und produktionstechnischen Abläufen.
- Erstellung und Aktualisierung von **SOPs (Standardarbeitsanweisungen)**, sowie Erstellung und Einreichung regulatorischer Dokumentationen und Kommunikation von Projektergebnissen an alle relevanten Stakeholder (in englischer Sprache).
- Präsentation von Projektergebnissen und Vorschläge für technische Lösungen, basierend auf umfassendem **Benchmarking, Ursachenanalysen, Datenanalysen** und bewährten Engineering-Prinzipien.
- Enge Zusammenarbeit mit interdisziplinären Teams (Production, Logistics, Quality, Health & Safety, Maintenance & Facilities), um Projektziele erfolgreich umzusetzen.

## Dein Profil

**Du bist…**
- Eine Person, die Veränderung vorantreibt und einen echten Impact hinterlässt.
- Äußerst kommunikativ, mit ausgeprägter interkultureller Kompetenz und einer professionellen, lösungsorientierten Arbeitsweise, die es dir ermöglicht, auf allen Ebenen der Organisation effektiv zu kommunizieren.
- Technisch versiert in der Auswahl und Optimierung von Produktionsanlagen, der Anwendung von Standards sowie der Analyse von Leistungskennzahlen und statistischen Daten.
- In der Lage, technische Lösungen für die Verbesserung von Geräten und Produktionsprozessen zu entwickeln und umzusetzen, um Effizienz und Qualität kontinuierlich zu steigern.
- Erfahren in der Entwicklung und Dokumentation von Standardarbeitsanweisungen (SOPs), um Konsistenz und Qualität in der Produktion zu gewährleisten.
- Geübt im Umgang mit operativen Daten, um Investitionsentscheidungen zu fundieren und den ROI von Prozessverbesserungen klar nachzuvollziehen.
- Ausgezeichnet im **Projektmanagement**, mit der Fähigkeit, mehrere Projekte gleichzeitig zu leiten und dabei Fristen sowie Ressourcen stets effizient zu steuern.

**Du hast…**
- Einen **Bachelor-Abschluss in Wirtschaftsingenieurwesen, Maschinenbau** oder einem ähnlichen technischen Bereich.
- **Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Lebensmittelproduktion**.
- Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung in der Auswahl, Analyse und Optimierung von Produktionsanlagen, um die richtigen Entscheidungen für Kosten- und Effizienzsteigerung zu treffen.
- Mehrjährige Berufserfahrung im Ingenieurwesen und Projektmanagement innerhalb einer Produktionsumgebung, mit dem Fokus auf kontinuierliche Verbesserung und Prozessoptimierung.
- Eine **Lean Six Sigma-Zertifizierung** sowie Erfahrung mit **Kaizen** sind von Vorteil.
- Praktische Erfahrung im produktionstechnischen Umfeld, einschließlich der Handhabung und Instandhaltung von Produktionsanlagen sowie der direkten Zusammenarbeit mit Bedienern.
- **Fließende Deutsch- und Englischkenntnisse (jeweils C1-Niveau)**, um sowohl lokal als auch international effektiv zu kommunizieren und technische Dokumentationen zu erstellen.

## Das bieten wir dir

- Ein angenehmes Arbeitsumfeld in einem tollen Team
- Rabatte auf unsere Kochboxen von HelloFresh
- Vielfältige Weiterentwicklungsmöglichkeiten
- Ein umfassendes Onboarding
- Ein attraktives Gehalt
- Spaß bei Teamevents
- Vergünstigte Fitnessangebote
- Initiativen für dein Wohlbefinden
- Betriebliche Altersvorsorge
- Monatlicher Zuschuss zum Deutschlandticket
- Arbeiten in einem globalen, internationalen Umfeld

## Du bist auch hungrig nach mehr?

Bewirb dich jetzt mit deinen vollständigen Bewerbungsunterlagen, gerne auch ohne Lichtbild und ohne Angabe von spezifischen Merkmalen wie Nationalität oder Geschlecht. Sprachzertifikate und Unterlagen zur Aufenthalts- und Arbeitserlaubnis können gerne mit eingereicht werden.

title: Senior Growth Engineer (f/m/x)
description:
## The role
We are looking for a hands-on **Senior Growth Engineer** to design, implement, and manage scalable API integrations that connect HelloFresh with external partner ecosystems including telecoms, financial providers, loyalty programs, and health/wellness platforms.

This role combines technical execution (building and deploying APIs, data workflows, and automation) with project ownership (defining requirements, managing partners, ensuring delivery).

You will own integrations from design to production, delivering end-to-end partner connectivity that enables subscription bundling, loyalty rewards, account linking, and nutrition data exchange, all while maintaining reliability, compliance, and a seamless customer experience.

## What you'll do
- **Architectural Leadership:** Design integration architectures aligned with HelloFresh’s core systems (account, billing, and loyalty domains). Establish standardized patterns and templates for scalable partner onboarding.
- **End-to-End Delivery:** Lead the full lifecycle of new partner integrations—from initial scoping and technical solution design to implementation and go-live.
- **Technical Execution:** Develop and deploy robust RESTful APIs (**Python/FastAPI** or **Node.js**) and webhooks to enable bundled subscriptions and account linking.
- **Partner Ownership:** Act as the primary technical point of contact for external partner engineering teams. Translate complex partner requirements into concrete technical specifications.
- **Strategy & Optimization:** Implement logic for revenue share and loyalty attribution, ensuring integrations are reliable, secure, and compliant with global standards (**GDPR/PII**).

## What you'll bring
- **Technical Skills:**
    - Expertise in **RESTful API development** (Python with **FastAPI** preferred, or Node.js).
    - Deep understanding of **OAuth2 / OpenID Connect**, webhooks, and secure token exchange.
    - Strong experience in API design, documentation (**Swagger**), and testing.
    - Proficiency with **AWS** cloud environments (Container Registry, Cloud Storage) and **SQL/NoSQL** databases.
- **Preferred Experience:** (One or more of the following)
    - Background in B2B SaaS integrations, subscription commerce, or loyalty/fintech APIs.
    - Experience managing integrations across multiple regions or complex billing systems.
- **Soft Skills:**
    - **Strong Ownership:** Ability to independently drive technical projects from concept to production.
    - **Communication:** Able to translate high-level technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders and partners.

## What we offer
Elevate your lifestyle! Join one of Europe's fastest-growing tech powerhouses in a dynamic phase of expansion.
- Immerse yourself in a diverse global community of 90+ nationalities.
- Enjoy a competitive compensation package that goes beyond the norm, with perks like a **HelloFresh-subsidized Pension Scheme**, **Berlin relocation support**, and a **Hybrid working model**.
- Elevate your lifestyle with exclusive discounts on your weekly HelloFresh box and office meals.
- Invest in your growth with a **German language learning budget**, and access to the **HelloFresh Academy**.
- Plus, we've got your well-being covered with **mental health support**, **transportation perks**, and **working-parent-friendly benefits**. From our **24/7 gym access**, wellbeing platforms like **Headspace and Spill**, to **sabbatical leave options**, HelloFresh is not just a workplace; it's a lifestyle of perks and possibilities!

## Are you up for the challenge?
Please submit your complete application below including your salary expectations and earliest starting date.

After submitting an application our team will review this and get back to you within 5 business days.

## We are HelloFresh
At HelloFresh we embrace and welcome diversity and we currently employ over 15,000 individuals globally who contribute to this. We employ individuals based on their ability to perform a job rather than on the basis of their: race, national origin, color, caste, social origin or position, gender, gender expression, sexual orientation, religion, age, disability, political opinion, marital status or any other characteristic. We encourage everyone to apply and will give everyone equal consideration. We are an equal opportunity employer – everyone is welcome at our table.

title: Senior Manufacturing Engineer (all genders)
description:
## Your Role
As a Senior Manufacturing Engineer (all genders) at HelloFresh and Factor, you will play a key role in ensuring our production lines run smoothly and efficiently. You will be an individual contributor responsible for maximizing equipment uptime, selecting state-of-the-art machinery, and leading equipment innovation projects. Your expertise will be essential in guiding the installation of new equipment, collaborating with vendors, and training our team members to maintain optimal production standards. Additionally, you will coordinate with other departments.

*This position is based at HelloFresh SE in Berlin and supports the development and expansion of the production facility of our subsidiary, Factor, in Verden (Aller), near Bremen. Occasional travel may be required (approximately 20%). Please note that this position is initially limited to 24 months, with the possibility of a permanent contract.*

## Your Responsibilities
- Lead high-impact, full-scope engineering projects focused on **efficiency, increased volume, cost reduction, improved safety, and product quality improvements**, from ideation to implementation and post-launch sustainability.
- Apply technical expertise in **food manufacturing equipment, internal production processes, automation, and equipment** to proactively identify areas for improvement and standardization.
- Author and update **SOPs**, submit regulatory documentation, and publish project communications.
- Analyze and present project findings, proposing actionable engineering solutions based on **process and equipment benchmarking, root cause analysis, data analysis, and engineering principles**, influencing both technical and business decisions.
- Collaborate cross-functionally with teams and stakeholders, including engineering peers, Operations, Quality, Maintenance, Culinary R&D, Product Validation, Sanitation, and Safety.
- Meaningfully contribute to equipment selection processes by assessing equipment specifications and design requirements, including the impact on new facility construction, retrofits, and current systems.
- Maintain and deepen subject matter expertise in your assigned area(s).
- Regularly spend time on the production floor to investigate equipment issues, validate processes, and identify solutions.

## Your Profile

### You are…
- A person who drives change and makes a real impact.
- A technically strong engineer with excellent interpersonal skills, a professional attitude, and the ability to interact effectively with individuals at all levels of the organization.
- Comfortable with **equipment selection, design, standards, performance improvement, and statistics**.
- Able to analyze and provide solutions for equipment and process improvements.
- Experienced in developing preferred methods and **Standard Operating Procedures (SOPs)**.
- Skilled in using labor data to justify capital expenditure and evaluate the **ROI of process changes**.
- A project manager capable of leading complex, concurrent deliverables and meeting project deadlines with minimal oversight.
- Confident in presenting to both technical and non-technical audiences with polished presentations.
- Comfortable using **CAD tools, Lean Six Sigma**, and other common engineering tools and platforms.

### You have…
- **BS in Industrial Engineering, Mechanical Engineering**, or a similar field required.
- **3-5+ years of experience in food manufacturing**.
- **3-5+ years of experience** in investigating, analyzing, justifying, and selecting equipment to help the company make informed decisions to improve costs and efficiencies.
- **3-5+ years of engineering and project management experience** in a manufacturing environment.
- **Lean Six Sigma certification** and **Kaizen experience** preferred.
- Comfort and experience working on the production floor, engaging with equipment and operators.

## What We Offer You

title: Associate Software Engineer
description:
## Change the way the world travels

Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s all powered by our commitment to make every single journey extraordinary - including yours.

Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of our local offices around the globe, from New York to Bangkok.

## Team mission

At GetYourGuide, engineers work on problems that matter: building the systems that connect millions of travelers with experiences they'll remember for a lifetime. Our teams learn fast, take ownership, iterate, and build at real scale. AI is already reshaping how we build products and what travel can be. For the right engineer, this is an opportunity to do the most exciting work of their early career.

## Your mission

- With support and mentorship, you’ll write **clean code** that ships to millions of travelers
- Work closely with senior and staff engineers to design and build **reliable, scalable systems**, bringing your own ideas to the table, not just executing tasks
- Take **end-to-end ownership of features**: from understanding the problem and designing the solution, to shipping, monitoring, and iterating
- Use **AI tooling** actively and intelligently as part of your daily workflow
- Help build **AI-powered product experiences** that change how travelers discover, book, and enjoy the world
- Participate in **code reviews**, improve our codebase, and help raise the quality bar across your team
- Engage with product and design partners to deeply understand the traveler problem you're solving, not just the ticket in front of you

## Your toolkit

You're a fresh graduate, looking for your first full-time job and you've already shipped things like: side projects, open source contributions, coursework, internships, freelance work, or hackathon builds. You know what it feels like to take something from an idea to a working product. You're genuinely excited about what AI makes possible.

We know everyone's journey is different. Excited about the role and tick some of these boxes? We'd love to hear from you:

- **Ownership-driven**: You treat your work as your own. You don't wait to be told something is broken or could be better; you help to improve it, communicating early, asking for feedback, and collaborating with others to create a better state.
- **Deeply curious**: You dig into problems until you actually understand them. You learn fast and apply what you learn even faster
- **Bias for action**: You ship, gather feedback, and iterate.
- **Collaborative by nature**: You know when to push ahead independently and when to pull in others. You ask questions early. You support your teammates through thoughtful feedback and clear communication
- You have hands-on experience with **AI tools**. You've built real things - projects using **Claude or OpenAI APIs**, apps built with tools like **Lovable**, or experiments that turned into something tangible
- Solid foundation in **computer science fundamentals**: data structures, algorithms, basic system and API design concepts
- Familiar with building and shipping software, professionally or through your own projects
- Comfortable working across the stack either in **backend or frontend systems**

## Extras that give you an edge

- An interest in contributing across the full stack (backend and frontend), with a willingness to learn our core technologies. This includes **JVM languages (Kotlin, Java, Scala)** for the backend and frontend essentials like **Vue.js, TypeScript, and CSS/styling frameworks**.
- Familiarity with **cloud infrastructure concepts** and **distributed systems concepts** like **Kubernetes, AWS/GCP, microservices and event-driven architecture**
- Open source contributions or a visible portfolio: a **GitHub profile**, a live project, something we can look at

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary

- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

## How to apply

Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below. If you have any further questions, please don’t hesitate to get in touch at jobs@getyourguide.com.

## We’re an equal opportunities employer

Our commitment is that every qualified person will be evaluated according to their skills, regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with your application.

title: Data Engineer, Growth Data Engineering
description:
## Change the way the world travels

Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s all powered by our commitment to make every single journey extraordinary - including yours.

Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of our local offices around the globe, from New York to Bangkok.

## Team mission

Within **Growth Data Engineering** — part of the strategic Flywheel Data Engineering group — our mission is to build the trusted data foundations and self-serve capabilities for the customer growth side of our marketplace. We ingest, integrate, and structure critical internal and external datasets into reliable tables, metrics, and data products that help GetYourGuide acquire and retain our customers. We achieve this through a close partnership with Growth Analytics, Product, and Data, enabling teams to move faster with confidence.

## Your mission

- **Build end-to-end data solutions independently:** Deliver reliable, high-quality datasets/pipelines that power traveler-facing decision-making (e.g., acquisition, conversion, engagement, retention).
- **Be a trusted thought partner:** Work closely with **Product and Data** to translate business needs into delivered outcomes and drive adoption of trusted, self-serve data capabilities.
- **Deliver high technical craft:** Apply best practices in code quality, data modeling, testing, and monitoring/alerting; contribute to operational support for what you ship and improve reliability over time.
- **Improve what’s already in production:** Pragmatically refactor and simplify existing pipelines/models, fix data quality issues at the root cause, and make targeted performance and cost improvements within your scope.
- **Contribute to team outcomes:** Participate in planning/roadmap, code reviews, and knowledge sharing to raise team effectiveness
- **Strong operational mindset:** Maintain a sustainable balance between operational responsibilities and building new solutions, using team SLOs as an input to prioritize improvements.

## Your toolkit

- **Experience:** 3+ years in a relevant data role, with hands-on experience across data engineering technologies and analytics tooling.
- **Communication:** Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, able to explain technical concepts clearly to technical and non-technical audiences.
- **Data engineering depth:** Expertise in **SQL & Python**, building robust data pipelines and data models, and operating data at scale in warehouses/lakes (e.g., **Delta**, **Snowflake**, **PostgreSQL/MySQL**) with a strong focus on **data quality, accuracy, and reliability**. Strong **DBT** proficiency and familiarity with **Spark**
- **Reporting & insights:** Solid understanding of data visualization and enablement through tools like **Looker/Tableau** and notebooks (e.g., **Jupyter**).
- **Business and stakeholder focus:** Able to prioritize effectively, manage stakeholders, and translate business needs into clear technical plans and deliver outcomes.
- **Autonomy & ownership:** Proactive, customer-oriented, and comfortable owning projects end-to-end, balancing system health (monitoring, performance, cost) with new delivery.
- **Team impact:** Collaborative and mentoring-minded, enjoys sharing knowledge, raising standards through reviews, and helping the team succeed.
- **AI-first mindset:** Uses modern AI tools to boost productivity and accelerate solving business needs - while maintaining strong standards for quality, security, and governance

## Extras that give you an edge

- **Growth-domain impact:** You’ve delivered data products in growth and marketing adjacent domains (e.g., marketing attribution, brand and crm) and thrive in complex, multi-stakeholder environments.
- **Growth & lifecycle impact:** You’ve shipped data solutions that improved acquisition and retention—supporting brand and performance marketing and CRM/lifecycle—while navigating multiple stakeholders (Marketing, Growth PMs, Analytics, Engineering).
- **Software engineering craft:** Strong CS fundamentals and a polyglot mindset, comfortable with **Java/Scala**, and you value clean code, solid testing habits, and pragmatic automation.

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary

- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

## How to apply

Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below.

## We’re an equal opportunities employer

Our commitment is that every qualified person will be evaluated according to their skills regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with your application.

The role requires 3+ years of experience with a strong proficiency in SQL, Python, and DBT, working closely with product and analytics stakeholders.

title: Data Engineering Manager, Supply
description:
## Change the way the world travels
Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s all powered by our commitment to make every single journey extraordinary - including yours.

Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of our local offices around the globe, from New York to Bangkok.

## Team mission
Within **Supply Data Engineering** - part of the strategic **Flywheel Data Engineering** group - our mission is to **build the trusted data foundations and self-serve capabilities for the supply side of our marketplace**. We **ingest, integrate, and structure** critical internal and external datasets into **reliable tables, metrics, and data products** that help GetYourGuide **onboard suppliers, support their success, and scale supply operations**. We achieve this through close partnership with **Supply, Product and Data**, enabling teams to move faster with confidence.

## Your mission
- **Build and lead a high-performing team:** Hire, coach, and support data engineers to do their best work through clear expectations, direct feedback, and performance management.
- **Set direction and deliver outcomes:** Shape the roadmap, strategy, and long-term vision for Supply Data Engineering - aligned with the priorities of Product, Sales, and Data partners working in the space
- **Be a trusted thought partner:** Act as a strategic advisor to stakeholders across **Supply, Product and Data**, building strong relationships and driving adoption of trusted datasets and self-serve capabilities.
- **Raise the bar on technical excellence:** Ensure strong data architecture, reliability, and data quality. Establish effective engineering practices and standards while balancing hands-on technical leadership with people leadership.
- **Power critical decision-making and initiatives:** Lead work that integrates and operationalizes internal and external datasets (including competitive signals) to enable initiatives such as **dynamic/competitive pricing**, availability and inventory optimization, and quality improvements - so Supply can move faster with confidence.

## Your toolkit
- **Experience:** 3+ years in a relevant data management role with hands-on experience.
- **Communication:** Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English, able to explain technical concepts clearly to technical and non-technical audiences.
- **Strategic leadership + business acumen:** You translate strategic needs into crisp priorities, measurable outcomes, and executable roadmaps.
- **Cross-functional influence:** You align stakeholders across Supply, Product and Data - navigating trade-offs and keeping delivery focused on impact.
- **Player-coach leadership:** You combine strong coaching with technical depth - reviewing designs and code, improving engineering standards, and mentoring engineers.
- **High-trust team leadership:** You build an inclusive, high-trust team with strong engagement and retention, develop high performers, and address performance issues promptly and fairly.
- **Data engineering fundamentals:** You’re proficient in **SQL and Python** and bring strong grounding in data modeling, pipeline design, orchestration, observability, and data quality. You’re comfortable engaging directly with production systems.
- **Pragmatic, self-serve mindset:** You value automation, documentation, and enablement to drive scalable self-serve adoption.
- **AI-first mindset:** You leverage modern AI tools and techniques to boost engineering productivity and accelerate solving business needs - while maintaining strong standards for quality, security, and governance.

## Extras that give you an edge
- **Relevant domain experience:** You’ve worked in a marketplace business before, ideally working with seller/supplier-side data (e.g., pricing, availability, inventory, quality). You thrive in complex, multi-stakeholder environments.
- **Modern data stack exposure:** You have experience with tools such as **Databricks/Spark, dbt, and Looker** (or comparable technologies).
- **Strength with challenging external data:** You’re curious and resilient with real-world data constraints, especially integrating frequently changing external/competitive sources - while maintaining reliability, governance, and trust.

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary
- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.

description:

At the AI Platform team, our mission is to empower Mission Teams across GetYourGuide to build and operate production-grade LLM features independently, democratizing AI development while maintaining the product quality our users deserve and expect.

As the Manager of our AI Platform team, you will lead the vision, strategy, and execution to enable and scale AI-powered features across all product areas. You will be responsible for building and evolving the centralized AI infrastructure that makes LLM development systematic, trustworthy, and accessible at scale. Your team will establish the evaluation systems, abstraction layers, and safety guardrails that allow Mission Teams to ship AI features with confidence and speed, ensuring GetYourGuide delivers reliable, high-quality AI experiences to travelers worldwide.

## Your mission

- Lead all **hiring and performance management processes** for your Engineering team, helping your engineers reach their full potential in this emerging and rapidly evolving domain.
- Drive high-impact projects and outcomes by managing the **team's roadmap and portfolio allocation**.
- Find and deliver solutions to **complex technical challenges** that span across multiple services and business domains, ensuring Mission Teams can build production-grade LLM features with confidence.
- Establish and evangelize **best practices for LLM development** across Tech.
- Balance rapid innovation with production standards to ensure the platform enables speed without compromising **quality, security, or reliability**.
- Build **strategic partnerships** with key stakeholders across product, engineering leadership, and vendor relationships to align platform capabilities with business needs.

## Your toolkit

- You have a **strong sense of ownership**, ensuring technical and product plans are aligned with your stakeholders, your team, and organizational and company goals.

- You are passionate about **building and developing a high-performing engineering team**—mentoring, coaching, and empowering engineers to tackle novel challenges in the AI space.
- You excel at **evangelism and education**, building confidence and capability across technical teams through documentation, workshops, and hands-on collaboration.

## Extras that give you an edge

- Experience building **platform infrastructure or developer tooling** that enables other engineering teams to ship faster and more reliably.
- Experience working with **LLMs in production environments**, including prompt engineering, evaluation systems, or AI safety mechanisms.
- Experience working in a **startup or high-growth environment**, taking projects from zero to one and scaling them across an organization.
- Experience operating as a **technical product manager/owner**, particularly for internal platform products serving engineering customers.
- Track record of successful **technical evangelism and education initiatives** that drove adoption and capability-building across engineering organizations.

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary

title: Senior ML Ops Engineer, AI Platform Team
description:
## Change the way the world travels
Be part of the GetYourGuide journey and connect people with unforgettable travel experiences worldwide. Since 2009, millions of travelers have booked unique activities with us in over 12,000 cities. Our headquarters in Berlin is supported by 16 other local offices across the globe.

Ready to join a diverse community of over 850 fellow explorers dedicated to revolutionizing the travel experience industry? Check out our careers site to learn more.

## Team mission
Since 2020, GetYourGuide has established a Machine Learning (ML) Platform team, providing the tools and best practices to help the Data Products team build and maintain production-ready ML/AI systems. The team's mission is to enable our diverse teams and ML/AI use-cases via self-service tools and automation. More recently the team was renamed as AI Platform Team as a way to better reflect our ambition to become an AI-first organization.

As a **Senior MLOps Engineer**, you'll join our AI Platform Team and have a chance to make an enormous impact across all of our data products. You'll work closely with our Data Products teams to build systems that enable ML/AI algorithms to go to production. If you are interested in contributing to the success of a product that is used by millions of travelers around the world then keep on reading.

## Your mission:
- You'll design and implement systems and tools for **scalable and more efficient machine learning solutions**.
- You will work to increase the amount of data products in production reliably, reduce the time to production, and reduce operational costs.
- You'll be partnering/collaborating with product teams to bring advanced algorithms into production, following **MLOps best practices**.

## Your toolkit:
- **Data Science & MLOps:** Data Scientists are close stakeholders for you. You share a genuine interest in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. You bring **4+ years of experience** in applying MLOps best practices at scale.
- **Software Engineering:** You have strong fundamentals in Computer Science and a polyglot mindset. **Python** is your language of choice; you are able to migrate between various programming languages though. Delivering clean code and investigating new tools, languages, and practices is your passion.
- **Data Engineering:** You bring previous experience in organizing and querying data at scale data warehouses, tools like **Spark** are not novelty for you.
- **Business Experience:** You possess the ability to prioritize and manage stakeholders; they know you for your good communication and collaboration skills.
- **Vision:** Your ideas turn into reliable and maintainable code. A track record of outcome-driven work gives evidence of this. You are experienced in operating at scale; you have a **cloud DevOps / infrastructure mindset**.
- **Autonomy:** Your mindset can be described as autonomous, proactive and customer-oriented. You own your projects.
- **Teamwork:** You strongly believe that a team is more than the sum of its members. Mentoring and sharing knowledge are fulfilling activities for you.

## Extras that give you an edge:
- Prior experience in scale-up environments with various technologies
- Interest in **LLMs** and the new challenges of **Generative AI**

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary
- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

And more…

title: Senior People Partner - Engineering
description:

## Team mission

As people partners, we help leaders build healthy, high-performing teams that power GetYourGuide’s mission to unlock unforgettable travel experiences. We align our talent strategy with business needs so every team can reach its full potential.

This senior people partner role will work with leaders in our engineering org to shape our organizational design, support our transition to an AI first engineering org. and bring our high performance culture to life.

## Your mission

- **Partner with Engineering leadership** (Directors and Engineering Managers) to build healthy, high-performing teams across a ~330-person engineering org.
- **Translate business strategy into a people strategy**, with a clear, prioritized roadmap (org health, capability needs, leadership, talent, culture).

- **Run core people processes with credibility and consistency** for Engineering (performance cycle, calibrations, leveling inputs, compensation cycle support), continuously improving how these land in a fast-moving tech environment.

- **Demonstrated capability in org design & change leadership** and workforce planning in partnership with business.
- **Good command of core people processes in a tech environment** (performance cycle, calibrations, talent reviews, leveling inputs, comp cycle support) in collaboration with COEs (e.g., Total Rewards, Talent Acquisition, Performance & Growth).
- **Confidence handling complex manager support and employee relations topics** with sound judgment and appropriate escalation to People Relations / People Ops.
- **Data-driven and pragmatic**: comfortable using org health and people metrics to turn insight into action.

## Extras that give you an edge

- Prior involvement in **AI transformation** or **adoption programs** (e.g., AI tooling rollout, workflow redesign, capability uplift, change adoption measurement).
- Experience building top talent / succession programs in Engineering.

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary

- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year

title: Senior Software Engineer (Backend focused)
description:
## About GetYourGuide
GetYourGuide is the globally leading marketplace for unforgettable travel experiences. Travelers use GetYourGuide to discover the best things to do in a destination. Since its founding in 2009, people from all over the world have booked more than 150 million tours, activities, and attraction tickets through GetYourGuide. Powered by a global team of over 800 travel experts and technologists, we are headquartered in Berlin and have 17 local offices around the world.

## The Mission
Technology has been and continues to be the catalyst for GetYourGuide’s growth. Our work in Marketplace is shaping global travel experiences, and you can help.

The features we build enable our customers to seamlessly book unforgettable experiences and empower our partners to expand their businesses. This is a complex task that presents an extraordinary opportunity. From creating the Supplier infrastructure that improves our supplier's businesses to developing innovative marketplace features that drive the next phase of our growth, you can build incredible solutions at GetYourGuide on a global scale.

Whether you are working on crafting dynamic search and recommendation algorithms or designing new features to accelerate the company's growth, you will have the chance to make a real impact. At GetYourGuide, our Teams are constantly pushing the boundaries, finding new ways to bring the magic of travel to people all over the world.

We’re organized in cross-functional mission teams composed of backend and full stack engineers, mobile engineers, data engineers, product managers, and designers.

## You will:
- Work with engineers, designers, and analysts
- Help to enable your mission team to iterate fast and learn about our customers by designing, launching, and iterating on **A/B experiments**
- Maintain high-quality standards and continuously improve our code base, system, and processes
- Design and develop efficient solutions that can continue to scale
- Mentor other team members and be involved with hiring
- Contribute to the team’s roadmap and long-term strategy
- Work with **Java, Spring Boot, Vue.js, SASS, Node.js, PHP, MySQL, PostgreSQL, GraphQL, Kafka, Kubernetes**

## Who you are:
- **6+ years of software development experience**
- Expertise in web application development using component-based frameworks
- High proficiency in **Java**
- Experience designing architecture and deployment of web applications & services
- Experience with writing tests
- Ability to turn ideas into fast, reliable, and maintainable code
- Positive, proactive team player who is passionate about their craft
- Customer-centric prioritization and data-driven decision-making
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in **English** with the ability to clearly explain technical concepts to others

## Bonus points for:
- Knowledge of frameworks and toolchains such as **Node.js, Vue.js**, or similar component-based Frontend frameworks and libraries
- Experience with **A/B testing, hypothesis building, and event-based analytics**
- Prior experience working in the e-commerce space
- Prior experience in start-up environments

## How we set you up for success:
- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

## Equal Opportunity Employer
We commit that every qualified person will be evaluated according to skills regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with the application.

title: Staff Engineer, Supply Tech (Backend Focused)
description:
## Change the way the world travels
Join the GetYourGuide journey to connect people with unforgettable travel experiences around the world. Millions look to us for unique activities they can trust, and it’s all powered by our commitment to make every single journey extraordinary - including yours. Ready to unlock your potential with a community of fellow explorers? Find your next role at our Berlin HQ or one of our local offices around the globe, from New York to Bangkok.

## Team mission
The Supply Tech group enables every supplier to deliver great experiences at scale—so travelers can always discover and book the highest‑quality activities with confidence. We build the core platform and product capabilities that help supply partners grow on their terms: expanding reach, maximizing revenue, differentiating their offering, streamlining operations through powerful tools and support, and protecting a trusted marketplace through fairness and transparency.

We’re an AI-forward, platform-minded group that partners closely with Product, Design, Data, and Business teams to ship reliable systems that scale across a complex supplier ecosystem. We empower engineers with high autonomy and ownership, making pragmatic trade-offs while raising the bar on quality, integrity, and long-term market leverage.

## Your mission
- **Set technical direction for Supply Tech**: define target architecture, quality bars, and multi-quarter technical bets that unlock supplier growth (self-serve onboarding, optimization, and integrity/quality gates).
- **Lead cross-team execution on complex initiatives**: drive alignment, sequence work across teams, and deliver measurable outcomes while managing dependencies and tradeoffs.
- **Design and evolve scalable, maintainable systems** powering supplier-facing workflows (onboarding, catalog quality, and optimization loops), with strong emphasis on simplicity, resilience, and long-term leverage.
- **Raise engineering craftsmanship and operational excellence**: improve reliability, observability, and incident readiness; reduce systemic tech debt; and ensure our services run safely at scale.
- **Translate business needs into technical strategy**: work tightly with Product, Design, Data, and Commercial stakeholders to clarify outcomes, propose solution options, and land decisions that balance speed, correctness, and strategic flexibility.
- **Build effective “how we build” mechanisms for the group**: drive reusable patterns (platform primitives, guardrails, templates), improve how teams collaborate, and create force-multiplying clarity through docs and technical RFCs.
- **Champion AI-forward product delivery** where it creates real leverage (e.g., category-smart onboarding and an AI performance coach), ensuring safe deployment, clear evaluation, and responsible guardrails.
- **Mentor and grow technical leaders**: coach engineers, strengthen decision-making across the org, and set a high bar for architecture, delivery, and accountability.

## Your toolkit
- **8+ years of software development experience**, including ownership of complex, business-critical backend systems (Staff scope).
- Proven strength in **technical leadership**: setting direction, aligning stakeholders, and driving execution across teams through influence.
- Proficiency in **Java/Spring** and the ability to design and ship backend features end-to-end (from concept/RFC to production).
- Strong background in designing and implementing **scalable service-oriented / distributed architectures**, with a solid understanding of design patterns and pragmatic tradeoffs.
- Experience building and operating production **microservices** in distributed, **cloud**, and **Kubernetes**-based environments, with modern observability practices and a high bar for reliability.
- Hands-on experience with relational databases such as **Postgres** and **MySQL** (data modeling, migrations, performance, and operational maturity).
- Experience designing and evolving **APIs**, including **GraphQL**, with a strong focus on correctness, versioning, and developer experience.
- Ability to work effectively end-to-end (backend-leaning), including collaborating across APIs, workflows, and supplier-facing product surfaces when needed to ship outcomes.
- A positive, proactive, team-oriented mindset, and a passion for mentoring and raising the bar on engineering craftsmanship.
- Be excited to experiment with and leverage **AI** (in product delivery and your day-to-day development workflow).
- Excellent written and verbal communication skills in **English**.

## Extras that give you an edge
- Experience building backend platforms/primitives that create leverage across teams (shared services, guardrails, workflows, templates).
- Experience with workflow-heavy B2B/partner domains (onboarding, catalog/configuration, quality gates, operational tooling).
- Experience building and shipping AI-assisted backend capabilities (e.g., evaluation/guardrails, safe rollouts, human-in-the-loop workflows), ideally applied to onboarding/optimization use cases.
- Experience improving products via experimentation and measurement readiness (instrumentation, baselines, iterative delivery).
- Comfortable contributing to the frontend codebase when needed (**TypeScript** + **Vue.js**) to unblock delivery or improve end-to-end quality.

## How we’ll make your career journey extraordinary
- Annual personal growth budget and mentorship programs for continuous learning and development
- Work from anywhere in the world for 30 days per year
- A hybrid working approach with three days of in office collaboration (Mon, Tue, Thur) and two days of optional at home focus time.
- Opportunities to collaborate and socialize with team members through quarterly team events and yearly company-wide events
- Monthly transportation and fitness budget
- Discounts for you, your friends, and family on GetYourGuide activities
- Language reimbursement program
- Health and wellness benefits

## How to apply
Submit your CV/resume in English using the form below. For tips and insights into our hiring process and culture, check out how we hire for tips and visibility into our process and check out life at GetYourGuide. If you have any further questions, please do not hesitate to contact us via jobs@getyourguide.com.

## We are an equal opportunities employer
Our commitment is that every qualified person will be evaluated according to their skills, regardless of age, gender identity, ethnicity, sexual orientation, disability status, or religion. Please refrain from including your picture and age with your application.
