title: Site Reliability Engineer - Observability
description:
## About the opportunity
We are seeking a Site Reliability Engineer to join the Observability group inside our Platform Engineering domain.

Platform Engineering’s goal is to provide easy to use, self-service platforms to enable other segments to easily build, deploy and monitor their business applications. And Observability’s role in that part of the company is to provide our users with end-to-end observability that’s easy to use.

As one of the first banks completely hosted in the cloud, our security, resilience and productivity standards require a motivated and well balanced team. We are using a modern technology stack to match our principles when it comes to providing the framework for our development team, the company and our customers.

## In this role, you will:
In Observability you’ll build the tools for monitoring and measuring infrastructure, microservices, and sometimes totally unique workloads. You’ll put the developer experience at the front of your mind and implementations, and you’ll contribute deeply to understanding and preventing incidents through tooling, automation, and people-centered processes. All the while you’ll be thinking like an engineer. That means using automation to speed up repetitive tasks and to contribute to the security and compliance of the tech stack that you run and support.

## What you need to be successful:
You need to be well-versed in the basics building blocks of observability: **metrics, logs, and traces**. You should also be familiar with the tools we need to extract (think things like **Prometheus, StatsD, OpenTelemetry libraries**), transform (tools like **Vector, Beats, FluentBit**), and load (**OpenSearch, Grafana**, etc.) this data in ways that your fellow engineers can make sense of it. Then, you should be comfortable with helping your colleagues understand this data so they can measure and monitor their applications and recover quickly for incidents.

Next, you’ll need experience with at least one glue language like **GoLang or Python**. And you’ll need to operate like your brain runs on **Linux**. Everything we do is in the cloud, so it’s important that you like it, understand it, and know what it takes to observe it. Your entire environment, from provisioning to deployment, will be defined and managed as code using tools like **Terraform and AWS CDK**.

Finally, things change fast here. We like it that way! Even if you don’t meet 100% of the criteria for this job, but you should have a strong desire to learn and improve, and you have a passion for working with bleeding-edge technologies, then you’d be a great asset to our team.

### Bullet points version
- Understanding of the basic building blocks of observability: **metrics, logs, and traces**
- Experience using the right tools to extract data (think things like **Prometheus, StatsD, OpenTelemetry libraries**), transform data (tools like **Vector, Beats, FluentBit**), and load data (**OpenSearch, Grafana, Datadog**, etc.) so that your fellow engineers can make sense of it
- Solid skills with at least one glue language like **GoLang or Python**
- The ability to build in a cloud-only environment with with infrastructure as code tools like **Terraform and AWS CDK**
- A brain that runs on **Linux**

## What’s in it for you:
- Accelerate your career growth by joining one of Europe’s most talked about disruptors.
- Employee benefits that range from a **competitive personal development budget**, **work from home budget**, **discounts to fitness & wellness memberships**, **language apps** and **public transportation**.
- Come together with your team in the office for a dedicated day of teamwork each week, plus another day of your choice, and enjoy the flexibility of remote work the rest of the time. *Some roles may require additional in-office presence*.
- As an N26 employee you will have access to a **Premium subscription on your personal N26 bank account**. As well as subscriptions for friends and family members.
- **Additional day of annual leave** for each year of service.
- A high degree of autonomy and access to cutting edge technologies - all while working with a friendly team of peers of diverse nationalities, life experiences and backgrounds.
- A **relocation package with visa support** for those who need it.

## Who we are
N26 has reimagined banking for today’s digital world. Technology and design empower everything we do and it’s how we are building the global banking platform the world loves to use.

We've eliminated physical branches, paperwork, and hidden fees for an elegant digital experience and supreme savings. Giving people the power to live and bank their way is what gets us out of bed in the morning and inspires the work that we do.

We are headquartered in Berlin with offices in multiple cities across Europe, including Vienna and Barcelona, and a 1,500-strong team of more than 80 nationalities.

**Sounds good? Apply now for this position.**

**Equal Opportunities:**
We recognize that our strength lies in our people and the varied perspectives they bring to our workforce. We strive to build talented and diverse teams to drive our business success and empower our people to reach their full potential.

We genuinely welcome and encourage applications from people of all backgrounds, cultures, genders, sexual orientations, abilities, neurodiversities, and ages. We're committed to creating an inclusive workspace where everyone feels valued and respected, free from harassment and discrimination. If there's anything you need to make the application process work for you, please let us know by reaching out to candidate.exp@n26.com.

Visit our website to learn more about Diversity, Equity, & Inclusion at N26.

title: (Legal) Data Engineer
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are looking for a **(Legal) Data Engineer** to join the **Legal Operations** team on our journey to optimize and automate our legal processes globally, regionally, and locally.

## What You Will Do
- Design, build, and maintain integrations, connecting our primary legal platform, **Onit**, with tools used by our global legal and procurement teams, such as **Ariba/SAP**, **Jira**, **Google Cloud**, **Slack**, and **DocuSign**.
- Design scalable data pipelines, databases, and data models to support reporting, contract lifecycle management, legal matter management, and operational analytics.
- Design and implement AI-based solutions, for example by leveraging **Google Enterprise** and **Vertex AI**, and act as an internal AI and innovation consultant by driving workshops and proactively pitching use cases and solutions (“internal innovation sales”).
- Ensure technical solutions are well documented, compliant, and aligned with legal and procurement strategies as well as local regulatory requirements.
- Automate end-to-end legal workflows using tools such as **Google Apps Script** (including macros), **Google Cloud**, and **n8n**.
- Partner with stakeholders to identify opportunities for automation and process optimization, translating operational challenges into technical solutions.

## Requirements
- **5+ years of experience** in software engineering, scripting, automation, or integrations.
- Strong hands-on experience with **Python** and **SQL**; **JavaScript** is a plus.
- Experience designing and building data warehouses and system-to-system integrations, preferably within **Google Cloud** (e.g., **Cloud Functions**, **Cloud Run**, **API Gateway**).
- Strong knowledge of best practices in security, authentication methods, and infrastructure.
- Exposure to or hands-on experience with AI/ML concepts or tools, particularly **Vertex AI SDK** and **BigQuery**.
- Strong ownership and consultancy mindset, with the ability to prioritize based on business needs and work across multiple initiatives in a cross-functional, global, and multicultural team.

## Nice-to-Haves
- Knowledge of **Google ADK**, **RAG infrastructure**, and **prompt template management**.
- Consultancy and/or Legal Tech experience.
- JavaScript skills.

## Benefits & Perks
- **Hybrid working model**: 2 days a week at the Berlin campus.
- **Vacation**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Professional Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financials**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Other**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation Support**: Support for moving to Berlin via a relocation hub.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

title: Senior Engineer, Golang - (Logistics, Rider Experience)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Engineer (Golang)** to join the Rider experience team in Logistics-Deliveries. You will tackle high-impact challenges that make last-mile delivery efficient, affordable, and sustainable, directly improving experiences for riders, end customers, and merchants globally.

As part of the Deliveries Tribe within the Rider Product Line, you will focus on delivering the right information to riders through personalised insights, guidance, and training to enhance findability, engagement, and performance. Your team ensures a seamless Rider App experience by building well-structured host spaces, strong information architecture, and reusable components.

### The Deliveries Tribe Domains:
- **Order Management**: Order status, entry points from consumer apps, issue handling, and rider login.
- **Rider Fundamentals**: Shift management, proactive/personalised communication, and data-driven tools for safety and performance.
- **Delivery Flow**: The end-to-end journey from order assignment and acceptance to navigation, pickup, and drop-off.

## What You’ll Do
- Collaborate closely with Product, Design, Data, and Engineering partners to solve challenges in the delivery journey.
- Design and build features leveraging personalised insights to improve rider engagement and performance.
- Develop and maintain scalable, reliable systems handling high traffic and complex migrations.
- Contribute to a consistent Rider App experience via shared host spaces and clear information architecture.
- Monitor, measure, and optimize system performance using technical and business metrics (**DevOps culture**).
- Craft high-quality, high-traffic services and APIs.
- Participate in code reviews, debugging, and incident diagnosis.
- Apply modern engineering practices: **Continuous Delivery**, **test automation**, and **Agile development**.
- Stay current with industry trends to improve system operation.
- Deliver meaningful value aligned with the company mission.

## Key Responsibilities
- **Cross-Functional Collaboration & Strategy**: Partner with Product, Design, and Data teams.
- **Personalised Product Engineering**: Use data-driven insights to enhance the delivery experience.
- **Scalable Systems & Architecture**: Manage high-traffic APIs and complex migrations.
- **Performance & DevOps Culture**: Embrace a "you build it, you run it" mindset.
- **Technical Excellence & Quality**: Ensure high-quality code via CI/CD and rigorous reviews.
- **Stability & Continuous Improvement**: Proactive debugging and tech stack evolution.

## Nice to Have
- Experience building and operating high-load, high-traffic systems in distributed, microservice-based environments.
- Strong understanding of distributed systems (service-to-service communication, reliability).
- Hands-on experience with **Kubernetes** for scaling microservices.
- Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines (e.g., **Jenkins**, **Drone**, or **Spinnaker**).
- Proficiency with observability stacks: monitoring, alerting, logging, and distributed tracing (e.g., **Grafana**, **Prometheus**, **Datadog**).
- Strong database expertise: Relational (**PostgreSQL**, ACID, indexing) and Document-oriented (**MongoDB**, **Firestore**).

## Benefits & Perks
- **Hybrid Working Model**: 2 days a week at the Berlin campus.
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday (plus an extra day in 2nd and 3rd year of service).
- **Professional Development**: €1,000 Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and Udemy Business access.
- **Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Extras**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Senior Golang Engineer to join the Rider Experience team within the Logistics-Deliveries tribe in Berlin. The role focuses on building scalable, high-traffic microservices and personalized features to improve the end-to-end delivery journey for riders.
benefits: Hybrid working model (2 days/week in Berlin campus)

title: Senior Director Engineering, Quick-Commerce
description:
## Senior Director Engineering, Quick-Commerce

As the **Senior Director of Engineering for QC Growth**, you will be the visionary leader behind the engines that power our global Q-Commerce ambition. You aren’t just managing code; you are overseeing a massive, distributed ecosystem—from global content and catalog systems as well as promo tool to high-concurrency graph API services to cutting-edge AI data products.

Leading an organization of **100+ engineers** across multiple tribes and domains, you will bridge the gap between complex distributed systems and world-class customer experiences. Your goal is to simplify the complex, scale the successful, and mentor the next generation of technical leaders in the heart of Berlin.

Furthermore, you will closely work and collaborate with our various brands around the world, to build an optimized solution for their needs while driving for alignment to reduce overall complexity.

## Your mission

- **Strategic Leadership:** Own the technical roadmap for the QC Growth product line, driving long-term OKRs that align engineering excellence with aggressive business growth.
- **Scaling Excellence:** Direct a 100-person engineering organization, fostering a culture of high performance, psychological safety, and continuous improvement.
- **Architectural Stewardship:** Act as the North Star for architectural decisions, ensuring our microservices—handling massive global traffic—are resilient, scalable, and secure.
- **Data Innovation:** Oversee the evolution of our central QC data pipelines, transforming raw data into "first-class" products especially in the area of category classification, affordability perception, and content enrichment.
- **Global Collaboration:** Partner with international brands across 70 countries to build localized solutions while maintaining a unified, low-complexity global platform.
- **Organizational Evolution:** Boldly lead organizational design, hiring, and talent development to ensure the team is structured for maximum velocity and impact.

## Your heroic skills

- **The Track Record:** 8+ years of engineering leadership, with at least 4 years managing multiple managers/teams in a large-scale, distributed microservices environment.
- **Technical Depth:** A deep understanding of modern stacks. You should be fluent in at least 70% of our ecosystem: **Golang, Python, Java, Postgres, TypeScript, Kafka, GraphQL, BigQuery, gRPC, and Kubernetes (AWS/GCP)**.
- **Operational Mastery:** You have a "systems thinking" mindset, with expert-level knowledge of service-oriented architecture, cloud-native infrastructure, and high-concurrency troubleshooting.
- **Business Acumen:** You don’t just ship features; you move metrics. You are comfortable translating business KPIs into technical requirements and vice-versa.
- **People First:** You are a passionate mentor. You take pride in growing Directors and Engineering Managers, building a "talent magnet" organization.
- **The Agile Mindset:** You thrive in fast-paced, fault-tolerant environments where "done" is better than "perfect," but "excellent" is the baseline.
- **Language & Travel:** You speak fluent English and are willing to travel once a quarter.

## Bonus Points

- A proven history of building e-commerce or marketplace models at scale.
- Hands-on experience with Machine Learning integration and large-scale data products.

## Why Delivery Hero?

- Exchange ideas and meet colleagues from different teams in our active guilds and through our global tech & product community.
- We offer visa & relocation support globally to our permanent employees.

## About us

Delivery Hero Tech is playing an exceptional role in the large growth of our company. Our Tech teams leverage a diverse stack to create cutting-edge solutions which cover the full customer experience - starting with a great online search experience and ending with a real-time delivery at your doorstep.

Delivery Hero is building the next generation global on-demand delivery platform. We have grown rapidly from inception in 2011 to become the world's largest food-ordering network and we’re now innovating and creating new verticals such as groceries, pharmacies, flowers and other convenience articles in multiple markets.

Our awesome international team already operates in 70+ countries worldwide and we are looking for the most talented people to join us on our mission to ‘always deliver an amazing experience.’

At Delivery Hero, we believe diversity and representation is key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. Fostering this starts with hiring -- therefore we do not discriminate on the basis of race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or any other aspect that makes you, you.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Senior Director of Engineering for QC Growth in Berlin to lead an organization of 100+ engineers. The role involves driving the technical roadmap for global Q-Commerce systems, managing distributed microservices, and scaling AI data products across 70 countries.
benefits: Active guilds and global tech & product community

title: Product Manager - (Fintech, Payments)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Product Manager** to join our Fintech team responsible for building world-class payment platforms, processing millions of transactions globally. With this platform, Delivery Hero provides payment solutions for customers, riders, and for our family of brands worldwide. The position will be based in our incredible Hero Hub in the heart of Berlin.

As a Product Manager in the Payment Orchestration domain, within Payments Tribe, you will be responsible for bringing key Payments products to market via Delivery Hero's regional platforms. You will create a clear understanding of platform needs as you translate these into products that bring value globally. You will own the definition of your product roadmap, the delivery of your products and the communication with a diverse and compelling global stakeholder group.

## Your Mission
- Own a defined problem area within our payments platform, with a focus on improving outcomes like **payment success, cost, reliability**.
- Shape the product roadmap for your area, turning business needs and technical constraints into clear, actionable priorities.
- Use **data and analytics** to understand where things break, what users struggle with, and where improvements will have the biggest impact.
- Work closely with engineering to design and deliver payment orchestration and platform improvements.
- Collaborate with regional teams to understand local needs and ensure solutions work across markets.
- Support launches, monitor performance, and iterate based on real-world results.
- Learn from production incidents, and help turn them into long-term product improvements rather than one-off fixes.

Be part of building the financial backbone of Delivery Hero. You’ll develop products that empower millions of customers and merchants, from seamless payments to innovative financial solutions like wallets and credit. Your work will support our path to profitability by creating financial flexibility for users and enabling smooth transactions across our markets.

## Requirements
- **5+ years of product management experience**, with ownership of business outcomes in complex product or platform environments.
- Experience in **payments, fintech, or integrations with external payment providers**.
- Experience using **data and analytics** to identify problems, define hypotheses, validate opportunities, prioritize work, and measure impact on key metrics.
- Comfort working with engineers on technical topics like **APIs and system behavior, testing**, even if you’re not designing everything yourself.
- The ability to break down ambiguous problems and move them forward step by step.
- Excellent communication skills and the confidence to work with multiple stakeholders across teams and regions.

## Nice to Have
- Experience with **payment orchestration, routing, or multi-PSP environments**.

## Benefits
- **Work Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week in the Berlin campus).
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Growth & Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to the Udemy Business platform.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation**: Support for relocating to Berlin via a relocation hub.

## Diversity and Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. Fostering this starts with hiring - therefore we do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses, or any other aspect that makes you, you. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Product Manager for its Fintech team in Berlin to oversee the Payment Orchestration domain. The services of the Choice Domain determine which restaurants and shops a customer can order from. This step is essential for the entire conversion funnel - and our products make sure customers have the best possible choice in all places and at all times. This requires considering the unique topology of each city and the dynamic state of the fleet in real time, handling high volume of requests and low latency demands.

You will work closely with the feature teams to drive the reliability, quality, scalability and efficiency of our services.

- Deep understanding of the **software stack, cloud infrastructure, and networking**, and the ability to be hands-on in all of them when needed.
- Ability to contribute completely autonomously, creating transparency of work for Tech Leads and EM/teams.
- Excellent communication skills to explain complex concepts to both technical and non-technical audiences.

title: Director, Data Science - Deep Learning & AI
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. ## Role Overview
We are seeking a **Director of Data Science, Deep Learning** to lead our deep learning team within the AdTech space, specifically within the Vendor Data team, to shape the future of AI-driven ads and deals at Delivery Hero. In this pivotal role, you will jointly architect state-of-the-art deep learning models, influence AI strategy, and develop cutting-edge methodologies to significantly enhance the success of thousands of vendors - restaurants, shops, and local businesses - across our platform.

As a senior leader within the Vendor Team, you will be instrumental in building and optimising our AdTech products by leveraging advanced deep learning techniques. These AI models will play a pivotal role in our AdTech ecosystem, helping vendors to maximise visibility, enhance their conversion rate, and drive substantial revenue growth.

Operating in around 65 countries, our AdTech infrastructure connects millions of businesses with their ideal customers daily. With AdTech projected to generate over €1 billion in revenue in 2024/25, your leadership in deep learning-driven data will be critical in shaping our profitability strategy and advancing our market position.

## Key Responsibilities
- **Deep Learning Mastery**: Exceptional expertise in designing and implementing advanced deep learning architectures, particularly **transformers** and other **sequence-based attention-driven AI models**, **generative ranking approaches**, and **long-term interest networks** for sophisticated user personalisation in AdTech.
- **Rigorous Model Evaluation and Business Impact**: Proficient in establishing comprehensive evaluation frameworks for deep learning models, encompassing both internal model-centric metrics (such as **NCE, ROCAUC, PRAUC**) and the meticulous measurement of business metrics during live **A/B testing** and experimentation.
- **Cross-Functional Leadership and Alignment**: Demonstrated ability to collaborate and align effectively across diverse functions, including engineering, commercial, and product teams, to drive shared goals and ensure the successful, impactful success of deep learning initiatives.
- **Scalable MLOps and Data Engineering**: Proven leadership in developing and maintaining highly scalable and robust data and feature pipelines, ensuring the efficient training, deployment, monitoring, and ongoing performance of deep learning models in high-throughput production environments.
- **Technical Vision and Continuous Innovation**: Knowledge at the forefront of deep learning and machine learning engineering (**MLE**) trends and approaches, actively driving the team to adopt cutting-edge methodologies. Possesses the expertise to collaborate with senior team members in defining the technical roadmap and leveraging advanced data processing tools like **MonteCarlo** and **dbt** to achieve ambitious team objectives.

## Requirements
- **Extensive Leadership Experience**: At least eight years of professional experience leading and scaling high-performing data science and deep learning teams, with a proven track record of applying advanced AI modelling methods in domains such as AdTech, digital marketplaces, or computational economics.
- **Advanced Academic Background**: A master's degree or higher in a quantitative field such as mathematics, physics, computer science, or a related discipline.
- **Deep Technical Proficiency**: Strong technical foundation as a previous individual contributor, expert in **Python** and **SQL**, with hands-on mastery of deep learning frameworks including **Keras, TensorFlow or PyTorch**, alongside data manipulation libraries such as **Pandas, PySpark, and NumPy**.
- **Cloud-Scale Data Expertise**: Demonstrated expertise in managing, modelling, and deploying deep learning solutions with high-volume, real-time data within cloud environments.
- **Strategic Communication**: Exceptional ability to communicate complex deep learning concepts and their business implications clearly and concisely to both technical teams and senior leadership.

## What’s in it for you?
- **Hybrid working model**: Join the team in the Berlin campus 2 days a week.
- **Vacation**: 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Professional Development**: 1.000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to the Udemy Business platform.
- **Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

The role involves architecting state-of-the-art AI models (like transformers) to optimize vendor visibility and revenue growth across 65 countries. The ideal candidate is a technical leader with a strong background in MLOps and a track record of scaling high-performing data science teams.

title: Engineering Manager - Search (Consumer, Global Discovery)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for an **Engineering Manager** to lead one of our squads within the **Search Domain**. This squad builds and owns some of the core services that power search and discovery. These are low-latency services handling tens of thousands of queries per second across multiple markets. They must remain fast, and continuously improve in relevance. Your squad will own the full lifecycle of these services: design, build, operate, and iterate.

In this role, you will guide a team of engineers, own the quality and operational health of your services, and partner closely with Product and Data Science to deliver measurable improvements to the search experience.

## Responsibilities

### Lead & Grow a High-Performing Squad
- Own team health, engagement, and inclusion, ensuring every engineer has growth opportunities and clear career paths.
- Develop engineers through regular 1:1s, structured feedback, clear expectations, and performance management.
- Hire and onboard talent with strong backend and search infrastructure skills, while contributing to domain-wide recruiting efforts.

### Own Technical and Delivery Outcomes
- Experience delivering **Conversational Search** or **LLM-powered search interfaces**.
- Lead your team in delivering high-quality, maintainable services in a **Java**.
- Drive **Agentic Engineering** adoption and a transformation towards fully Agentic SDLC.
- Ensure reliable sprint execution, proactive risk management, and transparent stakeholder communication. Manage cross-squad dependencies.

### Drive Operational Excellence
- Maintain the reliability of services through robust monitoring, alerting, and incident response.
- Ensure on-call readiness, runbooks, and blameless post-mortems are part of the squad's culture.
- Continuously improve delivery and operational health: cycle time, deployment frequency, safe reindexing rollouts, and relevance regression detection.

### Partner with Product & Data Science to Deliver Impact
- Translate product discovery goals and relevance targets into actionable engineering work with clear priorities.
- Collaborate with Data Science on experiments and A/B tests to measure relevance improvements (**MRR, NDCG, click-through rates**).
- Keep the squad aligned with business objectives and user value—ensuring improvements translate into measurable customer impact.

## Requirements

### Search Technical Fluency
You are comfortable working with backend engineers in **Go, Java, or Python** who build search infrastructure. You understand the fundamentals of search—**inverted indexes, vector search, query parsing, relevance scoring**—well enough to guide your team's architectural choices, review designs, and make sound engineering trade-offs. Experience with leveraging **LLMs** for search improvement, or driving conversational search projects is also a plus.

### Agentic Engineering Best Practices
You have hands-on experience with **Agentic Engineering** and you are able to drive a transformation of the SDLC from traditional to fully Agentic. This improves the baseline code quality, decreases time to market and empowers the engineers to focus on higher-level problem solving and architecture.

### Delivery & Operational Maturity
You know how to run a predictable delivery process, manage cross-team dependencies, and ensure service reliability for low-latency, high-throughput systems. You are experienced with monitoring, on-call practices, and incident management—and you understand what it takes to safely roll out changes, and detect regressions in production.

### Strong People Leadership
You have experience mentoring engineers, fostering inclusion, giving structured feedback, and building a positive, productive team environment. You know how to grow engineers into senior technical roles and create a culture of ownership.

## Benefits
- **Hybrid working model**: 2 days a week in Berlin campus.
- **Vacation**: 27 days holiday (extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service).
- **Professional Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and Udemy Business platform access.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Yoga, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial Perks**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Discounts**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity & Inclusion
Delivery Hero does not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking an Engineering Manager for their Search Domain to lead a squad developing low-latency search and discovery services. title: Senior Product Manager - (Core Data, Tech Foundations)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. ## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Product Manager - Core Data** to join the central **Data Platform tribe** on our journey to always deliver amazing experiences for our internal users.

As a member of the central Data Platform tribe, you’ll drive the product vision, strategy, and execution of DH's global core infrastructure and data products, supporting thousands of internal users on leveraging data to provide an amazing experience for millions of customers across 70+ countries.

As the Senior Product Manager for Core Data, you won't just manage global data models and products: You will own the global blueprint for how Delivery Hero understands and measures its business. You will bridge the gap between local brand nuances (like foodpanda, Glovo, or Talabat) and a unified global data product portfolio that empowers teams and users across the globe to operate with consistent definitions and reliable insights.

This role requires a strong understanding of DH’s business operations and data landscape, exceptional stakeholder alignment skills, and hands-on analytical expertise to understand the status and quality of our core data. You will work closely with local data teams and global services to align on scalable data models that address critical business challenges, while partnering internally with your Core Data team to deliver high-impact data products built on those foundations.

You will play a key role in shaping a data ecosystem that processes millions of events every day. Your success will be measured by the reliability and impact of your global data products.

## In this role you will
- **Own the Vision**: Define and execute the roadmap for Core Data products, moving us from fragmented local silos and inconsistent data definitions to a high-performance global standard.
- **Scale Global Models**: Partner with local data teams and central global services to align on data models that solve high-stakes business issues across DH’s key processes (Search and Recommendation, Order Processing, Finance, Marketing…).
- **Lead a Power Squad**: Drive a cross-functional team of Data Engineers and Analysts. You aren't just a "backlog manager"; you are the bridge that translates business intent into technical architecture and drives execution.
- **Guardian of Quality**: Implement federated data governance processes. When data quality dips, you don't just fix it: You build the systems that prevent it from happening again.

## Requirements & Qualifications
- **PM Experience**: Proven track record in managing internal data products in complex organisations.
- **Analytical Depth**: You are hands-on. You can dive into **BigQuery** to troubleshoot a data issue yourself and find root causes.
- **Strategic & Persuasive**: You can take a complex data related issue, understand root causes and nuances, and drive global initiatives to rally people across the organisation behind a common solution.
- **Bias for Action**: You move autonomously and fast, unblock business impact now, and then iterate based on what the data tells you.
- **Business Understanding**: You understand the "Golden Path" of an order, from the first click in an app to the final financial reconciliation.
- **Technical Literacy**: You bridge the gap between business requirements and technical execution. You speak the language of data engineering. You understand how data implementation shapes the speed and quality of data delivery at scale.

## Benefits & Perks
- **Work Model**: Hybrid working model with 2 days a week at the Berlin campus.
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.

- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Dining**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

title: Senior Data Scientist - (Query Intelligence, Global Discovery)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Data Scientist** to join the **Global Search tribe**. You will shape the global consumer experience for millions of users, enhancing customer satisfaction and driving global growth and profitability through innovative projects involving Generative AI, Agentic workflows, and LLMs to revolutionize how users discover food and groceries in Berlin.

## Your Mission
- **Advance Query Intelligence with AI**: Research, develop, and optimize advanced LLMs, focusing on fine-tuning and Agentic AI to scale query understanding services.
- **Architect Autonomous Agents**: Design and implement agentic reasoning patterns (e.g., **ReAct, Chain-of-Thought**) and multi-agent orchestration for complex search problems.
- **Optimize via Fine-Tuning & Distillation**: Lead the lifecycle of specialized models using **PEFT (LoRA/QLoRA)**, supervised fine-tuning, and model distillation for high-performance, low-latency production solutions.
- **Lead Innovation**: Identify and apply SOTA methods and take ownership of the full data science lifecycle—from ideation and fine-tuning to production.
- **Collaborate Across Teams**: Work in a global, cross-functional team with product managers, analysts, backend engineers, and data engineers to translate business challenges into impactful projects meeting OKRs.
- **Extract Actionable Insights**: Analyze large, complex datasets to uncover search relevance challenges and communicate findings to stakeholders to influence strategy.
- **Experiment and Lead Innovation**: Leverage cutting-edge technologies like LLMs and Agentic AI to accelerate innovation and streamline processes.
- **Master Ambiguity**: Translate ambiguous business problems into well-defined data science projects with clear objectives.

## Requirements
- **Education**: Advanced degree in a quantitative field (e.g., Computer Science, Mathematics, or Physics) or equivalent professional background.
- **Experience**: Proven track record as a Data Scientist solving complex business problems through advanced scientific methodologies.
- **Agentic AI**: Deep, hands-on experience building Agentic workflows, including tool-use (function calling), autonomous planning, and orchestration frameworks like **LangChain, LlamaIndex, or AutoGen**.
- **LLM Expertise**: Proven track record in LLM fine-tuning (**SFT, RLHF/DPO**) and distillation techniques.
- **Technical Stack**: Essential proficiency in **Python** (and its ML ecosystem) and **SQL**. Experience with Cloud environments (**GCP/AWS**) and MLOps tools (e.g., **MLFlow, Metaflow**) is required.
- **Search ML**: Hands-on experience with search machine learning algorithms (query understanding, classification, expansions, personalization, and search results evaluation) and a foundational understanding of the search funnel.
- **Productivity Tools**: Proactive use of AI-assisted tools (e.g., **Gemini, Cloud Code**) to accelerate research and coding workflows.
- **Soft Skills**: Demonstrated experience in global, cross-functional teams with excellent communication skills and a willingness to mentor others.

## Benefits & Perks
- **Work Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week in the Berlin campus).
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day in the 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Growth & Development**: €1,000 Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.

- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, and Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation**: Support for moving to Berlin via a dedicated relocation hub.

Delivery Hero does not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

AdTech introduces people to new food they love and enables our partners to meet their future customers at the perfect moment. Our data science team is at the heart of this growth, powering personalisation, Ranking, relevance, and recommendation.

## What You Will Do
- **End-to-End Ownership**: Lead the design, build, and deployment of large-scale AI recommendation systems that deliver multi-million-euro business outcomes for the vendor vertical.
- **Next Best Action (NBA) Framework**: Own the architecture and modeling for determining the optimal sequence and timing of actions (e.g., ad suggestions, promotional offers, operational advice) to maximize vendor success metrics.
- **Strategic Time-Series & Forecasting**: Lead all core initiatives in advanced time series modeling for demand prediction, vendor forecasting, and understanding long-term trends in the vendor base.
- **Commercial Insights & Take Rate**: Act as the technical authority for take rate optimisation, using statistical rigour and causal methods to measure the incrementality and efficiency of all vendor-facing pricing and adtech levers.
- **Cross-Functional Alignment**: Act as the primary technical partner for Product, Engineering, and Commercial teams to validate or debunk business hypotheses and drive alignment on the recommendations strategy.

## Requirements & Qualifications

### Recommendation Systems & Sequential Authority
- **Recommendation Architect**: Expert practitioner in designing, building, and deploying large-scale, high-performance recommendation systems (e.g., two-tower, deep sequence models, Graph Neural Networks) for the B2B or marketplace domain.
- **Sequential/Timeseries Specialist**: Thought leader in using timeseries analysis and sequence modeling (e.g., LSTMs, transformers, advanced forecasting) for vendor behavior, next-best-action prediction, and demand forecasting.
- **Causal Inference for Action**: Proven ability to apply causal inference and advanced experimentation frameworks to quantify the true incremental impact of recommendations and vendor-facing product features.
- **Take Rate Analysis**: Deep expertise in the analytical frameworks and models required for optimizing key commercial metrics like take rate, vendor LTV, and churn prediction.

### Advanced AI & Statistical Engineering
- **Multi-Objective Optimization**: Mastery in formulating and solving problems that balance potentially conflicting vendor KPIs - such as maximizing short-term revenue/take rate while maintaining vendor engagement and long-term retention/success.
- **Algorithmic Decisioning**: Deep experience in designing and deploying real-time decision-making algorithms that power "Next Best Action" systems and adapt to shifting vendor and market conditions.
- **Probabilistic Modeling**: Strong foundation in Bayesian methods and uncertainty quantification to provide reliable forecasts and confidence intervals around business-critical projections.
- **Production Excellence**: Deep operational knowledge of deploying these sophisticated models using **Python** frameworks like **Keras**, **scikit-learn**.

### Strategic Leadership & Influence
- **The "Recommendation North Star"**: Proven ability to define a 2+ year technical roadmap for Vendor Recommendation Data Science, influencing the strategic direction of Product, Engineering, and Commercial leadership.
- **Decision Science Mastery**: A track record of translating complex ML/statistical findings into clear, actionable executive narratives.
- **Force Multiplier**: A history of mentoring Staff and Senior Data Scientists, raising the bar for scientific rigour and production ML excellence across the entire organisation.

## Nice-to-Haves
- Expertise in **Reinforcement Learning (RL)**, particularly in applying Multi-Agent RL or contextual bandits to sequential decision-making and next-best-action problems.
- Familiarity with **Game Theory** or **Mechanism Design** as applied to multi-sided platform optimisation.
- Major Contributions (papers, talks, or libraries) in the fields of Large-Scale Recommendation Systems or Time-Series Forecasting.
- Expertise in designing feature stores and serving pipelines for sequence and time-series features.

## Benefits
- **Working Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week in Berlin campus).
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Growth & Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Legal**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation**: Relocation support and guidance for moving to Berlin.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Principal Data Scientist for its AdTech team to lead the development of large-scale AI recommendation systems and 'Next Best Action' frameworks for vendors. The role focuses on driving vendor success through advanced time-series modeling, causal inference, and strategic technical roadmapping.

title: Senior Manager,  IAM Security
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt.

## Role Overview
We are seeking a pragmatic and experienced leader to join our Security Engineering domain as the **Senior Manager, Identity and Access Management (IAM) Security**. In this pivotal role, you will transcend traditional access management by architecting a global identity strategy that treats Identity as the core of our security perimeter. You will ensure the security of sensitive data across our complex global platform while championing a "Security as an Enabler" mindset that balances frictionless user experience with rigorous protection.

As a Senior Manager, you will build and lead a mission-oriented team of engineers, fostering a culture where technical excellence, high-fidelity data, and professional growth are at the heart of our operations. You will orchestrate the deployment of cutting-edge technologies by leveraging solutions like **Okta** and **Cloudflare Warp**. Your leadership will be defined by your ability to bridge the gap between technical complexity and business value through collaboration with stakeholders in Engineering, Operations, Legal, and Compliance. By driving the transition toward a **Zero Trust architecture** and modernizing our access models, you will directly influence the security posture and operational resilience of the world’s leading local delivery platform.

## Your Mission
- **Lead and Mentor a High-Performing Team**: Champion a culture of technical excellence and professional growth, enabling the team to drive strategic security outcomes and long-term career success.
- **Drive the IAM Roadmap and Maturity**: Define the roadmap for our IAM program, encompassing identity governance, access management, privileged access management (PAM), and authentication solutions.
- **Drive key IAM initiatives**: Lead the implementation of critical projects, including:
    - Centralizing identity management
    - Enhancing authentication security
    - Enforcing endpoint identity
    - Adapting zero trust principles
    - Transitioning to role based access control (RBAC)
- **Ensure secure identity and access management**: Implement and maintain robust security controls to protect organizational identities and access to critical systems and data.
- **Collaborate with stakeholders**: Partner with IT teams, business units, and senior management to ensure successful adoption and implementation of IAM initiatives.
- **Stay ahead of the curve**: Continuously monitor industry trends, emerging threats, and new technologies to proactively enhance our IAM security posture.

## Requirements
- **Technical expertise**: Deep understanding of IAM frameworks and technologies, including **Identity Governance (IGA)**, modern authentication (**OIDC/SAML/FIDO2**), and **Privileged Access Management (PAM)**.
- **Program Design & Governance**: Ability to translate high-level security goals into a structured IAM Security program, ensuring alignment with organizational priorities and compliance requirements.
- **Leadership skills**: Demonstrated ability to build, mentor, and lead high-performing engineering teams in a fast-paced environment.
- **Communication and collaboration**: Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to effectively collaborate with diverse stakeholders.
- **Project management**: A track record of managing complex, global IAM projects from inception to full organizational adoption.
- **Problem-solving**: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills to address IAM challenges effectively.
- **Threat Landscape Awareness**: Up-to-date knowledge of the evolving identity threat landscape and modern mitigation strategies like **Zero Trust** and **Phishing-resistant MFA**.

## Nice to have
- Experience with cloud security architectures and cloud IAM concepts (**AWS, GCP**)
- Familiarity with industry standards and security frameworks
- Experience in fast pace growth environments

## What’s in it for you
- **Hybrid working model**: 2 days a week in the Berlin campus.
- **Time off**: 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Professional Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to the Udemy Business platform.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Future**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity and Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.

description:

Operating across about 70 countries around the clock, our bidding systems enable millions of restaurant partners to compete for customer attention through sophisticated real-time auctions. Bidding is a fundamental capability that drives vendor engagement and business growth across our global marketplace.

You will have a leading role in the evolution of our bidding product portfolio, from foundational auction algorithms to advanced optimization systems. ## Requirements

title: Principal Product Manager, Site Reliability Engineering
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are looking for a **Principal Product Manager** for our **Site Reliability Engineering (SRE)** team, a key part of our internal Developer Platform used by more than 3,000 developers across the world to build and ship our food delivery platform. In this critical individual contributor role, you will define the future of how Delivery Hero builds and operates reliable, large-scale systems.

## What You Will Do
- Own the **SRE product strategy and roadmap**, delivering innovative solutions that empower internal developers and ensure a seamless shopping experience for customers worldwide.
- Lead the strategic vision and roadmap for SRE products, including **observability, large-scale distributed system testing, and incident management**.
- Serve as the central point of contact for the SRE product area.
- Partner closely with senior stakeholders from DH's entities across the globe to ensure alignment and successful product deliveries.

## Requirements
- **8+ years of product management experience** with a proven track record of owning the end-to-end lifecycle for highly technical products (e.g., platforms, infrastructure, SRE tools).
- Ability to translate complex business needs and technical challenges into a clear, strategic product roadmap and an actionable execution plan.
- Ability to articulate complex technical concepts and strategic rationale to diverse audiences, from engineers to senior leadership.
- Strong technical background with a deep understanding of **platform engineering, Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) principles**, and the modern developer workflow.
- Data fluency: defining and analyzing metrics related to system reliability, performance, and developer productivity to guide product decisions.
- Experience and ability to lead and influence cross-functional teams, creating clarity and driving focus in a fast-paced, ambiguous environment.
- Exceptional communication skills - comfortable engagement with Engineers from the newest intern through to the CTO.
- Experience leading organisational change at scale across culture, technology and operations.
- Passion for the craft of Product Management.

## Nice to Have
- Previous experience working with SRE or platform engineering products.
- Software Engineering background.
- Experience coaching/mentoring other Product Managers in technical/platform teams.

## What’s in it for you
- **Hybrid working model**: 2 days a week in the Berlin campus.
- **Vacation**: 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Professional Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Principal Product Manager for its Site Reliability Engineering (SRE) team to lead the strategy for its internal developer platform. The role involves managing products for observability and incident management to support over 3,000 developers globally.

title: Director of Product - Vendor Promotions
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## About the opportunity
We are on the lookout for a **Director/Group Product Manager** to join the **AdTech team** on our journey to always deliver amazing experiences. 

As part of our AdTech team, you’ll enable our partners to meet their future customers at the perfect moment. Through a range of products that we have developed to offer advertising solutions, we help restaurants increase their visibility and reach, improve their order conversion, and eventually drive more sales by covering the entire marketing funnel.

In this role, you will lead the development of key features of our **vendor-paid promotions products** - we’re building some of the most successful and innovative promotions products in the e-commerce industry. Our products enable vendors to rapidly grow their business in a targeted and customized way.

## Responsibilities
- **Own the product vision and strategy** to establish vendor promotions as a key lever for Delivery Hero’s success in the marketplace
- **Build a world-class e-commerce product** through in-depth product discovery, focus on the user, and optimization for long-term product sustainability
- **Collaborate within a cross-functional team** dedicated team comprised of commercial performance managers, data scientists and analysts, UX researchers, designers and engineers
- **Align your ideas** with our regional teams and get the buy-in from global and regional C-level stakeholders for your product agenda
- **Join our large and growing global product community** and act as a product champion and mentor

## What you need to be successful
- **10+ years of experience** building digital growth/promotions products in a high-performance environment
- Strong track record of driving business results
- **7+ years of experience leading teams**; ability to motivate and inspire others
- Demonstrated ability to work highly independently with a very high degree of ownership
- **Highly analytical profile**; ability to evangelise, explain and align the product agenda by reference to data and expected impact
- Strong ability to communicate, listen and negotiate to reach effective solutions in complex organizational environments
- **Excellent English communication skills**, both written and spoken

## Diversity, Inclusion & Accessibility
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. Fostering this starts with hiring - therefore we do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses, or any other aspect that makes you, you.

We encourage you to let us know if you need any accommodations or specific accessibility support to ensure a smooth interview experience—just let us know with an email to our Inclusion Officer at inclusion@deliveryhero.com include it in your application.

**Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.**

You're welcome to share your pronouns (he/she/they) right from the start so we can address you respectfully from our first contact.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Director/Group Product Manager for its AdTech team to lead the strategy and development of vendor-paid promotions products. The role involves driving e-commerce growth, managing cross-functional teams, and aligning with global C-level stakeholders to increase vendor visibility and sales.
benefits: Preferential consideration for severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications

title: Senior Product Analyst -  Consumer Product
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Product Analyst** to join our Consumer product tribe. You will shape the global consumer experience for millions of users, creating data-driven, personalized interactions to attract and retain customers. This role is based in **Berlin**.

## Team Information
The Consumer Product Analytics Team drives product strategy and innovation by leveraging data to provide actionable insights. The team is based in Singapore and Berlin, working closely with product managers, engineers, and business stakeholders. You will collaborate with a larger data team including data engineers, data scientists, and ML engineers.

## Responsibilities
- **Experimentation**: Design, implement, and analyze A/B tests using statistical methods for robust hypothesis validation and accurate impact measurement.
- **Product OKRs & Metrics**: Define 'good' by setting up a product metric framework and quarterly OKRs.
- **Tracking & QA**: Own tracking definition and collaborate with Delivery Hero brands to improve the reliability of user behavior tracking for discovery tools.
- **ETL & Reporting**: Build data pipelines and self-service dashboards.
- **Exploratory Analysis**: Draw insights from data to drive product strategy and roadmap.
- **Mentorship**: Contribute to the growth and development of fellow product analysts through knowledge shares, workflow optimizations, hiring, and onboarding.

## Requirements
- **7+ years experience** in the analytics space within rapidly growing and dynamic environments.
- Experience working in **Search & Recommendations systems**.
- Strong experience leveraging **SQL** for analytics (**BigQuery** experience is a plus).
- Proficiency with at least one data visualization tool (e.g., **Looker Studio/Data Studio, Tableau, Qlikview, Power BI, Matplotlib**).
- Experience working with **large scale user data** (transactional, click stream, etc.).
- Background in **statistics**, knowledge of statistical test design and analysis, and hands-on experience running **A/B tests at scale**.
- Experience with **customer behavior tracking platforms** (e.g., Google Analytics, Adobe, Webtrekk, MixPanel, SnowPlow, Piwik, Tealium, Segment).
- Ability to work with multiple stakeholders, communicate analytical findings clearly, and drive mid-scale analytics projects end-to-end.

## Nice to Have
- Experience with data pipelining tools such as **Airflow** and **DBT**.

## Benefits
- **Working Model**: Hybrid working model (face-to-face collaboration in Berlin campus 2 days a week).
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day provided in the 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Yoga, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financials**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Senior Product Analyst in Berlin to drive growth and profitability for their Consumer product tribe. The role focuses on A/B testing, metric definition, and leveraging large-scale user data to influence product strategy and the global consumer experience.
benefits: Hybrid working model (2 days/week in campus)

title: Senior Data Scientist - (Logistics, Workforce)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in over 70+ countries worldwide, powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are looking for a **Senior Data Scientist - Logistics, Workforce** to join our Logistics team to help us create a fast, reliable and transparent delivery experience. You will make an impact in optimizing our on-demand last-mile delivery operations, involving hundreds of thousands of couriers and restaurants, improving the experience for millions orders per day in 70+ countries.

## Your Mission
- Conceptualize the right modeling approach for challenges in the field of Logistics at scale, together with your squad lead and our stakeholders.
- Innovate new modeling solutions by drawing from fields like **Machine Learning, Operations Research and Statistics** that drive value for our business.
- Pair-program with your squad to engineer solutions that automate the retraining of models and generation of predictions.
- Provide ideas in brainstorming sessions with your Data Science colleagues to solve the toughest modeling problems together.
- Help defining data needs to bring value to the projects, collaborate with the data engineering and tech teams in planning their roadmap.
- Work with (semi-)structured data from our **BigQuery DWH architecture** and process with **Spark** where necessary.

## Requirements
- You have at least **3 years of experience** applying methods from machine learning to real-world datasets.
- Fluency in **Python** and familiarity with its scientific/visualization libraries such as **NumPy, Pandas, Scikit-learn, Matplotlib, Plotly** etc.
- You can transfer business problems from a problem space to a technical solution space.
- Experience in solving regression and classification-type of problems with statistical, linear/non-linear models and ensemble models in particular (**Random Forest/XGBoost/LightGBM/CatBoost**).
- You know how to work with Big Data platforms such as **Big Query/Spark** and know how to write a **SQL query** to pull the data you need.
- You can write maintainable code that follows best practices in software engineering.

## Nice-to-Haves
- Experience with **Time-Series Forecasting, Operations Research, and Statistics** is an interesting addition.

## Benefits
- **Working Model**: Hybrid working model with face-to-face connection and collaboration in Berlin campus 2 days a week.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Yoga, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Development**: 1.000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Online Canteen, Corporate Discounts.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating not only an exciting product, but also an amazing customer and employee experience. Fostering this starts with hiring - therefore we do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses, or any other aspect that makes you, you. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Senior Data Scientist for their Logistics team in Berlin to optimize last-mile delivery operations. The role involves creating ML and Operations Research models using Python, Spark, and BigQuery to improve efficiency across 70+ countries.
benefits: Hybrid working model (2 days/week in Berlin)

description:

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Software Engineer (Machine Learning)** to join the Quick Commerce Data Science team. As part of the Integrated Partners Science team, you’ll be part of the ideation, design, prototyping and deployment of Data Products that help solve and scale solutions for our local business partners. Examples include recommendation systems for item replacement and Data Products to reduce out-of-stock items during order fulfillment.

Your primary value lies in tackling problems at scale by building and maintaining the high-performance serving layer for ML models, integrating multiple microservices in real-time to fetch external data, apply business rules, and enforce operational constraints.

## Responsibilities
- **Scale and Perform**: Architect and build solutions at scale, optimizing for low-latency performance and high efficiency in production.
- **System Ownership**: Take end-to-end ownership of the backend serving layer, from design through deployment and maintenance.
- **Collaborate and Optimize**: Work closely with Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers to understand needs and build solutions that optimize workflows and transition models to production.
- **Innovate and Suggest**: Proactively suggest how the team can leverage new technologies and architectures to support new use cases.
- **Leverage Cloud**: Utilize modern technologies and public cloud infrastructure to build highly available systems for multiple teams using CI/CD and Infrastructure as Code.

## Requirements
- **Expert Proficiency in Go & Python**: 4+ years of professional software development experience, focusing on high-performance, concurrent backend services in Go and integrating with data/ML libraries in Python.
- **System Design**: Proven experience designing and implementing new, scalable applications from scratch (e.g., **gRPC services, GraphQL**).
- **Streaming Technologies**: Experience with high-throughput data streaming technologies (e.g., **Kafka, Pub/Sub**).
- **Technical Evaluation**: Experience in technical explorations to evaluate technologies, conducting pros and cons analyses, and proposing solutions for complex system design challenges.
- **DevOps Practices**: Experience with **CI/CD pipelines** and **Infrastructure as Code (Terraform** or equivalent).
- **Containerization**: Expertise with containerization and orchestration tools like **Docker and Kubernetes**.
- **Communication Skills**: Fluency and clarity in English communication, both written and verbal.

## Nice-to-Haves (Advanced Expertise)
- Strong conceptual understanding of the **MLOps lifecycle**, including model serving, monitoring, and pipeline orchestration.
- Prior hands-on experience in **ML Engineering or MLOps**, including tools like **Metaflow, MLflow, Argo Workflows, or Cloud Notebooks**.
- Experience in deep-diving into existing complex systems for performance investigations and improvements.

## Benefits
- **Work Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week in the Berlin campus).
