title: Senior Principal Software Engineer - Logistics Capabilities (all genders) LS
description:
## THE ROLE & THE TEAM

At Zalando, our vision is to build the leading pan-European ecosystem for fashion and lifestyle e-commerce. **The Logistics Capabilities** teams develop and scale the technology for our **entire logistics network**. This critical work powers the fulfilment of orders placed by our more than 52 million active customers across Europe. Our systems ensure fast, reliable, and efficient logistics operations that translate into seamless convenience for our customers–from fast delivery to effortless returns.

Over 200 Software Engineers, Applied Scientists, Product Managers, and Product Analysts work in our Berlin, Dortmund, Erfurt, and Moenchengladbach locations to maintain business-critical systems. Set up in more than 30 Logistics Capabilities teams, they drive innovation in one of the most complex areas of e-commerce. Our in-house technology landscape is not just essential to Zalando—it is a benchmark for the industry, shaping the future of logistics through seamless delivery experiences.

At Zalando, shaping the future of logistics means solving real-world challenges at scale. As a **Senior Principal Software Engineer**, you will own the full development lifecycle for large-scale, mission-critical systems from design to deployment and operational excellence.

## INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN

If you think you have what it takes, we encourage you to apply even if you don't meet every single requirement. You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!

At Zalando, our vision is to be the leading pan-European ecosystem for fashion and lifestyle e-commerce – one that thrives on diversity and is truly inclusive by design. We believe that diverse teams fuel innovation and creativity, and we actively seek out talent from all backgrounds.

We actively seek to reduce bias in our hiring and employment processes, focusing on your qualifications, skills, and contributions. To support this, we kindly ask that you refrain from including personal details such as your photo, age, or marital status in your CV, ensuring a fair and equitable evaluation based solely on your abilities and potential.

We are committed to providing an exceptional and accessible candidate experience for everyone. If you require any accommodations to support you throughout the hiring process, please let us know – we are here to assist you.

Discover more about our commitment to creating a diverse and inclusive workplace: https://jobs.zalando.com/en/our-culture/diversity-and-inclusion

## WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)

- **Architect and Evolve Logistics Platforms:** Design and lead the technical vision for our mission-critical logistics software, used both internally and by third-party providers. You will create robust, scalable microservice architectures for seamless warehouse and transportation operations, optimizing processes to reduce costs, improve delivery speed, and future-proof our logistics network through strategic integrations.
- **Drive Innovation with Automation and AI:** Spearhead the integration of automation, robotics, and AI-driven tools into our in-house developed systems. You will be key in enhancing fulfilment center efficiency and pushing the boundaries of what's possible in logistics technology.
- **Define Migration Readiness and Technical Health:** Develop and own the migration strategy for our warehouse systems. Establish clear criteria to determine migration readiness, evaluate the technical health and scalability of our platforms to ensure they can support expansion, and oversee all other technical aspects of the migration planning process.
- **Provide Technical Leadership and Mentorship:** Act as a technical expert across the entire logistics domain. You will deep dive into complex challenges to get things done while simultaneously guiding engineering teams and raising the technical bar for the entire organization.
- **Manage and Execute Complex Initiatives:** Take ownership of multiple high-impact technical initiatives simultaneously. From initial concept and design through to implementation and delivery, you will be the driving force that ensures technical excellence and timely execution.
- **Foster Cross-Functional Collaboration:** Work closely with other principal engineers, product managers, and operational stakeholders for different initiatives and also to create a unified technical roadmap. Your ability to map and understand the complete logistics ecosystem will be key to our success.

## WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF…

- You have **proven extensive experience in designing, building, and operating complex, large-scale distributed systems**.
- You possess deep expertise in **software architecture patterns**, including Distributed Systems, Event-Driven Architecture, and REST.
- Your technical toolkit is strong in JVM-based languages (**Java, Kotlin, Scala**), cloud-native development (**AWS, Docker, Kubernetes**), and relational databases like **PostgreSQL**.
- You are a **tech-oriented leader** who gets up to speed quickly, takes full responsibility for your domain, and has a history of successfully guiding teams through complex technical projects.
- You **have a strategic and hands-on mindset** too, and you are able to define a **long-term technical vision** while also diving deep into technical challenges to drive them to completion.
- You demonstrate a proven ability to manage multiple complex projects and initiatives simultaneously, from planning through to successful delivery.
- You have exceptional leadership and communication skills, with the ability to inspire teams and influence technical and non-technical stakeholders at all levels.

title: Head of Engineering (all genders)
description:
## Disclaimer
Candidates may work remotely from anywhere within **Germany** or the **United Kingdom** only.

## About Tradebyte
At Tradebyte you work hand in hand with the biggest players in e-commerce – from hip fashion brands to big online shops. We offer you an open work structure and an incomparable team spirit. We believe that work and passion are compatible and for that we offer the appropriate surroundings. With continuous growth, we are looking for new colleagues who share our passion for work. Love what you do – do what you love. Become part of Tradebyte, an independent company within the Zalando Group!

## The Role and the Team
As the **Head of Engineering**, you will be the strategic and technical anchor for our engineering department. You will lead multiple agile teams, driving technical excellence while ensuring we build scalable, high-quality SaaS solutions for the e-commerce sector. You won't just manage; you will lead by example.

## What We’d Love You to Do (and Love Doing)
- **Lead & Scale**: Lead, mentor, and grow multiple cross-functional engineering teams. You will manage Engineering Managers, fostering a culture of ownership, psychological safety, and continuous improvement.
- **Strategic Architecture & Hands-on**: Combine high-level architectural strategy with a hands-on mentality. You ensure our systems are scalable and robust, but you are also ready to dive into the code or architecture discussions to unblock your teams or solve critical technical challenges.
- **Drive Delivery**: Work closely with Product Leadership to align technical roadmaps with business goals. You translate complex e-commerce requirements into a solid technical vision and ensure timely delivery of high-value features.
- **Innovate SaaS**: Deepen our expertise in building modern SaaS applications. You will champion cloud-native best practices (**AWS**), microservices architecture, and operational excellence to handle high-load e-commerce scenarios.
- **Elevate Quality**: Define and enforce engineering standards across the department. From **CI/CD pipelines** to testing strategies (**TDD/E2E**), you ensure that "quality" is not just a buzzword but a built-in feature of our development process.
- **Recruit & Retain**: Actively shape the team structure, identify talent gaps, and drive the hiring process to attract top-tier engineers who share our values.

## We'd Love to Meet You If
- You have a proven track record of leading multiple engineering teams in a fast-paced **SaaS or E-commerce** environment, without losing touch with the technology itself.
- **Leadership**: Proven experience managing multiple teams or "leaders of leaders." You know how to align teams towards a common goal.
- **SaaS & E-commerce**: Ideally, you will already have experience with e-commerce or SaaS.
- **Hands-on Mentality**: You are a leader who remains technically sharp. You can conduct code reviews, participate in architectural decisions, and speak the same language as your Senior Engineers.
- **Strong Engineering Roots**: You have a solid background in Software Engineering (originally coming from **Java, Python**, or a similar modern stack). You understand the nuances of the **JVM or Python ecosystem**.
- **Architecture**: Mastery of modern architecture patterns (**Microservices, Event-Driven Architecture, REST/OpenAPI**).
- **Cloud Native**: Deep understanding of **AWS services (Lambda, EC2, SQS/Kinesis, RDS/DynamoDB)** and containerization (**Docker/Kubernetes**).
- **Modern Practices**: You are a strong advocate for **DevOps culture, CI/CD (GitLab, ArgoCD)**, and **Infrastructure as Code**.
- **Solution Oriented**: You put the customer first and solve customer requirements with a product-led and solution-oriented approach.
- **Business Acumen**: You can translate technical debt and architectural needs into business value for stakeholders.
- You have excellent communication skills and a very good command of **English** (written and spoken). You act as a bridge between Engineering, Product, and Business.

## Our Offer
Tradebyte provides a range of benefits, here’s an overview of what you can expect:
- Employee shares program
- 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando, 30% off Lounge by Zalando, discounts from external partners
- 2 paid volunteering days a year
- Hybrid working model - work where it works for you within Germany or the UK, with occasional office attendance required for moments that matter.
- Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
- 27 days of holiday a year to start for full-time employees (+1 day for every calendar year up to 30 days)
- Relocation assistance available (subject to prior agreement)
- Family services, including counseling and support
- Health and wellbeing options (including Wellhub, formerly Gympass)
- Mental health support and coaching available

title: Senior Principal Software Engineer (React Native)
description:
## THE ROLE & THE TEAM
As a **Senior Principal Engineer - React Native** in the Client Foundations team, you will support our technical vision and strategy for the architecture that powers our Android, iOS and Web applications for 50M+ active customers. This team is the backbone of our customers’ experience, responsible for developing and maintaining best-in-class, high-performing platform infrastructure for Android and iOS, including our underlying Rendering Engine framework. We empower developers with robust tooling, ensure smooth production operations, and establish the testing best practices that keep the Zalando Fashion Store running at scale.

This is a pivotal role in Zalando’s strategic migration to React Native. You will jump into the most complex engineering challenges to ensure our transition is scalable, secure, and built for the future. We are looking for an experienced Principal Engineer with deep architectural fluency in the new React Native architecture and a proven ability to debug the entire stack, from React component re-renders down to specific C++ bindings or native module layers.

Beyond the code, you will spearhead a culture of performance optimization and operational excellence. You will partner with product leaders and engineering teams to deliver foundational capabilities, while ensuring our mobile apps remain fluid and responsive. As a technical mentor, you will guide experienced engineers through complex profiling techniques and set the standards for UI performance metrics, ensuring that our technology landscape remains a benchmark for the industry.

## INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN
At Zalando, our vision is to be inclusive by design. And this vision starts with our hiring - we do not discriminate on the basis of gender identity, sexual orientation, personal expression, ethnicity, religious belief, or disability status. You are welcome to leave out your picture, age, or marital status from your application. We only assess candidates on their qualifications and merit.

We want to provide you with a great candidate experience. Feel free to inform us of any accommodations you may need, so we can best support you throughout the hiring process.

**do.BETTER - our diversity & inclusion strategy:** https://corporate.zalando.com/en/our-impact/dobetter-our-diversity-and-inclusion-strategy

## WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)
- **Solve the Most Complex Engineering Challenges in Zalando’s React Native Migration:** Play a pivotal role in our strategic journey to React Native. Leverage deep expertise in the new React Native architecture to resolve complex engineering challenges in massive-scale applications. Diagnose critical bottlenecks across the entire stack, from React re-renders to C++ JSI or native modules. Utilize expert proficiency with Xcode Instruments and Android Studio Profilers to fix blocked JavaScript threads, main thread bottlenecks, and native memory leaks.
- **Champion a Performance-First Culture:** Establish and lead a culture of performance optimization within the engineering organization. You will be responsible for setting performance budgets, integrating monitoring into CI/CD pipelines, and spearheading internal training to ensure we detect degradations before they reach production.
- **Deliver Best-in-Class UI Experiences:** Architect core app features and animations with performance as a primary consideration, applying your knowledge of when to utilize tools like **react-native-reanimated** for UI thread animations. You will use advanced profiling tools to analyze allocation timelines and optimize feature-rich interfaces, ensuring a fluid experience for our customers.
- **Elevate Engineering Excellence and Mentorship:** Act as a technical beacon for the mobile domain, mentoring experienced engineers on complex performance, profiling, and debugging techniques. You will communicate complex architectural decisions and trade-offs to stakeholders, ensuring technical alignment across the organization.

## WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF…
- You have extensive experience developing large-scale React Native applications, with deep architectural fluency in the new React Native architecture, including **Fabric, TurboModules, and JSI**.
- You possess "full-stack" profiling capabilities, with the proven ability to debug the entire stack from a React component re-render down to specific **C++ JSI bindings** or native modules in **Swift/Objective-C** and **Kotlin/Java**.
- Your technical toolkit includes expert-level proficiency with native tooling, specifically **Xcode Instruments** and **Android Studio Profilers**, to identify main thread bottlenecks and memory leaks.
- You are proficient in advanced JS profiling using **React Native DevTools** and the Memory tab to analyze allocation timelines and detect JavaScript-based memory leaks.
- You approach engineering with a performance-first design mindset, knowing precisely when to use tools like **react-native-reanimated** and how to optimize feature-rich user interfaces.
- You have a history of establishing a culture of performance optimization, including setting performance budgets, integrating monitoring into CI/CD, and spearheading internal training programs.
- You are a strategic communicator and mentor, able to guide experienced engineers on complex debugging techniques and clearly explain architectural trade-offs to both technical and non-technical stakeholders.

## OUR OFFER
Zalando provides a range of benefits, here's an overview of what you can expect:
- Employee shares program
- 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando, 30% off Lounge by Zalando, discounts from external partners
- 2 paid volunteering days per year
- Hybrid working model with up to 60% remote per week
- Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
- 27 days of vacation a year to start for full-time employees
- Relocation assistance available (subject to prior agreement)
- Family services, including counseling and support
- Health and wellbeing options (including Wellhub, formerly Gympass)
- Mental health support and coaching available
- Development through training platform and biannual peer-to-peer review

The role focuses on solving complex full-stack engineering challenges, optimizing UI performance, and mentoring other engineers across Android, iOS, and Web platforms.

title: Senior ML Software Engineer / Lounge by Zalando (all genders)
description:
## THE ROLE AND THE TEAM
As a Senior Software / ML Engineer in the Assortment Optimization domain, you'll build the engineering backbone behind machine learning and optimization products that improve one of our most critical levers: buying decisions. Your work will help determine what we buy, how much we buy, and how we holistically optimize Lounge's assortment, with direct impact on key long-term business outcomes.

This is a highly engineering-driven role: the solutions you build must be scalable enough to handle a large volume of inbound articles and be reliable by design, because they influence some of the most important commercial decisions in Lounge. You'll focus on production-grade systems with robust pipelines, strong observability, and operational excellence.

Algorithmic-driven buying in Lounge is still a green field: new decision products to invent, foundational capabilities to build, and a direct opportunity to shape the direction of the domain while delivering outsized impact early.

You'll work closely with Applied Scientists, Software Engineers, Product, and commercial stakeholders to deliver decision-support solutions that are actionable, explainable, well evaluated, and production-ready.

## INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN
If you think you have what it takes, we encourage you to apply even if you don't meet every single requirement. You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!

## WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)
- Build and operate **production-grade ML/optimization systems** that support buying decisions (e.g., quantity recommendations, assortment selection, budget allocation).
- Develop **scalable and performant data and ML pipelines** (batch and/or near-real-time where needed), ensuring reliability, observability, and cost-efficiency.
- Own **operational excellence**: CI/CD, testing strategies, code quality, reproducibility, monitoring, alerting, and incident-friendly runbooks.
- Enable **fast experimentation** for Applied Scientists by providing robust tooling and clean interfaces for training, evaluation, and deployment.
- Partner end-to-end with scientists and stakeholders to translate business constraints into reliable software components integrated into daily buying workflows.
- Build **dashboards and operational visibility** so teams can trust, understand, and continuously improve decision systems in production.

## WE'D LOVE TO MEET IF YOU
- You have **3+ years of experience** building and running data/ML systems in production (ML platform, MLOps, data engineering, or ML-heavy backend).
- You write **production-quality Python** (clean architecture, tests) and follow software delivery best practices (code reviews, CI/CD).
- You're strong in **software engineering fundamentals**: reliability, scalability, observability, and maintainable system design.
- You have hands-on experience with modern data/ML tooling such as **Databricks/Spark, MLflow, Airflow/DBT, feature pipelines**, or similar.
- You're comfortable with cloud and infrastructure concepts (e.g., **AWS, Kubernetes, containers**).
- You communicate clearly with both technical and non-technical stakeholders and enjoy turning ambiguous problems into dependable systems.

## WHY THIS ROLE
- Your systems will power core buying decisions with high visibility and measurable commercial outcomes.
- You’ll have end-to-end ownership from enabling experimentation to production deployment and monitoring.
- You’ll collaborate in a strong cross-functional environment with Applied Scientists and Engineers to build scalable tools that support decision making in a domain with plenty of room to innovate.

Lounge by Zalando is an online outlet for fashion and lifestyle products in 20+ European countries. We offer our members daily, time-limited sale campaigns with discounts of up to 75% off the recommended retail price. Working with our brand partners, we're pioneering innovative supply-chain and production processes and offer them an impactful and smart solution, creating a new way to shop for fashion - and a new way to sell it.

## About Tradebyte
At Tradebyte, we work with the biggest players in e-commerce - from trendsetting fashion brands to major online retailers. Our goal is to create a workplace where everyone feels valued, supported, and empowered.

We offer flexible work schedules, professional development opportunities, and a real commitment to work-life balance. We embrace diverse perspectives and ensure that every voice is heard and respected, because you’re unique and that matters to us.

As we continue to grow, we’re looking for new colleagues who share our passion. Love what you do - do what you love. Join Tradebyte, an independent company within the Zalando Group!

## The Role and the Team
As our **Engineering Manager for the Data Enablement Team**, you are a player-coach. Your mission is to lead a high-caliber team of Data Engineers in building our **Centralized Data Lakehouse** from the ground up. We are moving away from fragmented data silos towards a unified, high-quality Data Product architecture.

You will be the driving force behind our technical execution. While you lead the team, you aren't afraid to dive into the architecture or review complex Spark jobs. You ensure that our platform is not just a theoretical concept but a high-performance engine that delivers reliable insights. You will also ensure that we are perfectly integrated into the Zalando ecosystem, maintaining a lean and efficient exchange with their Data Foundation.

## What We’d Love You to Do (and Love Doing)
- **Hands-on Leadership:** You lead, mentor, and hire a team of Data Engineers. You are a "maker" at heart who leads by example, promoting **trunk-based development** and high engineering standards.
- **Platform Execution:** You own the delivery of our Data Roadmap. You ensure the successful rollout of our **Medallion architecture** on **Databricks** and **AWS**.
- **Operational Excellence:** You focus on the "run" as much as the "build." You drive initiatives to optimize storage costs and implement automated data retention policies.
- **Ecosystem Integration:** You ensure Tradebyte’s data strategy aligns with the broader Zalando Group standards while maintaining our speed and independence.
- **Data Contracts & Quality:** You work with source system owners (e.g., TB.One) to ensure robust **Data Contracts** and end-to-end reliability from ingestion to the Gold layer.
- **Technical Governance:** You oversee the **Unity Catalog** implementation, ensuring security and governance are "built-in" features, not afterthoughts.

## We’d Love to Meet You If
- **The "Maker" Mindset:** You have a strong background in Data Engineering and have transitioned into leadership without losing your technical edge. You can still hold your own in a deep-dive technical discussion about **Spark optimization** or **Terraform**.
- **Courageous Leadership:** You have the confidence to challenge the status quo. If a process is inefficient or a technical direction is flawed, you speak up. You prioritize building the *right* solution over the *easy* one.
- **Experience with Scale:** You’ve built or managed modern Lakehouse architectures (**Databricks/AWS**) and know how to move from PoC to a stable production environment.
- **Pragmatic Problem Solver:** You prioritize results over perfect slides. You know how to balance long-term architecture with the need for quick wins (like reducing cloud spend).
- **Clear Communicator:** You can translate technical challenges into actionable steps for the team and provide clear updates to internal stakeholders.
- **Zalando Group Context:** Experience in navigating quickly a large group ecosystem is a significant plus.

## Our Offer
Tradebyte provides a range of benefits, here’s an overview of what you can expect:
- Employee shares program
- 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando, 30% off Lounge by Zalando, discounts from external partners
- 2 paid volunteering days a year
- Hybrid working model - work where it works for you within Germany or the UK, with occasional office attendance required for moments that matter.
- Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
- 27 days of holiday a year to start for full-time employees (+1 day for every calendar year up to 30 days)
- Relocation assistance available (subject to prior agreement)
- Family services, including counseling and support
- Health and wellbeing options (including Wellhub, formerly Gympass)
- Mental health support and coaching available
- Drive your development with our training offerings and biannual peer-to-peer review
summary: Tradebyte is seeking a player-coach Engineering Manager for its Data Enablement Team to lead Data Engineers in building a Centralized Data Lakehouse. The role requires a blend of technical expertise in Databricks and AWS with leadership skills to manage the delivery of the data roadmap and technical governance.
benefits: 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando
Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
27 days of holiday a year (increasing up to 30 days)

title: System Engineering Manager - Lead SAP Analytics (all genders)
description:
## THE ROLE & THE TEAM

As the **SAP Analytics Team Lead**, you will be the strategic orchestrator behind Zalando’s financial and operational insights. You will lead a highly stable and talented team of 10 SAP Analytics Consultants who form the intelligence backbone of our ERP landscape.

In this role, you will take ownership of the end-to-end SAP Analytics lifecycle, ensuring the delivery of reliable, scalable, and audit-ready data products that empower our senior business stakeholders. You will drive the architectural vision and strategy across **SAP BW/4HANA**, **SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)**, and **SAP Datasphere**, while establishing and maintaining a mature, service-oriented operating model. As a leader, your focus will be on mentoring your team, optimizing platform performance and governance, and bridging the gap between complex engineering capabilities and strategic business value in a modern, **multi-cloud environment**.

## INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN

If you think you have what it takes, we encourage you to apply even if you don't meet every single requirement. You may just be the right candidate for this or other roles!

At Zalando, our vision is to be the leading pan-European ecosystem for fashion and lifestyle e-commerce – one that thrives on diversity and is truly inclusive by design. We believe that diverse teams fuel innovation and creativity, and we actively seek out talent from all backgrounds.

We actively seek to reduce bias in our hiring and employment processes, focusing on your qualifications, skills, and contributions. To support this, we kindly ask that you refrain from including personal details such as your photo, age, or marital status in your CV, ensuring a fair and equitable evaluation based solely on your abilities and potential.

We are committed to providing an exceptional and accessible candidate experience for everyone. If you require any accommodations to support you throughout the hiring process, please let us know – we are here to assist you.

## WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)

- **Drive the Cloud Analytics Strategy**: Lead the migration of our SAP Analytics landscape to the **SAP Business Data Cloud (BDC)**. Accelerate the enterprise-wide adoption of **SAP Datasphere** and **SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)**.
- **Transform Tech into Service**: Evolve the Analytics team into a mature, resilient service organization. Implement rigorous capacity management and clear service interfaces to ensure high-quality, predictable delivery.
- **Ensure Governance & Efficiency**: Optimize platform total cost of ownership (TCO) via tiered storage and HANA licensing models. Enforce robust data security (**DACs, Row-Level Security**) to guarantee strict audit readiness (e.g., **BaFin, CSRD**).
- **Lead & Elevate Talent**: Mentor, coach, and empower a high-performing engineering team. Champion aggressive upskilling for the multi-cloud era while fostering a culture of continuous learning and ownership.
- **Bridge Tech and Business**: Act as a strategic partner to senior stakeholders across Finance, HR, and Operations. Translate complex technical data architectures into clear business value.

## WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF

- You possess a proven track record (**5+ years**) in driving enterprise-scale data strategies, with deep architectural expertise in **SAP BW/4HANA**, **SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC)**, and **SAP Datasphere/Business Data Cloud**.
- You bring at least **3-4 years** of experience as a passionate people leader, adept at mentoring technical talent, structuring roles, and cultivating a high-performing, psychologically safe environment.
- You have successfully guided engineering teams through significant operational shifts, transforming traditional delivery models into structured, resilient Service Organizations (leveraging capacity management, **SLAs**, or **ITIL/KMM principles**).
- You are experienced in orchestrating complex cloud migrations and driving platform efficiency, including implementing tiered storage and optimizing **HANA database licensing**.
- You have a strong command of enterprise data governance, ensuring strict audit readiness and implementing robust security frameworks (e.g., **Row-Level Security**, **Data Access Controls**) to meet financial and regulatory compliance (like **BaFin** or **CSRD**).
- You are an exceptional communicator and strategic thinker who can seamlessly bridge the gap between deep technical implementation and senior business stakeholder requirements (across Finance, HR, etc.), translating complex logic into compelling, actionable narratives.
- **Nice to have**: Experience architecting hybrid data environments (e.g., integrating SAP with **Snowflake** or **Databricks**) and familiarity with **Agile/Scrum methodologies** in an SAP context.

## OUR OFFER

Zalando provides a range of benefits, here’s an overview of what you can expect:

- 27 days of holiday a year to start for full-time employees
- 2 paid volunteering days a year
- Hybrid working model with up to 60% remote per week
- Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
- Employee shares program
- 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando, 30% off Lounge by Zalando, discounts from external partners
- Relocation assistance available (subject to prior agreement)
- Family services, including counseling and support
- Health and wellbeing options (including Wellhub, formerly Gympass)
- Mental health support and coaching available
- Development through training platform and biannual peer-to-peer review
summary: Zalando is seeking a System Engineering Manager to lead a team of 10 SAP Analytics Consultants. The role focuses on driving the cloud analytics strategy, migrating to SAP Business Data Cloud, and managing high-level data governance and architectural vision for senior stakeholders.
benefits: Work from abroad up to 30 working days a year
40% off Zalando fashion and beauty products

title: Werkstudent Softwareentwicklung (m/w/d)
description:
## Role Overview
Do you want to build productive software rather than working on practice projects? At **CHECK24**, we are a market leader and a dynamic start-up in one. We work in agile teams, make fast decisions, and maintain flat hierarchies. By using the latest tools, technologies, and **AI tools in everyday development**, we drive data-driven innovations to improve the user experience for over 20 million customers across more than 50 products.

At the **Dortmund** location, we are developing **CHECK24 Steuer**, an innovative FinTech product aimed at fundamentally simplifying tax returns in Germany. We combine technological excellence with high product speed, utilizing mandatory Pull Requests, clear testing strategies, and regular architecture reviews.

As a **Working Student in Software Development (m/f/d)** at Verbraucherportal Deutschland GmbH (a subsidiary of the CHECK24 Group), you will join a high-performance engineering team and develop software that goes live immediately and is used by many users. You will learn how to create professional systems that remain stable, performant, and maintainable under real-world load.

## What You Will Do
- Develop productive features that go live and are used by millions of users, learning how software is created and operated under real conditions.
- Work on real technical challenges involving scalability, performance, and functional complexity.
- Actively participate in **Code Reviews**, **Pull Requests**, as well as architecture and concept reviews to learn modern engineering standards.
- Support the implementation of **Testing Strategies** (Unit, End-to-End, and System tests) and develop an understanding of high-quality software.
- Gain insights into modern web architectures (e.g., **.NET, React, MySQL, Docker, CI/CD**) and build a comprehensive Full-Stack understanding.
- Use modern tools, including **AI-supported development**, within professional software engineering.
- Gradually take over responsibility for your own features or defined modules, guided by experienced developers.
- Learn how data-driven product development works—from prioritization and technical implementation to Go-Live.

## Requirements
- Ongoing studies in **Computer Science, Media Informatics, Business Informatics**, or a comparable course of study.
- Strong analytical thinking and a great willingness to learn when dealing with complex technical questions.
- Good programming skills that you wish to expand (e.g., through university projects, internships, or personal software projects).
- Proficiency in at least one programming language and the ability to quickly learn new technologies.
- Interest in understanding how to develop scalable, maintainable, and cleanly structured software.
- Motivation to develop professionally and actively take on responsibility.
- Initial exposure to **Clean Code, Software Architecture, or Testing** is an advantage, though a willingness to learn these intensively is more important.
- **Very good German language skills (at least C1 level)**.

## Benefits
- **Start-up Flair with Security**: Stability of a large company (20+ years in the market) combined with the flexibility of a dynamic start-up.
- **Ownership**: Room for initiative and the opportunity to have a direct influence on the success of CHECK24.
- **Personal Growth**: Individual technical and personal training opportunities, with perspectives for specialist and leadership careers.
- **Team Spirit**: Social activities including Kicker, Xbox gaming, dart tournaments, and numerous events.
- **Work Environment**: Relaxed "Du-culture," free drinks, fruit, muesli, and CHECKito lunches.
- **Perks**: Vouchers for various CHECK24 products and a subsidized company pension scheme.
- **Location & Mobility**: Office in the heart of Dortmund with excellent transport links, subsidized job ticket, and a bike-leasing program.
summary: CHECK24 is seeking a Working Student for Software Development to join their FinTech team in Dortmund working on the CHECK24 Steuer product. The role involves developing production-ready full-stack features using .NET, React, and AI-supported tools while learning professional engineering standards in an agile environment.
benefits: Career perspectives in specialist and leadership paths

title: Lead Software Engineer (m/w/d) – Search & GenAI
description:
## Company Overview
CHECK24 is the leading comparison portal, combining the strengths of a market leader with the dynamism of a startup. They operate in agile teams with fast decision-making processes and flat hierarchies.

## Role Overview
**CHECK24 Search & Product Discovery** is currently transforming its entire engine. The team, known as the **AI Forge**, is implementing **Agentic Search and GPU-optimized inference** to provide 20 million customers with a completely new experience. This is a role for a **Lead Software Engineer (m/w/d)** at **CHECK24 AI Forge GmbH**.

## What You Will Do
- **Fullstack Leadership**: Take responsibility for the architecture, from a high-performance frontend to a scalable search API.
- **Search-Stack Evolution**: Continuously develop the existing technology stack using **React, Golang, Python, and PHP**, and quickly bring new solutions into production.
- **Agentic Search & AI**: Directly integrate **Large Language Models (LLMs)** and intelligent agents into the user guidance.
- **Tech Evolution**: Evaluate new technologies, frameworks, and tools, and select appropriate solutions for further developing the system landscape.
- **Strategic Interface**: Work closely with specialized teams and the CTO to create a modern technological basis for Product Discovery.
- **Direct Impact**: Benefit from fast decision-making paths, high personal responsibility, and direct implementation of technical solutions without corporate bureaucracy.

## Requirements
- **Engineering Excellence**: Profound knowledge in the development of frontend and backend systems and a mindset geared towards scalable architectures.
- **High-Performance Drive**: A commitment to not just making systems work, but optimizing them. Proficiency in extracting maximum performance from **Bare Metal** or orchestrating high-performance cloud infrastructure via **Terraform** and **AWS**.
- **Leadership Potential**: Ability to securely set technical priorities and the ambition to eventually take over responsibility for a team.
- **Mindset**: Openness to new approaches and motivation to question and further develop existing architectures.
- **Language Skills**: Very good German language skills and good English skills (**C1/C2**).

## Benefits and Perks

### Development and Responsibility
- Fast career advancement opportunities.
- Full ownership over topics: bring in ideas, try new things, and take responsibility for real impact.
- Internal training by specialized coaches and an annual budget for external continuing education.

### Team Spirit and Modern Workspace
- Strong team culture including shared lunches, kickers, after-work meetings, and regular company/team events.
- Modern office with high-quality equipment, including **MacBooks** and height-adjustable desks.

### Flexibility and Balance
- Flexible working models adapted to your life situation.
- Free **Deutschlandticket** or a subsidized company bicycle.
- Free fresh lunch twice a week.
- Internal sports courses or subsidized external sports offers (e.g., **EGYM Wellpass**).
summary: Check24 is seeking a Lead Software Engineer for their AI Forge team to lead the architectural transformation of their search engine using Agentic Search and GPU-optimized inference. The role involves fullstack leadership across React, Golang, Python, and PHP, with a heavy focus on scalability and high-performance infrastructure.

title: Teamleiter (m/w/d) Fullstack Softwareentwicklung - AI Forge
description:
## Role Overview

CHECK24 is Germany's leading comparison portal. In the **AI Forge**, scalable software and AI solutions are developed and deployed productively within CHECK24 products—ranging from classic fullstack systems and automation solutions to machine-learning and LLM-based applications.

As a **Team Leader (m/f/d) Fullstack Software Development AI Forge**, you assume technical and disciplinary responsibility for an engineering team while remaining hands-on with productive code. You are responsible for architecture, code quality, and the stable operation of services, developing robust, scalable systems with a clear focus on productive use.

This role combines **active software development** with **technical leadership** and is aimed at **experienced developers (m/f/d)** who already hold **leadership responsibility in a team**—either technically or disciplinarily—and wish to continue developing actively.

## What You Will Do

- **Technical Leadership:** Lead the fullstack team as an active developer, taking responsibility for architecture, code quality, and the stable operation of services.
- **AI Engineering:** Develop scalable, cross-product AI solutions with your team, from the integration of modern ML and LLM technologies to the rollout in CHECK24 products.
- **Infrastructure & DevOps:** Ensure systems run performantly, securely, and reliably, whether in the cloud or on-premise. This includes CI/CD, monitoring, and infrastructure automation.
- **Interface Design:** Collaborate closely with Product Management and Data Science to further develop and technically implement requirements to make AI features usable across CHECK24.
- **Team Development & Culture:** Professionally develop your team, provide regular feedback, and promote knowledge exchange through pairing, code reviews, and coaching.
- **Technological Advancement:** Identify new approaches, tools, and technologies, evaluate their potential for CHECK24, and successfully bring new solutions live.

## Requirements

- **Education:** A completed degree in Computer Science or a comparable technical field—ideally with good or very good grades.
- **Leadership & Hands-On Leadership:** Experience in technical or disciplinary leadership of engineering teams, while simultaneously working actively in software development.
- **Programming Know-how:** Deep knowledge of at least one common programming language (e.g., **Java, Python, C#, Go, or JavaScript/TypeScript**) and experience writing productive code across the entire process from architecture to deployment.
- **DevOps & Infrastructure:** Proficiency in the automation, setup, and operation of infrastructure (on-premise or cloud), including **CI/CD, Monitoring, and Security**.
- **AI Engineering:** Ideally, experience with **Machine Learning and LLM-based applications** and their integration into productive systems.
- **Communication & Interface Work:** Ability to coordinate with Product Management and Data Science and translate technical and functional requirements effectively.
- **Team Spirit & Drive:** High initiative, sense of responsibility, and enjoyment of an open, high-performance work environment.
- **Language Skills:** Very good German skills (**C1/C2**) and good English skills (international team setting).

## Benefits

**Development and Responsibility**
- Fast promotion opportunities and talent development.
- Ownership of topics: bring in your own ideas and take responsibility for real impact.
- Internal training via specialized coaches and an annual budget for external further education.

**Team Spirit and Modern Workspace**
- Team activities: joint lunches, kicker, after-work meetings, and regular company/team events.
- Modern office equipment: high-quality hardware such as MacBooks and height-adjustable desks.

**Flexibility and Balance**
- Flexible working models adapted to your life situation.
- Free Deutschlandticket or subsidized company bicycle.
- Free fresh lunch twice a week.
- Internal sports courses or subsidized external sports offers (e.g., EGYM Wellpass).
summary: Check24 is seeking a hands-on Team Lead for Fullstack Software Development within their AI Forge unit. The role requires a blend of technical leadership and active coding to build scalable AI, ML, and LLM-based applications while managing an engineering team.
benefits: Annual budget for external further education

title: (Senior) Fullstack Software Engineer (m/w/d) – Kreditkarte
description:
## Company Overview
We are **CHECK24** – the leading comparison portal in Germany with 20 million customers and over 50 comparison products. In our credit card team, we face real technical complexity: numerous banks, a variety of credit card products, and very different technical requirements. Our task is to translate this complexity into a simple, fast, and completely digital comparison experience for our customers.

To achieve this, we connect numerous banks, process large amounts of data, and develop scalable application paths. Using AI-supported comparisons, we help our customers choose the optimal credit card – based on a distributed microservice architecture that enables paperless instant applications.

To strengthen our international team at **CHECK24 Vergleichsportal Karten & Konten GmbH**, we are looking for a **(Senior) Fullstack Software Engineer (m/f/d)**. Take responsibility for architecture and product direction, work in an open team with a feedback culture, and use modern tools – including AI-supported development – to work on practical solutions with real added value.

## What You Will Do
- Conceive and develop innovative services for our credit card comparison platform
- Take responsibility for the entire software lifecycle: from design and implementation to deployment and monitoring
- Work across the entire tech stack – from the frontend (**React**) via the backend (**Spring Boot**) to databases (**PostgreSQL**, **MongoDB**) and platform components (e.g., **MCP-Server**)
- Integrate complex third-party systems, including banks and communication service providers
- Translate functional requirements together with Product Owners into sustainable technical solutions
- Support your colleagues through constructive code reviews, establishment of best practices, and active knowledge exchange

## Requirements
- Completed degree in **Computer Science**, Natural Sciences, or a comparable technical course of study
- At least **five years of professional experience** in software development, ideally in agile development environments
- Sound expertise in the development of **Spring Boot microservices** as well as modern **React frontends**
- Very good knowledge of **CI/CD pipelines** and experience with **Git**, **Maven**, **Jenkins**, and **Docker**
- Deep understanding of software architecture and confident use of **Clean Code** principles
- Enthusiasm for new technologies, a strong hands-on mentality, and a high sense of responsibility beyond the pure code commit
- Very good English skills (at least **C1**) as well as confident German skills (at least **B2**) in spoken and written form

## Benefits
- **Start-Up Flair with Security**: Stable and growing tech company with more than 20 years of success; permanent full-time employment combining large company security with start-up flexibility
- **Rewards**: Permanent employment contract, annual bonus payments for outstanding performance, exclusive vouchers for CHECK24 products, and special conditions in partner gyms
- **Professional Development**: Personal further education budget for conferences, specialist literature, or online courses
- **CHECKito Spirit**: Team events, drink-outs, summer and Christmas parties, table football, and after-work get-togethers
- **Food & Drinks**: Free fresh lunch three times a week, a selection of drinks, and regional fruit
- **Sustainable Commuting**: Free Deutschlandticket or a subsidized company bicycle; centrally located office at Donnersbergerbrücke
summary: Check24 is seeking a (Senior) Fullstack Software Engineer for their Credit Card team to develop scalable microservices and React frontends. The role involves managing the full software lifecycle and integrating complex banking systems within an agile, international environment.

title: (Junior) Produktmanager (m/w/d) AI-Produkte – Kreditvergleich
description:
## Role Overview
Du willst nicht nur Tickets abarbeiten, sondern echten Impact schaffen? In unserem **KAI-Team (Kredite Artificial Intelligence)** baust Du die Brücke zwischen modernster Data Science und Millionen von Kunden, die mit uns täglich den für sie besten Kredit finden. Tools wie **Claude, Cursor, ChatGPT & Co.** sind Deine täglichen Begleiter.

Unsere Modelle lösen regelbasierte Logiken ab, durchdringen den gesamten Kreditvergleich und sind das Rückgrat unserer smarten Kundenfeatures – wir nutzen etabliertes **Machine Learning, LLMs und generative AI**, um den Kreditvergleich noch intelligenter zu machen.

Du musst kein Finanzexperte sein – wir suchen Menschen, die komplexe Technologie einfach und erlebbar machen wollen.

Als **Produktmanager (m/w/d) für AI-Produkte - Kreditvergleich** verantwortest Du gemeinsam mit dem Product-Owner und einem agilen, interdisziplinären Feature-Team (Data Scientists, Data Engineers, Backend-Entwickler) eine Vielzahl an ML-Modellen. Du bist die treibende Kraft, die aus Modellergebnissen Produkte macht, die Kunden lieben.

## What You Will Do
- **Ownership für AI-Features:** Du konzipierst, priorisierst und steuerst die Entwicklung von ML- und LLM-basierten Features – von der Idee über das Experiment bis zum Rollout
- **A/B-Testing & datengetriebene Entscheidungen:** Du designst Experimente, analysierst Ergebnisse und triffst fundierte Go/No-Go-Entscheidungen auf Basis unserer hauseigenen Experimentierplattform
- **Stakeholder-Kommunikation:** Du übersetzt komplexe ML-Konzepte (Modellperformance, Feature-Importance, Konfidenzintervalle) in klare Business-Sprache für Geschäftsführung und Fachbereiche
- **Roadmap & Priorisierung:** Du entwickelst die Produkt-Roadmap für deine Features auf Basis von Business-Impact, technischer Machbarkeit und Kundennutzen
- **Cross-funktionale Zusammenarbeit:** Du arbeitest eng mit Data Scientists, ML-Engineers und unseren Kreditberatern zusammen, um Modelle in echte Kundenprodukte zu überführen
- **Innovation & GenAI:** Du evaluierst neue Technologien (z. B. LLMs und Agentic Workflows) und identifizierst Möglichkeiten, den Kreditvergleich durch generative AI zu verbessern

## Requirements
- Erfolgreich abgeschlossenes Studium in **Wirtschaftsinformatik, Data Science, Informatik, Wirtschaftswissenschaften** oder einem vergleichbaren Bereich
- Erste Erfahrung im **Produktmanagement**, idealerweise im Umfeld von Data-Science-, ML- oder AI-Produkten
- Technisches Verständnis für **ML-Pipelines, Modellmetriken und datengetriebene Produktentwicklung**
- Erfahrung mit agilen Methoden und Tools wie **Jira, Confluence** oder vergleichbaren Anwendungen
- Analytische Fähigkeiten sowie einen sicheren Umgang mit Daten (z. B. **SQL-Grundkenntnisse** oder **KPI-Tracking**)
- Exzellente Kommunikationsfähigkeit (Übersetzung von Modell-Output wie Expected Revenue, Conversion-Impact, Funnel-KPIs in Geschäftswert)
- Sehr gute **Deutsch- (mind. C1)** und **Englischkenntnisse** in Wort und Schrift

## Nice-to-Haves
- Eigenständige Entwicklung von Prototypen mit generativen AI-Tools (z. B. **Lovable & Co.**)
- Kenntnisse in **Python, Jupyter-Notebooks** oder Cloud-Plattformen wie **AWS** oder **GCP**

## Benefits & Culture
- **Impact ab Tag 1:** Verantwortung für Produkte, die täglich von tausenden Kunden genutzt werden.
- **Cutting-Edge-Tech:** Arbeit mit produktionsreifen ML-Modellen und LLM-Anwendungen.
- **Stabilität & Startup-Spirit:** Gründergeführtes Unternehmen mit autonomen Teams und wenig Bürokratie.
- **Wir bringen Dich voran:** Individuelle Entwicklungspläne, maßgeschneiderte PM-Trainings (IT-Skills, UX, Prozessoptimierung) und regelmäßiges Feedback.
- **CHECKito Spirit:** Lockeres Office-Umfeld, Duz-Kultur, kein Dresscode, Firmen- & Teamevents.
- **Wir schätzen Deinen Einsatz:** Unbefristeter Vertrag, wettbewerbsfähiges Gehalt, jährliche Leistungsprämien, bezuschusste betriebliche Altersvorsorge und kostenloses Deutschlandticket.
- **Food & Drinks:** Kostenfreie Getränke, Müsli, frisches Obst und viermal wöchentlich Mittagessen.
- **Gutscheine:** Gutscheine für zahlreiche CHECK24 Produkte.
- **Wellbeing:** Firmenfitness inhouse oder extern (z.B. EGYM Wellpass).
summary: Check24 is looking for a (Junior) Product Manager for AI products within their loan comparison team (KAI). The role involves managing the development of ML and LLM-based features, conducting A/B testing, and translating complex data science metrics into business value for stakeholders.
benefits: Kostenfreie Getränke, Müsli und frisches Obst

title: Automation Engineer (m/w/d)
description:
## Role Overview
To make HR processes efficient, scalable, and future-proof, we focus on the consistent digitalization and automation of internal services and applications. The custom development of modern web applications and integration with cloud applications is a central part of our work to enable agile action.

To automate recurring tasks, including those in the applicant and employee lifecycle, we integrate and orchestrate various cloud-based applications via web-based interfaces. You will be responsible not only for the development of full-stack applications but also for operating your applications independently and reliably using modern DevOps and GitOps tools.

If you love using software to make your colleagues' work more efficient and pleasant, we look forward to your application as an **Automation Engineer (m/w/d)** at **CHECK24 Services Personal GmbH**.

## What You Will Do
- Develop interfaces for communication with internal and external services/cloud applications such as **Workday** or **SmartRecruiters**.
- Provide services (e.g., for feedback processes) for central use by other employees.
- Maintain and develop relevant components for **monitoring and alerting** to keep a constant eye on the status of our services.
- Support other teams in the implementation of technical and functional projects, as well as in the monitoring and analysis of applications to ensure the best results for our employees.

## Requirements
- Very good knowledge of web application software development with **Python** (**Django** as backend) and **React/Typescript** (frontend).
- Experience in using and providing **HTTP REST APIs**.
- Proficiency in handling databases (e.g., **MySQL**) is a plus.
- Interest/experience in **Git/DevOps tools** such as **Ansible** and **Docker**.
- Business fluent German skills (**at least C1**); English skills are an advantage.

## Benefits

### Individual Development and Further Education
- Talent recognition and promotion based on performance and impact.
- Internal training by specialized HR development coaches.
- Annual budget for external further education.

### Team Spirit and High-Tech Workspace
- Modern open space office with company and team events.
- Free lunch three times a week.
- High-quality equipment, including **MacBooks** and height-adjustable desks.

### Flexibility and Mobility
- Up to **38 vacation days**.
- Flexible working models adaptable to individual life situations.
- Company-funded **Deutschlandticket**.
- Subsidized company bike leasing.

### Diverse Sports Offer
- Internal sports courses.
- Subsidized external sports offers.
summary: Check24 is looking for an Automation Engineer to develop full-stack web applications and integrate cloud services (like Workday and SmartRecruiters) to optimize HR processes. - **Customer Focus:** Use data analysis and AI to understand customer needs and develop digital products and services with real added value.

- **Education:** Excellent Master's degree, preferably with a technical, scientific, or engineering focus (specifically: Physics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Business Informatics, or Industrial Engineering).

- **Technical Interest:** Passion for innovative technologies, particularly AI. Affinity for Prompt Engineering, Feature Design, and development with modern AI tools such as **Lovable, Bolt, or Cursor**.

- **Digital Product Development:** Learn all aspects of digital product development and implement your concepts in small, agile teams at the interface of IT, Data Science, and Design.
- **Artificial Intelligence:** You will learn the use of Large Language Models, Machine Learning Pipelines, and Prompt Engineering and build features with visible impact.

- Excellent **Master's degree**, preferably with a technical, scientific, or engineering focus (especially Physics, Mathematics, Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, Business Informatics, or Industrial Engineering).

- Passion for innovative technologies and a strong technical interest—especially in the field of **Artificial Intelligence**. Affinity for topics such as **Prompt Engineering, Feature Design**, and development with modern AI tools like **Lovable, Bolt, or Cursor**.

- Your effort pays off – we promote your talent and offer fast promotion opportunities.

title: Junior Fullstack Entwickler (m/w/d) Java/React InsurTech
description:
## Dein Einstieg bei CHECK24 – Entwickle Software, die den Unterschied macht

CHECK24 steht für den **besten Versicherungsvergleich Deutschlands** – einfach, fair und 100 % transparent. Millionen Kund:innen nutzen täglich unsere Plattform. Damit das so bleibt, entwickeln wir moderne, leistungsstarke Softwarelösungen mit aktuellen Technologien.

Du hast Dein Studium abgeschlossen und willst **praxisnah Software entwickeln**, Verantwortung übernehmen und mit einem erfahrenen Team wachsen? Dann starte jetzt Deine Karriere als **Junior Fullstack Entwickler (m/w/d)** bei der **CHECK24 Vergleichsportal für Kfz-Versicherungen GmbH**.

## Was du tun wirst

- **Produktnahe Entwicklung**: Umsetzung fachlicher Anforderungen und Features für unsere Kfz-Versicherungsplattform in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Produktmanagement und erfahrenen Entwicklern
- **Fullstack-Entwicklung**: Entwicklung und Erweiterung von Funktionen im Frontend (**React, TypeScript**) und Backend (**Java, Spring Boot**) inklusive **REST-APIs** und Datenbankanbindung
- **Qualität & Engineering-Basics**: Sicherstellung von Code-Qualität durch **Code Reviews**, automatisierte Tests und Mitarbeit an **CI/CD-Pipelines**
- **User Experience & Performance**: Mitwirkung an der Entwicklung moderner, performanter und nutzerfreundlicher Weboberflächen

## Anforderungen

- **Studium**: Ein abgeschlossenes Studium der Informatik, Wirtschaftsinformatik oder Vergleichbares mit sehr guten Ergebnissen
- **Erfahrung**: Du hast durch Praktika oder Werkstudententätigkeiten bereits Erfahrung in der Softwareentwicklung gesammelt
- **Technologische Kompetenz**: Erste Kenntnisse in **Java** und **TypeScript/JavaScript** sowie im Umgang mit relationalen Datenbanken (z. B. **MySQL**)
- **Framework-Know-how**: Erste Praktische Erfahrung mit **Spring Boot** oder **React**
- **Arbeitsweise**: Analytisches Denken, Eigeninitiative und Bereitschaft und Neues zu lernen
- **Team & Kommunikation**: Sehr gute Deutschkenntnisse (**C1**), Kommunikationsstärke und ausgeprägter Teamgeist für eine reibungslose Zusammenarbeit

## Benefits

- **Start-Up Flair**: Sicherheit eines etablierten Online-Unternehmens, langfristige Planung, aktive Mitgestaltung des Versicherungsbereichs, flache Hierarchien, anspruchsvolle Aufgaben mit Gestaltungsspielraum und direkte Kommunikationswege zur Geschäftsführung
- **Persönliches Wachstum & Weiterbildungsmöglichkeiten**: Auf die IT spezialisierte Karriereentwicklung sowie diverse IT Weiterbildungsprogramme
- **Ausstattung**: Ergonomischer Arbeitsplatz mit modernem Equipment (z.B. leistungsstarkem MacBook Pro, zusätzlichen Bildschirmen), höhenverstellbarem Tisch sowie optional ergonomische Maus oder Noise-Cancelling-Kopfhörer
- **Attraktives Gehaltspaket**: Attraktive Gutscheine für CHECK24-Produkte, Unterstützung bei der betrieblichen Altersvorsorge und Kostenbeteiligung am EGYM Wellpass
- **Work-Life-Balance**: Präsenzpflicht von Montag bis Donnerstag, mobiles Arbeiten am Freitag, 28 Tage Urlaub plus bis zu 10 Tage unbezahlter Urlaub
- **Food & Drinks**: Kostenfreies Frühstück (Müslisorten), kostenfreier Office-Lunch, frisches Obst, Heiß- und Kaltgetränke
- **CHECKito Spirit**: Lockeres Arbeitsumfeld mit Duz-Kultur, kein Dresscode, regelmäßige Drink-Outs und Team-Events
summary: CHECK24 is seeking a Junior Fullstack Developer for their vehicle insurance comparison portal in Munich. The role involves developing features using Java, Spring Boot, React, and TypeScript, while focusing on code quality through CI/CD and automated testing.
benefits: Free fruit, hot and cold drinks

title: (Junior) Data Scientist (m/w/d) – Fokus auf Recommender Systems und Ranking-Probleme Mietwagen
description:
## Company Overview

**CHECK24** is the leading comparison portal, combining the characteristics of a market leader with the dynamism of a startup. Working in agile teams with flat hierarchies, they utilize modern tools, technologies, and state-of-the-art AI methods to drive data-driven innovations for over 20 million customers across 50+ products.

The **CHECK24 Mietwagenvergleich** (car rental comparison) is the market leader and test winner by Stiftung Warentest. Based in Augsburg since 2016, they help customers find the best car rentals at the best prices.

## Role: (Junior) Data Scientist (m/w/d) – Focus on Recommender Systems and Ranking Problems

### What You Will Do

- **Development and Operation of Recommender and Ranking Systems**: Develop and improve productive ranking and recommendation models that directly impact the car rental product, providing personalized and preference-based search results.
- **Analysis, Experiments, and Model Optimization**: Analyze data and model KPIs, conduct A/B tests, and iteratively develop models.
- **Productive Integration of Models**: Work with IT and product teams to integrate models into the existing system landscape via APIs and services.
- **Working with Modern Data Science and Engineering Tools**: Use Python, common ML libraries, Git, and Docker for reproducible development and operation.
- **Monitoring and Quality Assurance**: Monitor model performance to ensure reliable operation and continuous improvement of recommendation quality.

### Requirements

- **Drive and Motivation**: Passion for Data Science and Machine Learning, specifically Recommender Systems and Ranking problems, with a desire to take responsibility for high-impact models.
- **Experience in Data Science Application Development**: Practical experience in the full lifecycle of ML applications (data preparation, training, productive deployment). This includes building stable data and training pipelines and using ML frameworks such as **Scikit-learn, TensorFlow, or Keras**, ideally in the context of Ranking or Recommender systems (e.g., **Learn-to-Rank, Matrix Factorization**).
- **Technical Skills**: Very good **Python** skills for productive environments. Experience with data science libraries, software development basics, version control (**Git**), containerization (**Docker**), and **API development**. Knowledge of cloud infrastructures and databases is an advantage but not required.
- **Passion for AI Tools**: Openness to new technologies, including generative AI models (e.g., **GPT, Cursor AI**) for conception, implementation, and testing.
- **Analytical Mindset**: Ability to analyze complex issues structurally, identify relevant factors, and develop pragmatic, traceable solutions.
- **Interdisciplinary Mindset**: Ability to work at the intersection of Data Science, IT, and Product Management, and actively engage with the CHECK24 Data Science community.
- **Language Skills**: Business fluent German skills (written and spoken).

## Benefits

- **Location & Commute**: Central location at Augsburg Main Station (HELIO) with shopping, fitness, and cinema. Free **Deutschlandticket**, subsidized bike/eBike leasing, and free bike parking.
- **Flexibility**: Flexible working hours, 30+ days of vacation (based on performance), options for unpaid leave, sabbaticals, and international workations. Mobile work (Home Office) possible on Fridays.
- **Compensation & Security**: Permanent contracts, attractive remuneration with annual performance bonuses, and vouchers for CHECK24 products.
- **Health & Wellness**: Subsidized company pension scheme, EGYM Wellpass, back school, free sports offers, and a health-conscious office (bio/regional fruit, muesli, and free drinks).
- **Office Culture**: Modern office with kicker, table tennis, and free lunch provided 5x per week for the team.
- **Professional Growth**: Individual career promotion through internal/external training, regular feedback, personal coaching, and a dedicated training budget. Perspectives for both specialist and management paths.
- **Equipment**: High-performance laptop, dual monitors (or curved monitor), and optional ergonomic equipment (mouse, noise-cancelling headphones, height-adjustable desk).
- **Team Events**: Collaborative culture with office parties, summer and Christmas parties, and sports activities (football, bouldering, yoga).
summary: CHECK24 is seeking a (Junior) Data Scientist to develop and optimize Recommender and Ranking systems for their market-leading car rental comparison portal in Augsburg. The role involves the full ML lifecycle, from data analysis and A/B testing to productive integration via APIs using Python and Docker.
benefits: Central location at Augsburg Main Station
Free regional/bio drinks, muesli, and fruit

title: Backend Software Engineer (f/m/d)
description:
## About the opportunity

Contentful is building new foundational capabilities to enable customers to build personalized, AI-enhanced digital experiences at Enterprise scale. Our team’s mission is to enable digital teams across the world to quickly build the best digital experiences imaginable. We're only scratching the surface of our full potential and you have an opportunity to join us on the incredible journey ahead.

We are looking for a mid-level **Backend Software Engineer** to join the Entity Architecture team, who are building the systems enabling structured content to be connected, transformed and shaped for different digital experiences and platforms. This team is at the heart of our most important initiative, and are responsible for building the next-generation services that will power customer experiences for years to come - serving millions (if not billions) of customer requests a day.

You will join a high-performing, remote-first development team based in Europe. This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy deep technical work and want to see their ideas come to life in real-world product experiences. This is an incredible opportunity to join us at this exciting time and do meaningful, challenging work whilst growing your career.

## What to expect?

- Design and build core backend systems for dynamic content resolution and delivery
- Define and evolve APIs, schemas, and versioning strategies with long-term stability in mind, which can consistently cater to billions of requests every month.
- Solve complex engineering and Content Modelling problems, working across multiple layers and systems.
- Implement deterministic, cache-aware execution pipelines with strong performance guarantees
- Develop on our Platform with services like **AWS, CloudFlare, Docker, Kubernetes, and Terraform**.
- Own the system in production, including observability, debugging and operational reliability.
- Collaborate closely with product managers and other engineers to integrate with a high-performance ecosystem.

## What you need to be successful?

- Strong backend skills and knowledge of **system design, performance and maintainability**.
- Experience with owning/maintaining and improving complex, long-lived production systems.
- Experience with evolving APIs and data models used by other teams or customers.
- Product mindset with empathy for customers (content practitioners, marketers, and developers).
- Ability to work effectively in ambiguity and make sound technical tradeoffs.
- Strong teamwork skills, able to explain the reasoning behind your technical choices and be open to diverse opinions

## Bonus

- Familiarity with **TypeScript, GraphQL and serverless applications**.
- Familiarity with declarative systems, data transformation pipelines and cache-heavy architecture.
- Experience with content platforms, personalization, or similar systems.
- Familiarity with AI tooling and leveraging it in your daily work.

## What’s in it for you?

- Join an ambitious tech company reshaping the way people build digital experiences
- Full-time employees receive **Stock Options** for the opportunity to share in the success of our company
- Comprehensive healthcare package covering 100% of monthly health premiums for employees and 85% of costs for your dependents.
- Fertility and family building benefits, including a lifetime reimbursable wallet to support your growing family.
- We value **Work-Life balance** and **You Time**! A generous amount of paid time off, including vacation days, sick days, compassion days for loss, education days, and volunteer days
- **Company paid parental leave** to care for and focus on your growing family
- Use your personal annual education budget to improve your skills and grow in your career
- Enjoy a full range of virtual and in-person events, including workshops, guest speakers, and fun team activities, supporting learning and networking exchange beyond the usual work duties
- An annual wellbeing stipend to care for your physical, financial, or emotional health
- A monthly communication stipend and phone hardware upgrade reimbursement.
- New hire office equipment stipend for hybrid or distributed employees. Get the gear you need to work at your best.

## Who are we?

Contentful is a leading **digital experience platform** that helps modern businesses meet the growing demand for engaging, personalized content at scale. By blending composability with native **AI** capabilities, Contentful enables dynamic personalization, automated content delivery, and real-time experimentation, powering next-generation digital experiences across brands, regions, and channels for more than 4,200 organizations worldwide. More than **700 people** from more than **70 nations** contribute their energy and creativity to Contentful, working from hubs in Berlin, Denver, San Francisco, London, New York, and distributed worldwide.

## Everyone is welcome here!

**“Everyone is welcome here”** is a celebrated component of our culture. At Contentful, we strive to create an inclusive environment that empowers our employees. We believe that our products and services benefit from our diverse backgrounds and experiences, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applications will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, national origin, religion, sexual orientation, gender, gender identity, age, physical [dis]ability, or length of time spent unemployed. We invite you to apply and join us!

If you need reasonable accommodations at any point during the application or interview process, please let your recruiting coordinator know.
summary: Contentful is seeking a mid-level Backend Software Engineer for its Entity Architecture team to build scalable services for dynamic content resolution. The role involves designing high-performance APIs and backend systems using a modern cloud stack in a remote-first environment.
benefits: Comprehensive healthcare package (100% employee premiums, 85% dependents)
Fertility and family building benefits (lifetime reimbursable wallet)
Paid time off (vacation, sick, compassion, education, and volunteer days)
Virtual and in-person events (workshops, guest speakers, team activities)

title: Engineering Manager - Workflows (f/m/d)
description:
## About the Opportunity
We are looking for an Engineering Manager to lead one of Contentful’s highly leveraged platform teams: **Workflows**.

This team owns Contentful’s **Orchestration Platform** — the workflow + automation engine behind approvals, tasks, triggers, and action execution. This is a high-impact role: your work will accelerate many product teams and improve the foundation customers rely on every day.

## What to expect?
In this role you’ll work closely with senior stakeholders across the business to understand strategy and goals, and collaborate with internal teams and external partners to keep our architecture, tech stack, and development practices aligned to deliver impact.

- **Build and support** high-performing, globally distributed teams, with a culture of collaboration, ownership, and continuous improvement.
- **Partner closely** with Product and Design to shape and deliver the roadmap for UI Foundations and Workflows, balancing near-term needs with long-term platform health.
- **Enable platform adoption across teams** through clear interfaces, documentation, migration support, and predictable release practices.
- **Evolve the orchestration platform** (workflow APIs, execution semantics, integrations/actions, reliability/observability) to support approvals, tasks, triggers, and automation at scale.
- **Strengthen operational practices** with healthy on-call/support models, incident response, post-incident learning, and measurable reliability improvements.
- **Coach and develop engineers** across levels, supporting growth, feedback, and sustainable delivery habits.
- Collaborate with AI Enablement and product teams so AI-powered capabilities (e.g., AI Actions/Suggestions) integrate cleanly into workflows and UI foundations with clear boundaries and reliable behavior.

## What you need to be successful?
We’re looking for an Engineering Manager who enjoys platform environments where success depends on adoption, stability, and strong partnership with many internal customers. To succeed in this role, you should:

- **2+ years of experience managing cross-functional development teams** and delivering complex solutions with Product and Design partners.
- Comfortable working in **ambiguity and change**, bringing structure and clarity while balancing short-term delivery with long-term platform strategy.
- Experience with **platform or foundational teams** where success depends on adoption, stability, documentation, and thoughtful rollout/migration support.
- Technical breadth across **modern web platforms and backend distributed systems**; able to review architecture, ask strong questions, and help teams make good tradeoffs (app shell/navigation, design systems, shared packages, APIs, workflow engines, event-driven execution).
- Familiarity with **event-driven distributed systems concepts** such as queues, orchestration, retries, idempotency, long-running workflows, and reliability—enough to guide discussions and support strong engineering decisions.
- Strong **quality mindset for platforms**: observability, incident readiness, performance, safe rollout practices (versioning, backwards compatibility, migrations, deprecations).
- **Product-minded**: able to translate early ideas into workable technical options and tradeoffs, especially where flexibility and simplicity need careful balance.
- Strong **collaboration across many stakeholders and teams**, helping align on priorities, dependencies, and sequencing with transparency.
- **People leadership** strength: hiring, coaching, feedback, and creating an inclusive environment where engineers can do their best work.
- Familiarity with **modern AI-enabled product development** and comfort supporting teams to use AI responsibly (for productivity and for product integration), with measurable outcomes and a strong quality bar.
- Experience with B2B SaaS and enterprise expectations (security, compliance, reliability) is a plus.

### Bonus:
- Experience building workflow/automation platforms (state machines, orchestration engines, integration ecosystems) with strong operability requirements.
- Familiarity with security/compliance considerations for systems that execute actions and integrate with external services (auditability, permissions, data handling).

## What’s in it for you?
- Join an ambitious tech company reshaping the way people build digital experiences
- Full-time employees receive **Stock Options** for the opportunity to share in the success of our company
- **Fertility and family building benefits**, including a lifetime reimbursable wallet to support your growing family.
- We value **Work-Life balance** and **You Time**! A generous amount of paid time off, including vacation days, sick days, education days, compassion days for loss, and volunteer days
- Time off to care for and focus on your growing family
- Use your **personal annual education budget** to improve your skills and grow in your career
- Enjoy a full range of virtual and in-person events, including workshops, guest speakers, and fun team activities
- An **annual wellbeing stipend** to care for your physical, financial, or emotional health
- A **monthly communication phone/internet stipend** and phone hardware upgrade reimbursement.
- **New hire office equipment stipend** for hybrid or distributed employees.

## Who are we?
Contentful is a leading **digital experience platform** that helps modern businesses meet the growing demand for engaging, personalized content at scale. By blending composability with native **AI** capabilities, Contentful enables dynamic personalization, automated content delivery, and real-time experimentation, powering next-generation digital experiences across brands, regions, and channels for more than 4,200 organizations worldwide. More than **700 people** from more than **70 nations** contribute their energy and creativity to Contentful, working from hubs in Berlin, Denver, San Francisco, London, New York, and distributed worldwide.

## Everyone is welcome here!
“Everyone is welcome here” is a celebrated component of our culture. At Contentful, we strive to create an inclusive environment that empowers our employees. We believe that our products and services benefit from our diverse backgrounds and experiences, and we are proud to be an equal opportunity employer.
summary: Contentful is seeking an Engineering Manager to lead the Workflows platform team, responsible for the company's Orchestration Platform. The role focuses on scaling automation engines, managing globally distributed teams, and collaborating with Product and Design to drive platform adoption and reliability.
benefits: Fertility and family building benefits (lifetime reimbursable wallet)
