title: Engineering Manager - Celonis Process Management
description:
## Role Overview
We're Celonis, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes.

## The Team
Celonis Process Management is at the forefront of revolutionizing business process management with the introduction of **Symbio**, an innovative AI-driven software. We create Business Process Management Software that lets employees do their best work. We believe that, from the production line to the executive board, everyone in an organization essentially wants the same thing: Flow. Everything we do at Celonis is in the service of creating Flow and allowing for a new kind of business processes: Of the people. By the people. For the people.

## The Role
As an Engineering Manager for our Celonis Process Management team, you will lead the design and delivery of cutting-edge solutions to integrate Process Management seamlessly into the Celonis Platform. This role is at the crossroads of technology, user experience, and strategic impact, driving the next wave of innovation in process management.

Your team will focus on building robust, scalable **APIs and microservices** leveraging **C#**, **Azure**, and modern microservice architectures to deliver high-performing, extensible solutions. You will foster an environment of growth and collaboration, guiding and mentoring your engineers to excel in their careers while maintaining high standards of quality and innovation.

## The work you’ll do
- Lead a team of talented engineers in designing and delivering scalable solutions for integrating Process Management into the Celonis Platform.
- Use technical judgment and intuition about customer behavior to determine the best paths forward on features, trading off properties like time to implement, maintainability, scalability, and performance.
- Work closely with other engineering teams, x-functional stakeholders, and leads to ensure the delivery of impactful product features that drive customer value and shape product strategy.
- Manage the performance and support the career development of engineers up to the **Staff level**.
- Build and maintain an engineering culture of trust, ownership, and collaboration within the larger Celonis organization.

## The product you’ll work on
- The next generation of Celonis Process Management.
- Features that make it easier to model customers' processes.
- Systems that allow all users in a company to leverage system knowledge.
- Partnering with AI teams to suggest modeling steps that save users time describing complex source data.
- Enabling all-of-business process insights.
- High visibility to sales & executive leadership.

## The qualifications you need
- **3+ years** of experience in an Engineering Manager or technical leadership position leading projects and people.
- **8+ years** as a Software Engineer (**Mandatory**).
- Strong technical knowledge (staff engineer-level knowledge of software engineering is expected).
- Experience working with technologies like **C#** and **Azure** (Java as nice to have) and **microservices**.
- Strong communication skills for collaboration across multiple roles and countries.
- Knowledge of day-to-day team organization methodologies like **Agile**.
- Ability to lead and make decisions to define the road ahead.
- Ability to resolve technical conflicts and foster a positive environment for escalations.
- Ready to roll up your sleeves to help your team.

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation:** Work with leading, award-winning process mining technology.
- **Accelerate Your Growth:** Clear career paths, internal mobility, dedicated learning program, and mentorship.
- **Exceptional Benefits:** Generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, and dedicated volunteer days.
- **Prioritize Your Well-being:** Gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong:** Dedicated inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Make Meaningful Impact:** Driven by values: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Collaborate Globally:** Dynamic, international team.
- **Empowered Environment:** Open culture with autonomous teams.

## About Us
Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology and augments it with business context to give customers a living digital twin of their business operation. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.

## Celonis Inclusion Statement
At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table.

## Your Privacy
Information submitted will be processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices and Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.

title: Senior Applied AI Engineer - Public Sector
description:
## Company Overview
We're **Celonis**, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes.

## Role Description
As a **Senior Applied AI Engineer - Public Sector**, you are pushing the envelope in solving business-critical problems. You will be working with strategic customers to understand their objectives and build Celonis solutions using the Process Intelligence (PI) platform combined with leading AI/ML partners like **Microsoft, OpenAI, and Databricks**. 

You will prototype solutions, demonstrate value to Executives, and ensure successful implementation and adoption. This position focuses on **Public Sector** customers, aiming to create efficient, resilient processes for citizens and government agencies.

## Key Responsibilities
- **AI Discovery & Solutioning**: Understand customer AI strategy and translate requirements into innovative solutions.
- **Hackathons & Prototyping**: Rapidly build creative prototypes using cutting-edge AI technologies to solve complex problems.
- **Agentic Process Transformation**: Enable the shift from rule-based automation to autonomous AI agents powered by the Celonis PI Platform.
- **Proof projects**: End-to-end execution of Proof-of-Value projects, including architecture and delivery of secure, scalable LLM/agent systems with **RAG**, tools, and guardrails; integrating with enterprise data, identity, and compliance frameworks.
- **Ensure Successful Project Outcome**: Remain involved until agreed value and adoption thresholds are reached.
- **Specialize in Domains or Industries**: Scale knowledge across the organization by specializing in specific domains (e.g., supply chain) and industries.

## Requirements
- **5+ years of experience** leading technical pre-sales, defining AI roadmaps, building ROI/TCO business cases, and prototyping ML and generative AI solutions.
- Understanding of **generative AI techniques**: RAG, few shot learning, prompt engineering, multi-agent orchestration, multimodal understanding, or fine-tuning.
- Ability to build high-impact use cases such as **intelligent chatbots** and **automated text processors**.
- Understanding of business processes across sectors (e.g., **Supply Chain** or **Finance**).
- Proficiency in **Python** and common ML libraries (**LangChain, pandas, pydantic, sklearn, PyTorch**) as well as data engineering tools.
- Strong presentation skills for internal and external stakeholders, including executives.
- **Bachelor’s Degree** required; Master’s Degree in computer science, engineering, mathematics or related fields (or equivalent experience) preferred.
- Excellent communication and presentation skills in **English and German**. A high level of fluency in German is required.

## Nice to have (Big Plus)
- Hands-on experience building agentic systems using LLM orchestration, RAG, function calling, and prompt engineering, with rigorous evaluations and guardrails.
- Working knowledge of tools like **LangChain, LlamaIndex**, or other OSS packages.
- Experience deploying and monitoring models at scale on **AWS Bedrock, Azure AI, or GCP Vertex**.
- **Security Certification (Sicherheitsüberprüfung)** up to **SÜ2**.

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation**: Work with award-winning process mining technology.
- **Accelerate Your Growth**: Clear career paths, internal mobility, dedicated learning program, and mentorship.
- **Exceptional Benefits**: Generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (RSUs), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, and dedicated volunteer days.
- **Prioritize Your Well-being**: Gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong**: Inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Make Meaningful Impact**: A company driven by values: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Collaborate Globally**: International team environment.
- **Empowered Environment**: Open culture with autonomous teams.

## About Us
Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology to create a digital twin of business operations. Headquartered in Munich and New York City, with over 20 offices worldwide.

## Celonis Inclusion Statement
At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We value different perspectives to drive creativity and innovation.

## Your Privacy
Applications are processed in accordance with Celonis’ Accessibility and Candidate Notices and Privacy Notice for the Application and Hiring Process.

title: Senior Value Engineer - Public Sector
description:
## Company Overview
We're **Celonis**, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes.

## The Role
As a **(Senior) Value Engineer / Management Consultant - Public Sector**, you’ll spearhead our mission to make processes work in the public sector - for citizens, government agencies and the planet, creating efficient, resilient processes which will shape a modern, citizen-oriented state. 

Working in partnership with the Celonis Sales Teams, you have full responsibility for the end-to-end value journey of our customers. You will act as a trusted advisor helping customers achieve strategic goals and realize significant value using the **Celonis Process Intelligence Platform**. In collaboration with partners and Celonis Services, you will drive measurable business impact and accelerate platform adoption by blending deep process expertise, Public Sector knowledge, and a proven consulting skill set.

## The Work You’ll Do

### Identify & Frame Value
- Discover and translate customers’ strategic priorities into high-impact Celonis use cases.
- Build demos and business cases, leveraging industry benchmarks and best practices to win new customers.
- Undertake Value Assessments or Proof-of-Value Projects and communicate the value opportunity and strategic roadmap to C-Level executives.

### Realize Value
- Facilitate business value workshops and use Celonis to identify and qualify opportunities for process enhancement.
- Derive improvement measures in core business functions and initiate improvement actions and enterprise-wide change initiatives.
- Present results and realized value to senior management and C-level executives.

### Scale Value
- Responsible for the end-to-end customer value journey: landing, expanding, adoption, and renewing.
- Build a strategic expansion roadmap for customers embedding Celonis Process Intelligence Platform as a strategic business transformation platform.
- Provide feedback to product development teams to enhance the Celonis platform and Apps based on new use cases.

## The Qualifications You Need
*The following requirements are most likely to result from **3-7 years** of relevant work experience following completion of a Master’s degree:*

- **Live for Customer Value:** Experience in an analytical role focusing on demonstrating/securing value through business data analysis, business process improvement, and/or Software deployment. Experience in customer-facing roles (Consultancy/SaaS) or in-house roles (Center of Excellence for Data Mining/Analytics/Intelligence) is ideal.
- **Value Selling & Executive Stakeholder Management:** Excellent communication and presentation skills in **German (fluent)** and **English**. Experience communicating roadmaps and results to stakeholders; sales acumen and a winning appearance.
- **Data, AI, Analytics, Applications & IT:** Good understanding of Databases and challenges of fragmented/custom legacy source systems. Practical experience in **SQL** and/or **Python**. Experience collaborating with IT teams and a deep understanding of **EU AI Regulations**. 
- **Plus/Nice-to-have Technicals:** Experience with AI agents (**IBM Watson Orchestrate, Amazon Bedrock, Microsoft Copilot, Salesforce Agentforce**), **RPA**, **BI Tools**, building Dashboards, or Apps/Action Flows.
- **Builder Mentality:** Passion for experimenting with technology and creating new models for new use cases.
- **Process Improvement & Value Realization:** Experience identifying use cases for business process improvement, deploying measures, acting as a change agent, and training users.
- **Project Management:** Experience planning and managing project scopes, expectations, and timelines.
- **Business Domain Expertise:** Good understanding of processes in the **Public Sector** (Federal or state ministries, agencies, and/or semi-public structures like statutory health insurers).
- **Industry Expertise:** Deep understanding of industry trends and strategic opportunities in the Public Sector.
- **Degree:** Master's degree in Industrial/Business Engineering, Technology and/or Management, Political Sciences, Informatics, Mathematics or similar.
- **Nice-to-have:** Security Certification (**Sicherheitsüberprüfung**) up to **SÜ2**.

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation:** Work with leading process mining technology.
- **Accelerate Your Growth:** Clear career paths, internal mobility, dedicated learning program, and mentorship.
- **Exceptional Benefits:** Generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (**RSUs**), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, and dedicated volunteer days.
- **Prioritize Your Well-being:** Gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong:** Inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Make Meaningful Impact:** A company driven by values: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Collaborate Globally:** Dynamic, international team.
- **Empowered Environment:** Open culture with autonomous teams.

## About Us
Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology to provide a living digital twin of business operations. Headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with over 20 offices worldwide.

The role involves framing value through business cases, executing process improvements, and managing C-level stakeholder relationships to drive platform adoption.

title: VP, Solution Engineering (Value Engineering) - DACH
description:
## Company Overview
We're **Celonis**, the global leader in Process Intelligence technology and one of the world's fastest-growing SaaS firms. We believe there is a massive opportunity to unlock productivity by placing AI, data and intelligence at the core of business processes.

Value Engineering operates at the very heart of Celonis, dovetailing our Go-to-Market with our Product & Engineering organization to maximize the value our customers realize from our technology. Leveraging the Celonis Process Intelligence Platform together with advanced analytics, machine learning, and AI, our teams help customers uncover inefficiencies, identify high-impact opportunities, and transform business processes. Value Engineers guide organizations through the entire value journey — from identifying use cases and running proof-of-value initiatives to scaling AI-driven process improvements that deliver measurable business outcomes.

The **DACH region** is one of our largest and most strategically significant markets. With our headquarters based in Munich, we work closely with some of our most mature customers, continue to win new ones, and consistently lead the way in piloting innovative go-to-market strategies.

## The Role
As a **VP, Value Engineering DACH**, you will be a leader of leaders. You lead an organization of Value Engineers to drive the end-to-end customer value journey – from landing new customers to securing and expanding within the installed base of customers. You will be measured on **net-new ARR, customer health, and product adoption**. You play an active role in our regional, cross-functional go-to-market leadership team, act as a trusted advisor to the Celonis Executive Team, and support engagements with senior stakeholders at our most strategic customers.

As a leader in one of the fastest-growing tech companies globally, you will bring a proven pre-sales and consulting skill set, as well as strong analytical and strategy-to-execution leadership. You will foster a positive and supportive work environment for your teams, promoting employee satisfaction and career growth.

## The Work You’ll Do

### Identify & Frame Value For Prospects/Customers
- Oversee the end-to-end customer value journey for the entire customer portfolio, including responsibility for landing, expanding, adoption and renewing accounts
- Translate customers’ strategic objectives into high-impact Celonis use cases and evangelize Process Intelligence Platform across prospects and customers
- Communicate the value opportunity and strategic roadmap to C-Level executives in partnership with sales leadership
- Serve as an executive sponsor across the customer portfolio and solidify Celonis as a strategic business transformation platform for our customers

### Create & Scale Value Across The Portfolio
- Lead the customer base through the Celonis Value Journey (Landing, expanding, adoption and renewing)
- Facilitate business value workshops and use Celonis to identify and qualify opportunities for process enhancement
- Lead the organization in building strategic expansion roadmaps embedding Celonis Process Intelligence Platform as a strategic business transformation platform in their organization to drive adoption and expansion
- Present results and realized value to senior management and C-level executives
- Ensure customer success and architect improvement measures and manage change within the customer base
- Provide feedback to our product development teams to enhance the Celonis platform and Apps based on new use cases

### Grow & Lead Celonis Talent
- Develop world-class talent through a strong focus on structured enablement and career development combined with hands-on leadership, continuous feedback, and active mentorship
- Lead by example and consistently demonstrate the **Celonis Leadership Principles** (lead with purpose, facilitate greatness, embrace difference, and cultivate balance)
- Effectively allocate Celonis resources to deliver on company sales, renewals, value, and adoption targets
- Communicate success and flag risks proactively within the organization

## The Qualifications You Need
- **Leadership Skills:** Proven track record of **10+ years** as a people and business leader in a customer-facing role with a Consultancy or a SaaS Provider. Ability to lead by example and act as a role model.
- **Executive Presence:** Proven engagement as a sparring partner and thought leader for senior stakeholders; experience communicating results to senior executives.
- **Sales & Commercial Acumen:** Ability to qualify VE engagements, steer/allocate resources efficiently, and champion value selling methodology.
- **Business Acumen:** Deep knowledge of end-to-end business processes across various domains (e.g., **Finance and Supply Chain**). Ability to build compelling value roadmaps.
- **Industry / Domain Expertise:** Deep fluency in the strategic challenges of the **DACH C-Suite**, particularly in **Banking, Insurance, Pharma, and Retail**.
- **Product Expertise:** Strong understanding of SaaS business models and experience with enterprise software such as **Process Intelligence/Mining, RPA, ERP systems, BI tools, and modern AI technologies**.
- **Builder Mentality:** Proven track record of promoting innovation and experimentation to develop new models and use cases.
- **Value Selling Methodology:** Experience with discovery, qualification, value assessments, and proofs to demonstrate the full value potential of the platform.
- **Value Realization:** Proven track record of identifying/prioritizing use cases, implementing improvement measures, and acting as a change agent.

## What Celonis Can Offer You
- **Pioneer Innovation:** Work with leading, award-winning process mining technology.
- **Accelerate Your Growth:** Clear career paths, internal mobility, dedicated learning program, and mentorship.
- **Exceptional Benefits:** Generous PTO, hybrid working options, company equity (**RSUs**), comprehensive benefits, extensive parental leave, and dedicated volunteer days.
- **Well-being:** Gym subsidies, counseling, and well-being programs.
- **Connect and Belong:** Inclusion and belonging programs.
- **Meaningful Impact:** Driven by values: Live for Customer Value, The Best Team Wins, We Own It, and Earth Is Our Future.
- **Global Collaboration:** Dynamic, international team environment.
- **Empowered Environment:** Open culture with autonomous teams.

## About Us
Celonis makes processes work for people, companies and the planet. The Celonis Process Intelligence Platform uses industry-leading process mining and AI technology and augments it with business context to give customers a living digital twin of their business operation. It’s system-agnostic and without bias, and provides everyone with a common language for understanding and improving businesses. Celonis is headquartered in Munich, Germany, and New York City, USA, with more than 20 offices worldwide.

## Celonis Inclusion Statement
At Celonis, we believe our people make us who we are and that “The Best Team Wins”. We know that the best teams are made up of people who bring different perspectives to the table. And when everyone feels included, able to speak up and knows their voice is heard - that's when creativity and innovation happen.
summary: Celonis is seeking a VP of Value Engineering for the DACH region to lead a team of Value Engineers in driving customer value journeys and scaling AI-driven process improvements. The role requires a strategic leader with extensive experience in SaaS and consulting to drive net-new ARR, product adoption, and executive-level engagements.

title: Senior Mobile Engineer - Android (m/f/d)
description:
At Flix, we offer a tech-driven environment where innovation meets real-world impact, with competitive pay, strong growth opportunities, and a culture of collaboration and ownership.

We’re looking for a **Senior Mobile Engineer - Android (m/f/d)** to help shape the future of Flix mobile experiences, making travel seamless for millions of users worldwide. In this role, you’ll be a key contributor to developing high-quality, scalable, and user-friendly Mobile applications that enhance the passenger journey.

You’ll be joining the Android Team under the Mobile Cluster in our Customer Experience Stream - Demand Division. You will be a part of a diverse team of individuals including product owner, UX specialist, Agile tester and engineers. Our team is responsible for the travel onboarding journey and post-booking experience, ensuring our app is the most convenient travel companion for our passengers.

Beyond our team, we also actively collaborate actively with our iOS and feature based teams in other streams and divisions to create a seamless, mobile experience. This involves delivery high quality work with end-to-end testing and a smooth transition to a fully integrated travel experience journey in mobile.

## Our Tech Stack
- **Languages & Architecture:** Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Clean Architecture
- **Networking & Data:** GraphQL, Firebase Remote Config, Crashlytics
- **Dependency Injection:** Dagger/Hilt
- **Testing:** Espresso, Robolectric, JUnit
- **CI/CD & Automation:** GitLab CI/CD, Fastlane, Docker
- **Collaboration Tools:** Figma, Microsoft Teams, Atlassin Jira, Confluence, Atlas etc

## About the Role
- Design, Develop, and Maintain high-quality Android applications with a focus on scalability, performance, and user experience
- Collaborate closely and effectively with iOS, Backend, and Feature based Teams to align on feature specifications and ensure smooth cross-platform integration
- Drive technical improvements across the entire codebase, including architecture enhancements and codebase modernization and prepare/maintain technical documentation as and when required
- Enhance app performance and user experience through UI optimizations, accessibility compliance, and improvements in battery usage, memory management, and load times with focus on an excellent customer experience and delivering high quality products
- Leverage analytics & metrics to make data-driven decisions, optimizing performance and engagement based on user behavior and app health
- Mentor and support fellow engineers, promoting a culture of technical excellence, and collaboration through code reviews and sharing best practices
- Stay up to date with the latest Android trends, tools, and technologies, incorporating innovative solutions to improve the team's workflow and drive mobile development excellence

## About You
- **6+ years** of extensive experience and strong expertise in **Kotlin (Jetpack Compose, MVVM, Coroutines)**, with a deep understanding of Android architecture, best practices along with **SOLID principles** and software architecture patterns etc
- Experience with testing (unit, integration, UI testing) and a strong commitment to writing testable, maintainable, high-quality code.
- Ability to drive technical strategy ensuring high standards in code quality, performance, and scalability, focusing on product impact with proper documentation (RFCs, POCs, SOPs etc) and improve processes as needed e.g, incident management, release processes etc
- Customer-centric approach with a focus on delivering great user experiences and strong collaboration skills to work closely with iOS, Backend, and Hybrid teams.
- Continuous Learner's Mindset: Willingness to learn new tools, technologies, and frameworks as mobile development evolves.

## Nice to have
- Experience with hybrid frameworks/platforms (**Kotlin Multiplatform Mobile, React Native**) and understanding their architecture.
- Experience with **GraphQL, REST APIs**, and integrating backend services.
- Experience in UI/UX design or a good eye for design principles and user interface consistency.

We recognize that everyone carries a unique set of valuable skills and experiences. If you think you could have an impact even though you don't meet 100% of the requirements, we still encourage you to apply. We want to hear from you!

## What We Offer
- **Travel perks**: 12 free Flix vouchers + 12 discount vouchers for friends & family.
- **Work from (M)Anywhere**: Depending on your role, work from another location for up to 60 days per year.
- **Hybrid work model**: We are an office-first company, but we offer flexibility to balance work and life.
- **Wellbeing support**: Access confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for yourself and up to four family members.
- **Learning & Development**: Take advantage of language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions to grow your skills.
- **Mentoring Program**: Connect with experienced colleagues to gain insights and accelerate your career.

## Why Join Flix?
At Flix, we empower our teams to push boundaries and shape the future of mobility. As we continue to scale globally, we harness cutting-edge technology to make mobility smarter, more sustainable, and more affordable.

If you’re looking for a place where you can drive change and redefine how millions of people travel, Flix is the place where you can lead your journey!
summary: Flix is seeking a Senior Android Engineer with over 6 years of experience to join their Customer Experience Stream. The role focuses on designing and maintaining high-quality Android applications using Kotlin and Jetpack Compose to enhance the passenger travel journey.
benefits: Work from (M)Anywhere (up to 60 days per year)
Confidential 1:1 counselling, courses, and stress management for self and up to 4 family members
Language classes, training courses, and expert-led sessions

title: Pricing Analyst (Global Pricing)
description:
## Company Overview
As the world’s pioneering local delivery platform, our mission is to deliver an amazing experience, fast, easy, and to your door. We operate in around 65 countries worldwide powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany. Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt. No matter where you're from or what you believe in, we build, we deliver, we lead. We are Delivery Hero.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **(Senior) Pricing Analyst, Global Pricing** to join the Pricing Team. In this role, you will sit at the intersection of Product, Marketing, and Finance. You will be responsible for architecting, validating and sharing advanced pricing models—balancing customer affordability with sustainable unit economics (GPO). Your mission is to conceptualize next-generation pricing features and provide the statistical rigour needed to scale these globally.

## What You Will Do
- **Advanced Pricing Model Innovation**: Collaborate with the Data Science team in the research and development of new pricing algorithms. Ideate and build sophisticated statistical models to generate value and calculate impact of proposed features on key metrics.
- **Causal Inference & Performance Tracking**: Lead the causality analysis for pricing rollouts. Distinguish between correlation and causation to identify true "value leakage" and recommend data-backed iterations.
- **Strategic Communication**: Partner with Global Marketing and Regional Ops leads to translate complex statistical outputs into intuitive narratives that the business can act upon. Evangelize data-driven decision making across the organization.
- **BigQuery Optimization**: Support technical architecture of pricing automation by creating and optimizing SQL queries that feed pipelines.
- **Advanced Visualization & Tooling**: Build accessible, creative, and engaging data visualizations and tools in Tableau/Python to facilitate access to insights and decision making.
- **Data Stewardship & Governance**: Maintain deep knowledge about the data catalog for all Pricing dimensions, metrics, and KPIs. Collaborate with Data Engineering and Product to ensure experiment data is correctly logged and scalable.
- **Strategic Stakeholder Management**: Act as a bridge between Central and Regional teams by translating complex technical concepts into actionable business strategies. Influence decision-making by demystifying automation models and technical methodologies for non-technical leadership.

## Requirements
- **Experience**: 3+ years (Pricing Analyst) or 5+ years (Senior Pricing Analyst) as a Pricing Analyst or a highly quantitative Data Analyst, with a strong background in Statistics, Data Science.
- **Technical Stack**: Mastery of **BigQuery** and **SQL** is essential. Capability of building **Python-based** modeling pipelines and experience with **GitHub**.
- **Statistical Mastery**: Deep expertise in causal inference, statistics, and price elasticity modeling.
- **Business Acumen**: Deep understanding of unit economics and how pricing models or experiments affect the business.
- **Exceptional Communication**: Ability to demystify multi-dimensional models and explain complex topics to non-technical stakeholders in a clear and compelling way.
- **Proactive & Curious**: A self-starter able to independently deliver end-to-end solutions with a desire to think outside the box.

## Benefits
- **Working Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week at the Berlin campus).
- **Vacation**: 27 days holiday with an extra day on 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financial & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Perks**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation**: Support and guidance for moving to Berlin via a relocation hub.

## Diversity & Inclusion
We believe diversity and inclusion are key to creating an amazing customer and employee experience. We do not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a (Senior) Pricing Analyst for their Global Pricing team in Berlin to develop advanced pricing models and algorithms. The role involves using causal inference and statistical modeling to optimize unit economics and collaborating with cross-functional teams to drive data-driven pricing strategies.

We operate in around 65 countries worldwide powered by tech, designed by people. As one of Europe’s largest tech platforms, headquartered in Berlin, Germany, Delivery Hero has been listed on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange since 2017 and is part of the MDAX stock market index. We enable creative minds to deliver solutions that create impact within our ecosystem. We move fast, take action and adapt.

## Role Overview
We are on the lookout for a **Senior Software Engineer, ReactJS & Python - (Logistics)** to join the **Choice team**. This is a frontend-heavy fullstack role working within the **Optimal Choice squad**, which owns the backoffice tool “Delivery Areas Service” that determines vendor-to-customer delivery mapping.

## The Mission
You will join the squad during a critical migration of the tool to a more secure internal system and deployment method. This involves redesigning the application from scratch to improve UX, guardrails, and development experience. You will collaborate with the design team and leverage state-of-the-art AI agentic tools to build a complete new application.

## What You Will Do
- **Lead the Migration**: Drive the end-to-end rewrite of existing back-office tools into the new Ops Portal, eliminating technical debt and implementing modern design specifications.
- **Build from Scratch**: Leverage modern React and updated libraries to create a high-performance, analytical tool for internal users.
- **Bridge the Stack**: Lean heavily into the frontend while ensuring seamless integration with Python-based microservices and optimizing end-to-end data flow.
- **Collaborate & Mentor**: Partner with frontend specialists to elevate the team’s frontend ecosystem and mentor other engineers on best practices.
- **Own the Lifecycle**: Take full ownership of features from initial specification and system design to deployment and production monitoring.

## Requirements
- **Frontend-First Mindset**: Identify as 80-90% Frontend-focused. Expert in modern React (Hooks, Context, State management).
- **Backend Capable**: "Fullstack-literate" with the ability to debug and contribute to Python backends and write efficient SQL queries.
- **Autonomous & Pragmatic**: 5+ years of experience with a track record of delivering functionality with minimal bugs, balancing perfect code with the need to ship value.
- **Architectural Fluency**: Understanding of component-driven architecture and ability to contribute to system design spanning multiple services.
- **Testing Rigor**: Commitment to the "test-pyramid," writing robust unit and integration tests.
- **Problem Solver**: Ability to analyze business impact of delivery area dynamics and suggest/prioritize technical solutions.
- **AI Adopter**: Ability to leverage AI tools to increase efficiency.

## Benefits & Perks
- **Work Model**: Hybrid working model (2 days a week at the Berlin campus).
- **Time Off**: 27 days holiday, with an extra day on the 2nd and 3rd year of service.
- **Professional Development**: 1,000 € Educational Budget, Language Courses, Parental Support, and access to Udemy Business.
- **Health & Wellness**: Health Checkups, Meditation, Gym & Bicycle Subsidy.
- **Financials & Security**: Employee Share Purchase Plan, Sabbatical Bank, Public Transportation Ticket Discount, Life & Accident Insurance, Corporate Pension Plan.
- **Food & Discounts**: Digital Meal Vouchers, Food Vouchers, and Corporate Discounts.
- **Relocation**: Relocation support and guides for moving to Berlin.

## Diversity & Inclusion
Delivery Hero does not discriminate on the basis of racial identities, religious beliefs, color, national origin, gender identities or expressions, sexual orientations, age, marital or disability statuses. Severely disabled applicants with equal qualifications will be given preferential consideration.
summary: Delivery Hero is seeking a Senior Software Engineer with a heavy focus on ReactJS and Python to join the Choice team in Berlin. The role involves leading the complete redesign and migration of a critical internal logistics tool, moving from legacy systems to a modern, AI-enhanced architecture.
